[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfCats.

Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.WhiskeredBifunctors.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Functors.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Actegories.Actegories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Actegories.MorphismsOfActegories.

Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.BicatOfActegories.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.BicatOfActionsInBicat.

Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.WhiskeredMonoidalFromBicategory.

Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Biequivalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Transformations.PseudoTransformation.

Import BifunctorNotations.

#[local] Opaque bifunctor_data_from_functorintoendofunctorcat_is_bifunctor.


Section ActegoryToObject.

  Context {V : category} (Mon_V : monoidal V).
  Context {C : category}.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
act: actegory Mon_V C
fmonoidal_data (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (C : bicat_of_cats))
  (bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat act)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
act: actegory Mon_V C
v, w: V
category_from_bicat_and_ob C
⟦ bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat act v
  ⊗_{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob C} bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat
                                      act w,
bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat act
  (v ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} w) ⟧

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
act: actegory Mon_V C
v, w: V
is_nat_trans
  (bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat act v
   ⊗_{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob C} bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat
                                       act w)
  (bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat act
     (v ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} w))
  (λ c : C, actegory_actorinvdata act w v c)

      abstract (intros v1 w1 f;
      apply actorinv_nat_leftwhisker).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
act: actegory Mon_V C
preserves_unit (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob C)
  (bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat act)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
act: actegory Mon_V C
is_nat_trans
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob C))
  (bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat act
     (monoidal_unit (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)))
  (λ v : C, actegory_unitorinvdata act v)

      abstract (intros v w f;
      exact (! actegory_unitorinvnat Mon_V act v w f)).
  Defined.

C: category

fmonoidal_laxlaws (fmonoidal_data_to_object act)

act: actegory Mon_V C
fmonoidal_laxlaws (fmonoidal_data_to_object act)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
act: actegory Mon_V C
x, y1, y2: V
g: V ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
x0: C
g ⊗^{ act}_{r} (x ⊗_{ act} x0)
· actegory_actorinvdata act y2 x x0 =
actegory_actorinvdata act y1 x x0
· (g ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} x) ⊗^{ act}_{r} x0
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
act: actegory Mon_V C
x1, x2, y: V
f: V ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
x: C
y ⊗^{ act}_{l} (f ⊗^{ act}_{r} x)
· actegory_actorinvdata act y x2 x =
actegory_actorinvdata act y x1 x
· (y ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} f) ⊗^{ act}_{r} x
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
act: actegory Mon_V C
x, y, z: V
x0: C
z ⊗^{ act}_{l} actegory_actorinvdata act y x x0
· actegory_actorinvdata act z (y ⊗_{ Mon_V} x) x0
· monoidal_associatorinvdata Mon_V z y x
  ⊗^{ act}_{r} x0 =
identity (z ⊗_{ act} (y ⊗_{ act} (x ⊗_{ act} x0)))
· actegory_actorinvdata act z y (x ⊗_{ act} x0)
· actegory_actorinvdata act (z ⊗_{ Mon_V} y) x x0
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
act: actegory Mon_V C
x: V
x0: C
x ⊗^{ act}_{l} actegory_unitorinvdata act x0
· actegory_actorinvdata act x (monoidal_unit Mon_V) x0
· monoidal_rightunitordata Mon_V x ⊗^{ act}_{r} x0 =
identity (x ⊗_{ act} x0)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
act: actegory Mon_V C
x: V
x0: C
actegory_unitorinvdata act (x ⊗_{ act} x0)
· actegory_actorinvdata act (monoidal_unit Mon_V) x x0
· monoidal_leftunitordata Mon_V x ⊗^{ act}_{r} x0 =
identity (x ⊗_{ act} x0)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
act: actegory Mon_V C
x: V
x0: C
tri:= actegory_triangleidentity' Mon_V act x x0: actegory_actordata act (monoidal_unit Mon_V) x
  x0 · actegory_unitordata act (x ⊗_{ act} x0) =
monoidal_leftunitordata Mon_V x ⊗^{ act}_{r} x0
actegory_unitorinvdata act (x ⊗_{ act} x0)
· identity
    (monoidal_unit Mon_V ⊗_{ act} (x ⊗_{ act} x0))
· actegory_unitordata act (x ⊗_{ act} x0) =
identity (x ⊗_{ act} x0)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
act: actegory Mon_V C
x: V
x0: C
tri:= actegory_triangleidentity' Mon_V act x x0: actegory_actordata act (monoidal_unit Mon_V) x
  x0 · actegory_unitordata act (x ⊗_{ act} x0) =
monoidal_leftunitordata Mon_V x ⊗^{ act}_{r} x0
actegory_unitorinvdata act (x ⊗_{ act} x0)
· actegory_unitordata act (x ⊗_{ act} x0) =
identity (x ⊗_{ act} x0)

      apply actegory_unitorisolaw.
  Qed.

  Definition fmonoidal_lax_to_object
             (act : actegory Mon_V C)
    : fmonoidal_lax
        (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
        (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (C : bicat_of_cats))
        (bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat act)
    := fmonoidal_data_to_object act ,, fmonoidal_laxlaws_to_object act.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
Act: actegory Mon_V C
fmonoidal_stronglaws
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_data_to_object Act))
  (pr2 (fmonoidal_data_to_object Act))

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
Act: actegory Mon_V C
fmonoidal_stronglaws
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_data_to_object Act))
  (pr2 (fmonoidal_data_to_object Act))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
Act: actegory Mon_V C
preserves_tensor_strongly
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_data_to_object Act))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
Act: actegory Mon_V C
nat_trans_data
  (bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act
     (monoidal_unit (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)))
  (monoidal_unit
     (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (C : bicat_of_cats)))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
Act: actegory Mon_V C
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act
            (monoidal_unit (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)))
         (monoidal_unit
            (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
               (C : bicat_of_cats))),
 is_nat_trans
   (bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act
      (monoidal_unit (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)))
   (monoidal_unit
      (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (C : bicat_of_cats)))
   t) ?pr10
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
Act: actegory Mon_V C
pr2 (fmonoidal_data_to_object Act) · (?pr10,, ?pr2) =
identity
  (monoidal_unit
     (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (C : bicat_of_cats)))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
Act: actegory Mon_V C
(λ _ : pr2 (fmonoidal_data_to_object Act)
       · (?pr10,, ?pr2) =
       identity
         (monoidal_unit
            (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
               (C : bicat_of_cats))),
 (?pr10,, ?pr2) · pr2 (fmonoidal_data_to_object Act) =
 identity
   (bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act
      (monoidal_unit (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)))) 
  ?pr11

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
Act: actegory Mon_V C
preserves_tensor_strongly
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_data_to_object Act))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
Act: actegory Mon_V C
v, w: V
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_data_to_object Act) v w)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
Act: actegory Mon_V C
v, w: V
category_from_bicat_and_ob C
⟦ bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act
    (v ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} w),
bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act v
⊗_{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob C} bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat
                                    Act w ⟧
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
Act: actegory Mon_V C
v, w: V
(λ g : category_from_bicat_and_ob C
       ⟦ bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act
           (v ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} w),
       bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act v
       ⊗_{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob C} 
       bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act w ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (pr1 (fmonoidal_data_to_object Act) v w) g) 
  ?pr11

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
Act: actegory Mon_V C
v, w: V
category_from_bicat_and_ob C
⟦ bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act
    (v ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} w),
bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act v
⊗_{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob C} bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat
                                    Act w ⟧
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
Act: actegory Mon_V C
v, w: V
is_nat_trans
  (bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act
     (v ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} w))
  (bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act v
   ⊗_{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob C} bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat
                                       Act w)
  (λ c : C, actegory_actordata Act w v c)

        abstract (intros c1 c2 f;
        cbn;
        apply (! actegory_actornatleft _ _ _ _ _ _ _ )).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
Act: actegory Mon_V C
v, w: V
(λ g : category_from_bicat_and_ob C
       ⟦ bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act
           (v ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} w),
       bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act v
       ⊗_{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob C} bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat
                                           Act w ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (pr1 (fmonoidal_data_to_object Act) v w) g)
  ((λ c : C, actegory_actordata Act w v c),,
   fmonoidal_stronglaws_to_object_subproof Act v w)
 use tpair;
        [ apply nat_trans_eq;
          [ apply homset_property |
          intro;
          apply actegory_actorisolaw]
        | apply nat_trans_eq;
          [ apply homset_property |
          intro;
          apply (pr1 (actegory_actorisolaw Mon_V Act w v x))] ].
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
Act: actegory Mon_V C
nat_trans_data
  (bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act
     (monoidal_unit (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)))
  (monoidal_unit
     (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (C : bicat_of_cats)))
 exact (λ c, actegory_unitordata Act c).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
Act: actegory Mon_V C
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act
            (monoidal_unit (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)))
         (monoidal_unit
            (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
               (C : bicat_of_cats))),
 is_nat_trans
   (bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act
      (monoidal_unit (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)))
   (monoidal_unit
      (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (C : bicat_of_cats)))
   t)
  (λ c : C : bicat_of_cats, actegory_unitordata Act c)
 abstract (intros c1 c2 f;
      cbn;
      apply actegory_unitornat).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
Act: actegory Mon_V C
pr2 (fmonoidal_data_to_object Act)
· ((λ c : C : bicat_of_cats, actegory_unitordata Act c),,
   fmonoidal_stronglaws_to_object_subproof0 Act) =
identity
  (monoidal_unit
     (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (C : bicat_of_cats)))
 abstract (use nat_trans_eq;
      [ apply homset_property |
      intro;
      cbn;
      apply actegory_unitorisolaw]).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
Act: actegory Mon_V C
(λ _ : pr2 (fmonoidal_data_to_object Act)
       · ((λ c : C : bicat_of_cats,
           actegory_unitordata Act c),,
          fmonoidal_stronglaws_to_object_subproof0 Act) =
       identity
         (monoidal_unit
            (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
               (C : bicat_of_cats))),
 ((λ c : C : bicat_of_cats, actegory_unitordata Act c),,
  fmonoidal_stronglaws_to_object_subproof0 Act)
 · pr2 (fmonoidal_data_to_object Act) =
 identity
   (bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act
      (monoidal_unit (monoidal_swapped Mon_V))))
  (fmonoidal_stronglaws_to_object_subproof1 Act)
 abstract (use nat_trans_eq;
      [ apply homset_property |
      intro;
      cbn;
      apply actegory_unitorisolaw]).
  Defined.

  Context (ax2 : actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) bicat_of_cats).

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
Act: actegory Mon_V C
bicatactionbicat (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats ax2

ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
Act: actegory Mon_V C
bicatactionbicat (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats ax2

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
Act: actegory Mon_V C
Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     (bidisp_actionbicat_disp_bicat
        (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) bicat_of_cats ax2)) C

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
Act: actegory Mon_V C
fmonoidal (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob C)
  (bifunctor_to_functorintoendofunctorcat Act)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
C: category
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
Act: actegory Mon_V C
fmonoidal_stronglaws
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     (fmonoidal_lax_to_object Act))
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit
     (fmonoidal_lax_to_object Act))

    exact (fmonoidal_stronglaws_to_object Act).
  Defined.

End ActegoryToObject.

Section ActegoryFromObject.

  Context {V : category}.
  Context (Mon_V : monoidal V).

  Context (ax2 : actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats).

  Context (C : bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2).

  Local Definition action_C := pr12 C.
  Local Definition action_fmon_lax := pr122 C.
  Local Definition action_fmon_strong := pr222 C.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
action_unitor_data Mon_V
  (bifunctor_from_functorintoendofunctorcat action_C)

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
action_unitor_data Mon_V
  (bifunctor_from_functorintoendofunctorcat action_C)

    intro ; apply (pr12 action_fmon_strong).
  Defined.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
action_unitorinv_data Mon_V
  (bifunctor_from_functorintoendofunctorcat action_C)

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
action_unitorinv_data Mon_V
  (bifunctor_from_functorintoendofunctorcat action_C)

    intro ; apply (fmonoidal_preservesunit action_fmon_lax).
  Defined.

  Definition actor_from_object
    : actor_data (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) (bifunctor_from_functorintoendofunctorcat action_C)
    := λ v w c, pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong w v) c.

  Definition actorinv_from_object
    : actorinv_data (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) (bifunctor_from_functorintoendofunctorcat action_C)
    := λ v w c, pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr122 C) w v) c.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
actegory_data (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) (pr1 C)

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
actegory_data (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) (pr1 C)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
action_unitor_data (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (bifunctor_from_functorintoendofunctorcat action_C)
× action_unitorinv_data (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
    (bifunctor_from_functorintoendofunctorcat action_C)
  × actor_data (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
      (bifunctor_from_functorintoendofunctorcat
         action_C)
    × actorinv_data (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
        (bifunctor_from_functorintoendofunctorcat
           action_C)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
action_unitorinv_data (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (bifunctor_from_functorintoendofunctorcat action_C)
× actor_data (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
    (bifunctor_from_functorintoendofunctorcat action_C)
  × actorinv_data (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
      (bifunctor_from_functorintoendofunctorcat
         action_C)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
actor_data (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (bifunctor_from_functorintoendofunctorcat action_C)
× actorinv_data (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
    (bifunctor_from_functorintoendofunctorcat action_C)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
actorinv_data (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (bifunctor_from_functorintoendofunctorcat action_C)

    exact actorinv_from_object.
  Defined.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
actegory_laws (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  actegory_data_from_object

C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
actegory_laws (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  actegory_data_from_object

Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
is_bifunctor actegory_data_from_object
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
action_unitor_law (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (actegory_unitordata actegory_data_from_object)
  (actegory_unitorinvdata actegory_data_from_object)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
actor_law (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object)
  (actegory_actorinvdata actegory_data_from_object)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
actegory_triangle_identity 
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (actegory_unitordata actegory_data_from_object)
  (actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
actegory_pentagon_identity 
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
is_bifunctor actegory_data_from_object
 apply bifunctor_data_from_functorintoendofunctorcat_is_bifunctor.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
action_unitor_law (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (actegory_unitordata actegory_data_from_object)
  (actegory_unitorinvdata actegory_data_from_object)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
action_unitor_nat (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (actegory_unitordata actegory_data_from_object)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
x: pr1 C
actegory_unitordata actegory_data_from_object x
· actegory_unitorinvdata actegory_data_from_object x =
identity
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
   ⊗_{ actegory_data_from_object} x)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
x: pr1 C
actegory_unitorinvdata actegory_data_from_object x
· actegory_unitordata actegory_data_from_object x =
identity x

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
action_unitor_nat (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (actegory_unitordata actegory_data_from_object)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
x, y: pr1 C
f: pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
monoidal_unit (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
⊗^{ actegory_data_from_object}_{l} f
· actegory_unitordata actegory_data_from_object y =
actegory_unitordata actegory_data_from_object x · f

        (* That the monoidal unit is strongly preserved, means that we have
           a morphism in the category of endofunctors on C,
           i.e. a natural transformation, hence, we use this naturality *)
        apply (pr212 action_fmon_strong).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
x: pr1 C
actegory_unitordata actegory_data_from_object x
· actegory_unitorinvdata actegory_data_from_object x =
identity
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
   ⊗_{ actegory_data_from_object} x)
 (* Here we use that the unit is strongly preserved, that is,
           we use that the equation that expresses that the
           unit preserving morphism is invertible *)
        apply (eqtohomot (base_paths _ _ (pr222 action_fmon_strong))).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
x: pr1 C
actegory_unitorinvdata actegory_data_from_object x
· actegory_unitordata actegory_data_from_object x =
identity x

        apply (eqtohomot (base_paths _ _ (pr122 action_fmon_strong))).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
actor_law (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object)
  (actegory_actorinvdata actegory_data_from_object)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
actor_nat_leftwhisker (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
actor_nat_rightwhisker (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
actor_nat_leftrightwhisker 
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
v, w: V
z: pr1 C
actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object v w z
· actegory_actorinvdata actegory_data_from_object v w
    z =
identity
  ((v ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} w)
   ⊗_{ actegory_data_from_object} z)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
v, w: V
z: pr1 C
actegory_actorinvdata actegory_data_from_object v w z
· actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object v w z =
identity
  (v
   ⊗_{ actegory_data_from_object} 
   (w ⊗_{ actegory_data_from_object} z))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
actor_nat_leftwhisker (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
v, w: V
z, z': pr1 C
h: pr1 C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object v w z
· v
  ⊗^{ actegory_data_from_object}_{l} (w
                                      ⊗^{ actegory_data_from_object}_{l} h) =
(v ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} w)
⊗^{ actegory_data_from_object}_{l} h
· actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object v w z'

        (* That the monoidal unit is strongly preserved, means that we have
           a morphism in the category of endofunctors on C,
           i.e. a natural transformation, hence, we use this naturality *)
        exact (! pr21 (pr1 action_fmon_strong w v) z z' h).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
actor_nat_rightwhisker (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
v1, v2, w: V
c: pr1 C
f: V ⟦ v1, v2 ⟧
actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object v1 w c
· f
  ⊗^{ actegory_data_from_object}_{r} (w
                                      ⊗_{ actegory_data_from_object} c) =
(f ⊗^{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V}_{r} w)
⊗^{ actegory_data_from_object}_{r} c
· actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object v2 w c

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
v1, v2, w: V
c: pr1 C
f: V ⟦ v1, v2 ⟧
fmon_strong_preserves_tensor_inv:= preservestensor_inv_is_nattrans
  (pr12 action_fmon_lax)
  (pr122 action_fmon_lax)
  (pr1
     action_fmon_strong): preserves_tensor_inv_is_nattrans_type
  Mon_V
  (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
     (pr1 C))
  (pr12 C)
actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object v1 w c
· f
  ⊗^{ actegory_data_from_object}_{r} (w
                                      ⊗_{ actegory_data_from_object} c) =
(f ⊗^{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V}_{r} w)
⊗^{ actegory_data_from_object}_{r} c
· actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object v2 w c

        exact (! (eqtohomot (base_paths _ _ (pr12 fmon_strong_preserves_tensor_inv w _ _ f)) c)).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
actor_nat_leftrightwhisker (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
w, v1, v2: V
c: pr1 C
f: V ⟦ v1, v2 ⟧
actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object w v1 c
· w
  ⊗^{ actegory_data_from_object}_{l} (f
                                      ⊗^{ actegory_data_from_object}_{r} c) =
(w ⊗^{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V}_{l} f)
⊗^{ actegory_data_from_object}_{r} c
· actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object w v2 c

        exact (eqtohomot (base_paths _ _ (preserves_tensorinv_nat_right (pr1 action_fmon_strong) (pr122 action_fmon_lax) v1 v2 w f)) c).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
v, w: V
z: pr1 C
actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object v w z
· actegory_actorinvdata actegory_data_from_object v w
    z =
identity
  ((v ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} w)
   ⊗_{ actegory_data_from_object} z)
 apply (eqtohomot (base_paths _ _ (pr22 (pr1 action_fmon_strong w v)))).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
v, w: V
z: pr1 C
actegory_actorinvdata actegory_data_from_object v w z
· actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object v w z =
identity
  (v
   ⊗_{ actegory_data_from_object} (w
                                   ⊗_{ actegory_data_from_object} z))
 apply (eqtohomot (base_paths _ _ (pr12 (pr1 action_fmon_strong w v)))).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
actegory_triangle_identity (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  (actegory_unitordata actegory_data_from_object)
  (actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
v: V
c: pr1 C
actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object v
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)) c
· v
  ⊗^{ actegory_data_from_object}_{l} actegory_unitordata
                                       actegory_data_from_object
                                       c =
monoidal_rightunitordata (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) v
⊗^{ actegory_data_from_object}_{r} c

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
v: V
c: pr1 C
actor_from_object v (monoidal_unit Mon_V) c
· # (pr1 (action_C v)) (unitor_from_object c) =
pr1 (# action_C (monoidal_leftunitordata Mon_V v)) c

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
v: V
c: pr1 C
plu: pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
     (pr122 C,, pr222 C) 
     (monoidal_unit Mon_V) v)
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       (pr122 C,, pr222 C))
  ⊗^{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 C)} 
  identity ((pr12 C) v)
· monoidal_leftunitordata
    (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 C))
    ((pr12 C) v) =
# (pr12 C) (monoidal_leftunitordata Mon_V v)
actor_from_object v (monoidal_unit Mon_V) c
· # (pr1 (action_C v)) (unitor_from_object c) =
pr1 (# action_C (monoidal_leftunitordata Mon_V v)) c

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
v: V
c: pr1 C
plu: pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
     (pr122 C,, pr222 C) 
     (monoidal_unit Mon_V) v)
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       (pr122 C,, pr222 C))
  ⊗^{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 C)} 
  identity ((pr12 C) v)
· monoidal_leftunitordata
    (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 C))
    ((pr12 C) v) =
# (pr12 C) (monoidal_leftunitordata Mon_V v)
pluc: pr1
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        (pr122 C,, pr222 C)
        (monoidal_unit Mon_V) v)
   · pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
          (pr122 C,, pr222 C))
     ⊗^{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 C)} 
     identity ((pr12 C) v)
   · monoidal_leftunitordata
       (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 C))
       ((pr12 C) v)) c =
pr1
  (# (pr12 C) (monoidal_leftunitordata Mon_V v))
  c
actor_from_object v (monoidal_unit Mon_V) c
· # (pr1 (action_C v)) (unitor_from_object c) =
pr1 (# action_C (monoidal_leftunitordata Mon_V v)) c

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
v: V
c: pr1 C
plu: pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
     (pr122 C,, pr222 C) 
     (monoidal_unit Mon_V) v)
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       (pr122 C,, pr222 C))
  ⊗^{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 C)} 
  identity ((pr12 C) v)
· monoidal_leftunitordata
    (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 C))
    ((pr12 C) v) =
# (pr12 C) (monoidal_leftunitordata Mon_V v)
pluc: pr1
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        (pr122 C,, pr222 C)
        (monoidal_unit Mon_V) v)
   · pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
          (pr122 C,, pr222 C))
     ⊗^{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 C)} 
     identity ((pr12 C) v)
   · monoidal_leftunitordata
       (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 C))
       ((pr12 C) v)) c =
pr1
  (# (pr12 C) (monoidal_leftunitordata Mon_V v))
  c
actor_from_object v (monoidal_unit Mon_V) c
· # (pr1 (action_C v)) (unitor_from_object c) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        (pr122 C,, pr222 C) (monoidal_unit Mon_V) v)
   · pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
          (pr122 C,, pr222 C))
     ⊗^{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 C)} identity
                                               ((pr12 C)
                                                 v)
   · monoidal_leftunitordata
       (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 C))
       ((pr12 C) v)) c

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
v: V
c: pr1 C
actor_from_object v (monoidal_unit Mon_V) c
· # (pr1 (action_C v)) (unitor_from_object c) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        (pr122 C,, pr222 C) (monoidal_unit Mon_V) v)
   · pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
          (pr122 C,, pr222 C))
     ⊗^{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 C)} identity
                                               ((pr12 C)
                                                 v)
   · monoidal_leftunitordata
       (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 C))
       ((pr12 C) v)) c

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
v: V
c: pr1 C
actor_from_object v (monoidal_unit Mon_V) c
· # (pr1 (action_C v)) (unitor_from_object c) =
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
     (pr122 C,, pr222 C) (monoidal_unit Mon_V) v) c
· (# (pr1 ((pr12 C) v))
     ((pr11 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
               (pr122 C,, pr222 C))) c)
   · identity ((pr12 C) v c))
· identity ((pr12 C) v c)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
v: V
c: pr1 C
actor_from_object v (monoidal_unit Mon_V) c
· # (pr1 (action_C v)) (unitor_from_object c) =
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
     (pr122 C,, pr222 C) (monoidal_unit Mon_V) v) c
· # (pr1 ((pr12 C) v))
    ((pr11 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
              (pr122 C,, pr222 C))) c)

      apply idpath.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
actegory_pentagon_identity (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
w, v, v': V
z: pr1 C
monoidal_associatordata (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) w v
  v' ⊗^{ actegory_data_from_object}_{r} z
· actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object w
    (v ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} v') z
· w
  ⊗^{ actegory_data_from_object}_{l} actegory_actordata
                                       actegory_data_from_object
                                       v v' z =
actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object
  (w ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} v) v' z
· actegory_actordata actegory_data_from_object w v
    (v' ⊗_{ actegory_data_from_object} z)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
w, v, v': V
z: pr1 C
pr1
  (# action_C
     (monoidal_associatorinvdata Mon_V v' v w)) z
· actor_from_object w (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) z
· # (pr1 (action_C w)) (actor_from_object v v' z) =
actor_from_object (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) v' z
· actor_from_object w v (pr1 (action_C v') z)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
w, v, v': V
z: pr1 C
pr1
  (# action_C
     (monoidal_associatorinvdata Mon_V v' v w)) z
· (pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w))
    z
· # (pr1 (action_C w))
    ((pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z) =
(pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))) z
· (pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
    (pr1 (action_C v') z)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
w, v, v': V
z: pr1 C
t: pr1
  (# (pr12 C)
     (monoidal_associatordata Mon_V v' v w)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
   · (pr12 C) v'
     ⊗^{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 C)}_{l} 
     is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w)) z =
pr1
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)
     ⊗^{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 C)}_{r} 
     (pr12 C) w
   · monoidal_associatordata
       (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 C))
       ((pr12 C) v') ((pr12 C) v) 
       ((pr12 C) w)) z
pr1
  (# action_C
     (monoidal_associatorinvdata Mon_V v' v w)) z
· (pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w))
    z
· # (pr1 (action_C w))
    ((pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z) =
(pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))) z
· (pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
    (pr1 (action_C v') z)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
w, v, v': V
z: pr1 C
t: # (pr12 C) (monoidal_associatordata Mon_V v' v w)
  z
· is_z_isomorphism_mor
    (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) z
· pr1
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
    (pr1 ((pr12 C) v') z) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor
  (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w) z
· # (pr1 ((pr12 C) w))
    (pr1
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z)
· identity
    ((pr12 C) w ((pr12 C) v ((pr12 C) v' z)))
pr1
  (# action_C
     (monoidal_associatorinvdata Mon_V v' v w)) z
· (pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w))
    z
· # (pr1 (action_C w))
    ((pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z) =
(pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))) z
· (pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
    (pr1 (action_C v') z)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
w, v, v': V
z: pr1 C
t: # (pr12 C) (monoidal_associatordata Mon_V v' v w)
  z
· is_z_isomorphism_mor
    (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) z
· pr1
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
    (pr1 ((pr12 C) v') z) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor
  (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w) z
· # (pr1 ((pr12 C) w))
    (pr1
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z)
pr1
  (# action_C
     (monoidal_associatorinvdata Mon_V v' v w)) z
· (pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w))
    z
· # (pr1 (action_C w))
    ((pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z) =
(pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))) z
· (pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
    (pr1 (action_C v') z)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
w, v, v': V
z: pr1 C
t: # (pr12 C) (monoidal_associatordata Mon_V v' v w)
  z
· is_z_isomorphism_mor
    (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) z
· pr1
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
    (pr1 ((pr12 C) v') z) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor
  (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w) z
· # (pr1 ((pr12 C) w))
    (pr1
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z)
αisov'vw:= z_iso_inv
  (z_iso_from_associator_iso Mon_V v' v w): z_iso (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
  ((v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)
pr1
  (# action_C
     (monoidal_associatorinvdata Mon_V v' v w)) z
· (pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w))
    z
· # (pr1 (action_C w))
    ((pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z) =
(pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))) z
· (pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
    (pr1 (action_C v') z)

Mon_V: monoidal V

    z
· # (pr1 (action_C w))
    ((pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z) =
(pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))) z
· (pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
    (pr1 (action_C v') z)

  (z_iso_from_associator_iso Mon_V v' v w): z_iso (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
  ((v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)

· pr1

pr1

· (pr1

Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats

w, v, v': V
z: pr1 C

  z

     z
   · pr1

       (pr1 ((pr12 C) v') z)) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor
  (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w) z
· # (pr1 ((pr12 C) w))
    (pr1

          (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z)
αisov'vw:= z_iso_inv
  (z_iso_from_associator_iso Mon_V v' v w): z_iso (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
  ((v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)
pf: pr1
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)))
  z
· pr1
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
    (pr1 ((pr12 C) v') z) =

· (pr1
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor
        (pr1 action_fmon_strong 
           (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w)) z
   · # (pr1 ((pr12 C) w))

          (is_z_isomorphism_mor
             (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z))
pr1
  (# action_C
     (monoidal_associatorinvdata Mon_V v' v w)) z
· (pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w))
    z
· # (pr1 (action_C w))
    ((pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z) =
(pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))) z
· (pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
    (pr1 (action_C v') z)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
w, v, v': V
z: pr1 C
t: # (pr12 C) (monoidal_associatordata Mon_V v' v w)
  z
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
     z
   · pr1
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
       (pr1 ((pr12 C) v') z)) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor
  (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w) z
· # (pr1 ((pr12 C) w))
    (pr1
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z)

  (z_iso_from_associator_iso Mon_V v' v w): z_iso (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
  ((v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)

     (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))) z
· pr1
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
    (pr1 ((pr12 C) v') z) =
pr1
  (# (pr12 C)
     (monoidal_associatorinvdata Mon_V v' v w)) z
· (pr1
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor
        (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w))
     z
   · # (pr1 ((pr12 C) w))
       (pr1
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor
             (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z))

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
w, v, v': V
z: pr1 C
t: # (pr12 C) (monoidal_associatordata Mon_V v' v w)
  z
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
     z
   · pr1
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
       (pr1 ((pr12 C) v') z)) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor
  (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w) z
· # (pr1 ((pr12 C) w))
    (pr1
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z)
αisov'vw:= z_iso_inv
  (z_iso_from_associator_iso Mon_V v' v w): z_iso (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
  ((v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)
bla: pr1
  (# (pr12 C)
     (monoidal_associatorinvdata Mon_V v' v w
      · monoidal_associatordata Mon_V v' v w)) z =
pr1
  (# (pr12 C)
     (identity (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))))
  z
?y =
pr1
  (# (pr12 C)
     (monoidal_associatorinvdata Mon_V v' v w)) z
· # (pr12 C) (monoidal_associatordata Mon_V v' v w) z

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V

w, v, v': V
z: pr1 C
t: # (pr12 C) (monoidal_associatordata Mon_V v' v w)

     (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
     z
   · pr1
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
       (pr1 ((pr12 C) v') z)) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor
  (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w) z
· # (pr1 ((pr12 C) w))
    (pr1
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z)
αisov'vw:= z_iso_inv
  (z_iso_from_associator_iso Mon_V v' v w): z_iso (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
  ((v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)
bla: pr1
  (# (pr12 C)
     (monoidal_associatorinvdata Mon_V v' v w)
   · # (pr12 C)
       (monoidal_associatordata Mon_V v' v w)) z =
pr1
  (# (pr12 C)
     (identity (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))))
  z
?y =
pr1
  (# (pr12 C)
     (monoidal_associatorinvdata Mon_V v' v w)) z
· # (pr12 C) (monoidal_associatordata Mon_V v' v w) z

          exact (! bla).

    (pr1
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z)
αisov'vw:= z_iso_inv
  (z_iso_from_associator_iso Mon_V v' v w): z_iso (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
  ((v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)
pf: pr1
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)))
  z
· pr1
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
    (pr1 ((pr12 C) v') z) =
pr1
  (# (pr12 C)
     (monoidal_associatorinvdata Mon_V v' v w)) z
· (pr1
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor
        (pr1 action_fmon_strong 
           (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w)) z
   · # (pr1 ((pr12 C) w))
       (pr1
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor
             (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z))
pr1
  (# action_C
     (monoidal_associatorinvdata Mon_V v' v w)) z
· (pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w))
    z
· # (pr1 (action_C w))
    ((pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z) =
(pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))) z
· (pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
    (pr1 (action_C v') z)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 Mon_V bicat_of_cats
C: bicatactionbicat Mon_V bicat_of_cats ax2
w, v, v': V
z: pr1 C
t: # (pr12 C) (monoidal_associatordata Mon_V v' v w)
  z
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
     z
   · pr1
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
       (pr1 ((pr12 C) v') z)) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor
  (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w) z
· # (pr1 ((pr12 C) w))
    (pr1
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z)
αisov'vw:= z_iso_inv
  (z_iso_from_associator_iso Mon_V v' v w): z_iso (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w))
  ((v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)
pf: pr1
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)))
  z
· pr1
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (pr1 action_fmon_strong v w))
    (pr1 ((pr12 C) v') z) =
pr1
  (# (pr12 C)
     (monoidal_associatorinvdata Mon_V v' v w)) z
· (pr1
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor
        (pr1 action_fmon_strong 
           (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w)) z
   · # (pr1 ((pr12 C) w))
       (pr1
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor
             (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z))
pr1
  (# action_C
     (monoidal_associatorinvdata Mon_V v' v w)) z
· (pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w))
    z
· # (pr1 (action_C w))
    ((pr11 (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z) =
pr1
  (# (pr12 C)
     (monoidal_associatorinvdata Mon_V v' v w)) z
· (pr1
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor
        (pr1 action_fmon_strong (v' ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) w))
     z
   · # (pr1 ((pr12 C) w))
       (pr1
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor
             (pr1 action_fmon_strong v' v)) z))

      apply assoc'.
  Qed.

  Definition actegory_from_object
    : actegory (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) (pr1 C)
    := actegory_data_from_object ,, actegory_laws_from_object.

End ActegoryFromObject.

Section FixAMonCat.
Context {V : category} (Mon_V : monoidal V).

Local Definition ACAT
  : bicat := actbicat Mon_V.

Context (ax2 : actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) bicat_of_cats).

Local Definition ACTI
  : bicat := bicatactionbicat (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) bicat_of_cats ax2.

Section EqualityLemmaHelpers.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
(∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x) → α = β

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
(∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x) → α = β

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
p: ∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x
α = β

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
p: ∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x
pr1 α = pr1 β
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
p: ∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x
transportf
  (λ x : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats (pr1 f) (pr1 g),
   disp_2cells x (pr2 f) (pr2 g)) 
  ?p (pr2 α) = pr2 β

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
p: ∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x
pr1 α = pr1 β

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
p: ∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x
has_homsets (pr1 b)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
p: ∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x
∏ x : pr1 a, pr1 α x = pr1 β x

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
p: ∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x
has_homsets (pr1 b)
 apply homset_property. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
p: ∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x
∏ x : pr1 a, pr1 α x = pr1 β x

      exact (λ x, p x).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
p: ∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x
transportf
  (λ x : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats (pr1 f) (pr1 g),
   disp_2cells x (pr2 f) (pr2 g))
  (nat_trans_eq (pr1 b) (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 α)
     (pr1 β) (λ x : pr1 a, p x)) (pr2 α) = pr2 β

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
p: ∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x
isaprop (disp_2cells (pr1 β) (pr2 f) (pr2 g))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
p: ∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x
t: V
t0: pr1 a
isaprop
  (pr2 f t t0 · pr1 β (t ⊗_{ pr2 a} t0) =
   t ⊗^{ pr2 b}_{l} pr1 β t0 · pr2 g t t0)

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

a, b: ACTI
f, g: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACTI f g
(∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x) → α = β

p: ∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x
transportf
  (λ x : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats (pr1 f) (pr1 g),
   disp_2cells x (pr2 f) (pr2 g)) 
  ?p (pr2 α) = pr2 β

a, b: ACTI

Mon_V: monoidal V

  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACTI
f, g: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧

∏ x : pr1 a, pr1 α x = pr1 β x

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V

  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACTI
f, g: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACTI f g
p: ∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x
has_homsets (pr1 b)
 apply homset_property. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACTI
f, g: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACTI f g
p: ∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x
∏ x : pr1 a, pr1 α x = pr1 β x

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACTI
f, g: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACTI f g
p: ∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x
x: pr1 a
pr1 α x = pr1 β x

      exact (p x).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACTI
f, g: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACTI f g
p: ∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x
transportf
  (λ x : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats (pr1 f) (pr1 g),
   disp_2cells x (pr2 f) (pr2 g))
  (nat_trans_eq (pr1 b) (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 α)
     (pr1 β) (λ x : pr1 a, p x)) (pr2 α) = pr2 β

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACTI
f, g: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACTI f g
p: ∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x
isaprop (disp_2cells (pr1 β) (pr2 f) (pr2 g))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACTI
f, g: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells ACTI f g
p: ∏ x : pr11 a, (pr11 α) x = (pr11 β) x
t: V
isaprop
  (bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_eq_body bicat_of_cats
     (pr1 β) (pr12 a) (pr12 b) (pr12 f) (pr12 g) t)

    apply cellset_property.
  Qed.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI) f g
(∏ (x : ACTI) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
 (pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0)
→ α = β

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI) f g
(∏ (x : ACTI) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
 (pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0)
→ α = β

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACTI) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
α = β

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACTI) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
pr1 α = pr1 β
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACTI) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
transportf
  (λ x : prebicat_cells
           (psfunctor_data_bicat ACTI ACTI) 
           (pr1 f) (pr1 g),
   disp_2cells x (pr2 f) (pr2 g)) 
  ?p (pr2 α) = pr2 β

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACTI) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
transportf
  (λ x : prebicat_cells
           (psfunctor_data_bicat ACTI ACTI) (pr1 f)
           (pr1 g), disp_2cells x (pr2 f) (pr2 g)) 
  ?p (pr2 α) = pr2 β
 apply proofirrelevance ; apply isapropunit. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACTI) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
pr1 α = pr1 β

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACTI) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
pr11 α = pr11 β
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACTI) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
transportf
  (λ x : prebicat_cells
           (Map1Cells.map1cells ACTI ACTI) 
           (pr11 f) (pr11 g),
   disp_2cells x (pr21 f) (pr21 g)) 
  ?p (pr21 α) = pr21 β

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACTI) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
transportf
  (λ x : prebicat_cells
           (Map1Cells.map1cells ACTI ACTI) (pr11 f)
           (pr11 g), disp_2cells x (pr21 f) (pr21 g))
  ?p (pr21 α) = pr21 β
 use total2_paths_f ;
         (apply proofirrelevance ; try (apply isapropdirprod) ; apply isapropunit). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACTI) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
pr11 α = pr11 β

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACTI) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
pr111 α = pr111 β
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACTI) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
transportf
  (λ x : prebicat_cells 
           (Base.ps_base ACTI ACTI) 
           (pr111 f) (pr111 g),
   disp_2cells x (pr211 f) (pr211 g)) 
  ?p (pr211 α) = pr211 β

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACTI) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
transportf
  (λ x : prebicat_cells (Base.ps_base ACTI ACTI)
           (pr111 f) (pr111 g),
   disp_2cells x (pr211 f) (pr211 g)) ?p (pr211 α) =
pr211 β
 apply proofirrelevance ;
          repeat (apply impred_isaprop ; intro) ;
         apply cellset_property. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACTI) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
pr111 α = pr111 β

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACTI) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
x: ACTI
(pr111 α) x = (pr111 β) x

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACTI) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
x: ACTI
∏ x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACTI) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
x: ACTI
x0: pr11 ((pr111 a) x)
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0

    apply p.
  Qed.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT) f g
(∏ (x : ACAT) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
 (pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0)
→ α = β

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT) f g
(∏ (x : ACAT) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
 (pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0)
→ α = β

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACAT) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
α = β

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACAT) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
pr1 α = pr1 β
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACAT) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
transportf
  (λ x : prebicat_cells
           (psfunctor_data_bicat ACAT ACAT) 
           (pr1 f) (pr1 g),
   disp_2cells x (pr2 f) (pr2 g)) 
  ?p (pr2 α) = pr2 β

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT
f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACAT) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
transportf
  (λ x : prebicat_cells
           (psfunctor_data_bicat ACAT ACAT) (pr1 f)
           (pr1 g), disp_2cells x (pr2 f) (pr2 g)) 
  ?p (pr2 α) = pr2 β
 apply proofirrelevance ; apply isapropunit.

transportf
  (λ x : prebicat_cells
           (Map1Cells.map1cells ACAT ACAT) 
           (pr11 f) (pr11 g),
   disp_2cells x (pr21 f) (pr21 g)) 
  ?p (pr21 α) = pr21 β

Mon_V: monoidal V

  bicat_of_cats

f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧

p: ∏ (x : ACAT) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
transportf
  (λ x : prebicat_cells
           (Map1Cells.map1cells ACAT ACAT) (pr11 f)
           (pr11 g), disp_2cells x (pr21 f) (pr21 g))
  ?p (pr21 α) = pr21 β
 use total2_paths_f ;
         (apply proofirrelevance ; try (apply isapropdirprod) ; apply isapropunit).

p: ∏ (x : ACAT) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),

           (Base.ps_base ACAT ACAT)

transportf
  (λ x : prebicat_cells (Base.ps_base ACAT ACAT)
           (pr111 f) (pr111 g),
   disp_2cells x (pr211 f) (pr211 g)) ?p (pr211 α) =
pr211 β
 apply proofirrelevance ;
          repeat (apply impred_isaprop ; intro) ;
         apply cellset_property.

p: ∏ (x : ACAT) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),

(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
x: ACAT
(pr111 α) x = (pr111 β) x

ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats

α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACAT) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0

∏ x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats

f, g: psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
α, β: prebicat_cells (psfunctor_bicat ACAT ACAT) f g
p: ∏ (x : ACAT) (x0 : pr11 ((pr111 a) x)),
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0
x: ACAT
x0: pr11 ((pr111 a) x)
(pr11 ((pr111 α) x)) x0 = (pr11 ((pr111 β) x)) x0

    apply p.
  Qed.

End EqualityLemmaHelpers.


Section FromActegoriesToActionsInCat.

  Import MonoidalNotations.

  Definition acat_to_acti_on_ob : ob ACAT -> ob ACTI
    := λ act, actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 act).

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
c: pr11 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a1))
actegory_unitorinvdata
  (pr2 a2 : actegory Mon_V (pr1 a2)) ((pr11 f) c)
· (pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c =
# (pr11 f)
  (actegory_unitorinvdata
     (pr2 a1 : actegory Mon_V (pr1 a1)) c)

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
c: pr11 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a1))
actegory_unitorinvdata
  (pr2 a2 : actegory Mon_V (pr1 a2)) ((pr11 f) c)
· (pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c =
# (pr11 f)
  (actegory_unitorinvdata
     (pr2 a1 : actegory Mon_V (pr1 a1)) c)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
c: pr11 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a1))
t:= (pr222 (pr22 f)) c: (pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c
· # (pr1 f) (actegory_unitordata (pr2 a1) c) =
actegory_unitordata (pr2 a2) (pr1 f c)
actegory_unitorinvdata
  (pr2 a2 : actegory Mon_V (pr1 a2)) ((pr11 f) c)
· (pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c =
# (pr11 f)
  (actegory_unitorinvdata
     (pr2 a1 : actegory Mon_V (pr1 a1)) c)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
c: pr11 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a1))
t:= (pr222 (pr22 f)) c: (pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c
· # (pr1 f) (actegory_unitordata (pr2 a1) c) =
actegory_unitordata (pr2 a2) (pr1 f c)
(pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c =
(actegory_unitordata (pr2 a2) ((pr11 f) c),,
 actegory_unitorinvdata (pr2 a2) ((pr11 f) c),,
 actegory_unitorisolaw Mon_V (pr2 a2) ((pr11 f) c))
· # (pr11 f) (actegory_unitorinvdata (pr2 a1) c)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
c: pr11 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a1))
t:= (pr222 (pr22 f)) c: (pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c
· # (pr1 f) (actegory_unitordata (pr2 a1) c) =
actegory_unitordata (pr2 a2) (pr1 f c)
(pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c =
actegory_unitordata (pr2 a2) ((pr11 f) c)
· # (pr11 f) (actegory_unitorinvdata (pr2 a1) c)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
c: pr11 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a1))
t:= (pr222 (pr22 f)) c: (pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c
· # (pr1 f) (actegory_unitordata (pr2 a1) c) =
actegory_unitordata (pr2 a2) (pr1 f c)
(pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
c: pr11 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a1))
t:= (pr222 (pr22 f)) c: (pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c
· # (pr1 f) (actegory_unitordata (pr2 a1) c) =
actegory_unitordata (pr2 a2) (pr1 f c)
?b =
actegory_unitordata (pr2 a2) ((pr11 f) c)
· # (pr11 f) (actegory_unitorinvdata (pr2 a1) c)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
c: pr11 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a1))
t:= (pr222 (pr22 f)) c: (pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c
· # (pr1 f) (actegory_unitordata (pr2 a1) c) =
actegory_unitordata (pr2 a2) (pr1 f c)
?b =
actegory_unitordata (pr2 a2) ((pr11 f) c)
· # (pr11 f) (actegory_unitorinvdata (pr2 a1) c)
 apply maponpaths_2 ; apply t. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
c: pr11 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a1))
t:= (pr222 (pr22 f)) c: (pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c
· # (pr1 f) (actegory_unitordata (pr2 a1) c) =
actegory_unitordata (pr2 a2) (pr1 f c)
(pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c =
(pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c
· # (pr1 f) (actegory_unitordata (pr2 a1) c)
· # (pr11 f) (actegory_unitorinvdata (pr2 a1) c)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
c: pr11 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a1))
t:= (pr222 (pr22 f)) c: (pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c
· # (pr1 f) (actegory_unitordata (pr2 a1) c) =
actegory_unitordata (pr2 a2) (pr1 f c)
(pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c =
(pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c
· (# (pr1 f) (actegory_unitordata (pr2 a1) c)
   · # (pr11 f) (actegory_unitorinvdata (pr2 a1) c))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
c: pr11 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a1))
t:= (pr222 (pr22 f)) c: (pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c
· # (pr1 f) (actegory_unitordata (pr2 a1) c) =
actegory_unitordata (pr2 a2) (pr1 f c)
(pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c =
(pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c
· # (pr1 f)
    (actegory_unitordata (pr2 a1) c
     · actegory_unitorinvdata (pr2 a1) c)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
c: pr11 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a1))
t:= (pr222 (pr22 f)) c: (pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c
· # (pr1 f) (actegory_unitordata (pr2 a1) c) =
actegory_unitordata (pr2 a2) (pr1 f c)
(pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c =
(pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c
· # (pr1 f) (identity (I_{ Mon_V} ⊗_{ pr2 a1} c))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
c: pr11 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a1))
t:= (pr222 (pr22 f)) c: (pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c
· # (pr1 f) (actegory_unitordata (pr2 a1) c) =
actegory_unitordata (pr2 a2) (pr1 f c)
(pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c =
(pr12 f) I_{ Mon_V} c
· identity (pr1 f (I_{ Mon_V} ⊗_{ pr2 a1} c))

    apply (! id_right _).
  Qed.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
nat_trans_data
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
     (pr1 f))
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H'
     (pr1 f))

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
nat_trans_data
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
     (pr1 f))
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H'
     (pr1 f))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
v: V
hom (pr1 a1)
  (pr1 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a2)))
⟦ ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H (pr1 f)
    v,
ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H' (pr1 f)
  v ⟧

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
v: V
is_nat_trans
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
     (pr1 f) v)
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H'
     (pr1 f) v) (λ c : pr1 a1, (pr12 f) v c)

    abstract (exact (λ c1 c2 g, pr1 (pr22 f) v c1 c2 g)).
  Defined.

  bicat_of_cats

v, w: V
g: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
c: pr1 a1
g ⊗^{ pr2 a2}_{r} pr1 (pr1 f) c · (pr12 f) w c =
(pr12 f) v c · # (pr11 f) (g ⊗^{ pr2 a1}_{r} c)

    exact (pr12 (pr22 f) v w c g).
  Qed.

  Definition acat_to_acti_on_mor_data
    {a1 a2 : ACAT} (f : ACAT⟦a1,a2⟧) :
    ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat(V:=V)
      (FA:=pr12(actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a1)))(FA':=pr12(actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a2))) (pr1 f)
    := _,,acat_to_acti_on_mor_data_data_is_nat_trans f.

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
∏ x : pr1 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a1)),
vcomp2
  (lwhisker (pr1 f)
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit
        (pr22 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a2)))))
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1 f) (acat_to_acti_on_mor_data f)
     I_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V}) x =
vcomp2
  (vcomp2
     (runitor (pr1 f)
      :
      prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
        (pr1 f
         · I_{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
                 (pr1
                    (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
                       (pr2 a2)))}) 
        (pr1 f))
     (linvunitor (pr1 f)
      :
      prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats 
        (pr1 f)
        (I_{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
               (pr1
                  (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
                     (pr2 a1)))} · 
         pr1 f)))
  (rwhisker (pr1 f)
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit
        (pr22 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2 (pr2 a1)))))
  x

ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body_RHS

      intro c ;
        cbn ;
        rewrite ! id_left ;
        assert (t := pr122 (pr22 f) w v c) ;
        apply (z_iso_inv_on_right _ _ _ (_,,_,,actegory_actorisolaw Mon_V (pr2 a2) _ _ _)) ;
        rewrite assoc ;
        set (i := (_,,_,,actegory_actorisolaw Mon_V (pr2 a1) w v c) : z_iso _ _) ;
        apply (z_iso_inv_on_left _ _ _ _ (functor_on_z_iso (pr1 f) i)) ;
        cbn ;
        rewrite assoc ;
        rewrite t ;
        apply idpath.
  Qed.

→ prebicat_cells ACTI
    ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f0 : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
      acat_to_acti_on_mor f0) a b f)

      acat_to_acti_on_mor f0) a b g)

  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
α: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
prebicat_cells ACTI
  ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
    acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a1 a2 f)
  ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
    acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a1 a2 g)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
α: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
disp_2cells (pr1 α) (pr2 (acat_to_acti_on_mor f))
  (pr2 (acat_to_acti_on_mor g))

      abstract (intro v; use nat_trans_eq;
      [apply homset_property |
      exact (λ c, pr2 α v c)]).

  ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
    acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a a (identity a))

              (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),

 disp_2cells η (pr2 (identity (acat_to_acti_on_ob a)))
   (pr2

  (pr1

 apply nat_trans_id.
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACAT
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_on_ob a)))
         (pr1
            ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
              acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a a (identity a))),
 disp_2cells η (pr2 (identity (acat_to_acti_on_ob a)))
   (pr2
      ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
        acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a a (identity a))))
  (nat_trans_id
     (pr1 (acat_to_acti_on_mor (identity a))))
 abstract
          (intro v;
           use nat_trans_eq;
           [apply homset_property | ] ;
           intro c;
           cbn ;
           unfold identity_lineator_data ;
           rewrite ! id_left ;
           rewrite id_right ;
           apply (! bifunctor_leftid (_ ,, pr122 a) _ _)).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
∏ (a b c : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧),
prebicat_cells ACTI
  ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f0 : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
    acat_to_acti_on_mor f0) a b f
   · (λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f0 : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
      acat_to_acti_on_mor f0) b c g)
  ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f0 : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
    acat_to_acti_on_mor f0) a c (f · g))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2, a3: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
prebicat_cells ACTI
  ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
    acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a1 a2 f
   · (λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
      acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a2 a3 g)
  ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
    acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a1 a3 (f · g))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)

a1, a2, a3: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (pr1
     ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
       acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a1 a2 f
      · (λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
         acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a2 a3 g))
  (pr1
     ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
       acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a1 a3 (f · g)))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2, a3: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1
            ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) 
              (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
              acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a1 a2 f
             · (λ (a1 a2 : ACAT)
                (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
                acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a2 a3 g))
         (pr1
            ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) 
              (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
              acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a1 a3 
               (f · g))),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2
      ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) 
        (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧), 
        acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a1 a2 f
       · (λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) 
          (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧), 
          acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a2 a3 g))
   (pr2
      ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) 
        (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧), 
        acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a1 a3 
         (f · g)))) ?pr1

Mon_V: monoidal V

a1, a2, a3: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (pr1
     ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
       acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a1 a2 f
      · (λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
         acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a2 a3 g))
  (pr1
     ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2, a3: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
functor_composite_data (pr1 f) (pr1 g)
⟹ functor_composite_data (pr1 f) (pr1 g)
 apply nat_trans_id. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2, a3: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1
            ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
              acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a1 a2 f
             · (λ (a1 a2 : ACAT)
                (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
                acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a2 a3 g))
         (pr1
            ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
              acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a1 a3 (f · g))),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2
      ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
        acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a1 a2 f
       · (λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
          acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a2 a3 g))
   (pr2
      ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
        acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a1 a3 (f · g))))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (pr1 f) (pr1 g))
   :
   prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
     (pr1
        ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
          acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a1 a2 f
         · (λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
            acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a2 a3 g))
     (pr1
        ((λ (a1 a2 : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
          acat_to_acti_on_mor f) a1 a3 (f · g))))

      abstract (intro v;
                use nat_trans_eq;
                [apply homset_property |
                  intro c;
                  cbn;
                  rewrite (bifunctor_leftid (_ ,, pr122 a3));
                  rewrite ! id_left;
                  rewrite ! id_right;
                  apply idpath]).
  Defined.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
psfunctor_laws acat_to_acti_data

ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
