psfunctor_laws acat_to_acti_data

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: pr11 (acat_to_acti_data a)
identity (pr1 f x) =
# (pr11 f) (identity x) · identity (pr1 f x)
· identity (pr1 f x)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: pr11 (acat_to_acti_data a)
identity (pr1 f x) =
identity (pr1 (pr1 f) x) · identity (pr1 f x)
· identity (pr1 f x)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c, d: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: ACAT ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: pr11 (acat_to_acti_data a)
identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 (pr1 f) x)))
· identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
· identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 f x))) =
identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
· # (pr11 h) (identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
· identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: prebicat_cells ACAT g₁ g₂
x: pr11 (acat_to_acti_data a)
identity (pr1 g₁ (pr1 f x)) · (pr11 η) (pr1 (pr1 f) x) =
(pr11 η) (pr1 (pr1 f) x) · identity (pr1 g₂ (pr1 f x))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f₁, f₂: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: prebicat_cells ACAT f₁ f₂
x: pr11 (acat_to_acti_data a)
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f₁ x)) · # (pr11 g) ((pr11 η) x) =
# (pr11 g) ((pr11 η) x) · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f₂ x))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: pr11 (acat_to_acti_data a)
identity (pr1 f x) =
# (pr11 f) (identity x) · identity (pr1 f x)
· identity (pr1 f x)
 rewrite ! id_right ; apply (! functor_id _ _).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: pr11 (acat_to_acti_data a)
identity (pr1 f x) =
identity (pr1 (pr1 f) x) · identity (pr1 f x)
· identity (pr1 f x)
 rewrite ! id_right ; apply idpath.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c, d: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: ACAT ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: pr11 (acat_to_acti_data a)
identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 (pr1 f) x)))
· identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
· identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 f x))) =
identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
· # (pr11 h) (identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
· identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
 rewrite ! id_right ; rewrite (! functor_id _ _) ; rewrite id_left ; apply idpath.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: prebicat_cells ACAT g₁ g₂
x: pr11 (acat_to_acti_data a)
identity (pr1 g₁ (pr1 f x)) · (pr11 η) (pr1 (pr1 f) x) =
(pr11 η) (pr1 (pr1 f) x) · identity (pr1 g₂ (pr1 f x))
 rewrite id_left ; apply (! id_right _).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f₁, f₂: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: prebicat_cells ACAT f₁ f₂
x: pr11 (acat_to_acti_data a)
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f₁ x)) · # (pr11 g) ((pr11 η) x) =
# (pr11 g) ((pr11 η) x) · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f₂ x))
 rewrite id_left ; apply (! id_right _).
  Qed.

(λ _ : ∏ a : ACAT,
       is_invertible_2cell
         (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
            acat_to_acti_data a),
 ∏ (a b c : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g : ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
      acat_to_acti_data f g)) 
  ?pr1

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACAT
(λ φ : prebicat_cells ACTI
         (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a))
         (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)),
 vcomp2
   (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id acat_to_acti_data
      a) φ = id2 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))
 × vcomp2 φ
     (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
        acat_to_acti_data a) =
   id2 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a))) 
  ?pr1

 disp_2cells η

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V

bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_eq_body bicat_of_cats

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACAT
v: V
∏ x : pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a),
vcomp2
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
     (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a))) v)
  (lwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
     (nat_trans_id
        (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))))) x =
vcomp2
  (rwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
     (nat_trans_id
        (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))))
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))
     (pr12 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))) v) x

Mon_V: monoidal V

a: ACAT
v: V
∏ x : pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a),
vcomp2
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
     (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a))) v)
  (lwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
     (nat_trans_id
        (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))))) x =
vcomp2
  (rwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
     (nat_trans_id
        (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))))
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))
     (pr12 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))) v) x

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACAT
v: V
x: pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a)
vcomp2
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
     (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a))) v)
  (lwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
     (nat_trans_id
        (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))))) x =
vcomp2
  (rwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
     (nat_trans_id
        (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))))
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))
     (pr12 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))) v) x

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACAT
v: V
x: pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a)
identity_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 a) v x
· identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x) =
v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x
· (identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x)
   · identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACAT
v: V
x: pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a)
identity_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 a) v x =
v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x

          apply (! bifunctor_leftid (_ ,, pr122 a) _ _).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACAT
(λ φ : prebicat_cells ACTI
         (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a))
         (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)),
 vcomp2
   (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id acat_to_acti_data
      a) φ = id2 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))
 × vcomp2 φ
     (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
        acat_to_acti_data a) =
   id2 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
  (nat_trans_id (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))),,
   ((λ v : V,
     nat_trans_eq (pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a))
       (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
          (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a))) v)
       ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v
        · pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))
       (vcomp2
          (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
             (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
             (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
             v)
          (lwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
             (nat_trans_id
                (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))))))
       (vcomp2
          (rwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
             (nat_trans_id
                (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))))
          (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
             (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))
             (pr12 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))) v))
       (λ x : pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a),
        internal_paths_rew_r
          (pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x, v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧)
          (identity_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 a) v x
           · identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))
          (identity_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 a) v x)
          (λ p : pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x,
                 v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧,
           p =
           v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x
           · (identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x)
              · identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x)))
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x, v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧)
             (identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x)
              · identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))
             (identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))
             (λ p : pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x,
                    v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧,
              identity_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 a) v x =
              v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x · p)
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x,
                 v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧)
                (v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x
                 · identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))
                (v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x)
                (λ p : pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x,
                       v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧,
                 identity_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 a)
                   v x = p)
                (! bifunctor_leftid (pr12 a,, pr122 a)
                     v x)
                (id_right
                   (v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x)))
             (id_right (identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))))
          (id_right
             (identity_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 a) v x))
        :
        vcomp2
          (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
             (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
             (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
             v)
          (lwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
             (nat_trans_id
                (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))))
          x =
        vcomp2
          (rwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
             (nat_trans_id
                (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))))
          (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
             (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))
             (pr12 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))) v)
          x))
    :
    (λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
             (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
             (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))),
     disp_2cells η
       (pr2 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
       (pr2 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))))
      (nat_trans_id
         (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))))))
 use tpair ; use equality_of_2cells_in_ACTI ; intro ; apply id_right.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
(λ _ : ∏ a : ACAT,
       is_invertible_2cell
         (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
            acat_to_acti_data a),
 ∏ (a b c : ACAT) (f : ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g : ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
      acat_to_acti_data f g))
  (λ a : ACAT,
   (nat_trans_id
      (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))),,
    ((λ v : V,
      nat_trans_eq (pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a))
        (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
           (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a))) v)
        ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v
         · pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))
        (vcomp2
           (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
              (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
              (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
              v)
           (lwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
              (nat_trans_id
                 (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))))))
        (vcomp2
           (rwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
              (nat_trans_id
                 (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))))
           (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
              (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))
              (pr12 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))
              v))
        (λ x : pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a),
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x, v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧)
           (identity_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 a) v x
            · identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))
           (identity_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 a) v x)
           (λ p : pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x,
                  v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧,
            p =
            v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x
            · (identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x)
               · identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x)))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x, v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x
               ⟧)
              (identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x)
               · identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))
              (identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))
              (λ p : pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x,
                     v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧,
               identity_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 a) v
                 x = v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x · p)
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x,
                  v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧)
                 (v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x
                  · identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))
                 (v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x)
                 (λ p : pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x,
                        v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧,
                  identity_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 a)
                    v x = p)
                 (! bifunctor_leftid
                      (pr12 a,, pr122 a) v x)
                 (id_right
                    (v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x)))
              (id_right (identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))))
           (id_right
              (identity_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 a) v
                 x))
         :
         vcomp2
           (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
              (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
              (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
              v)
           (lwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
              (nat_trans_id
                 (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))))
           x =
         vcomp2
           (rwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
              (nat_trans_id
                 (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))))
           (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
              (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))
              (pr12 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))
              v) x))
     :
     (λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
              (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
              (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))),
      disp_2cells η
        (pr2 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
        (pr2 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))))
       (nat_trans_id
          (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))))),,
   equality_of_2cells_in_ACTI
     (vcomp2
        (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
           acat_to_acti_data a)
        (nat_trans_id
           (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))),,
         ((λ v : V,
           nat_trans_eq (pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a))
             (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
                (pr1
                   (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
                v)
             ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v
              · pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))
             (vcomp2
                (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                   (pr1
                      (# acat_to_acti_data
                         (identity a)))
                   (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data
                            (identity a))) v)
                (lwhisker
                   ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
                   (nat_trans_id
                      (pr1
                         (identity
                            (acat_to_acti_data a))))))
             (vcomp2
                (rwhisker
                   ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
                   (nat_trans_id
                      (pr1
                         (identity
                            (acat_to_acti_data a)))))
                (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                   (pr1
                      (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))
                   (pr12 (identity
                            (acat_to_acti_data a))) v))
             (λ x : pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a),
              internal_paths_rew_r
                (pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x,
                 v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧)
                (identity_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 a)
                   v x · identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))
                (identity_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 a)
                   v x)
                (λ p : pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x,
                       v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧,
                 p =
                 v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x
                 · (identity (...) · identity (...)))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x,
                    v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧)
                   (identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x)
                    · identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))
                   (identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))
                   (λ p : pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x,
                          v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧,
                    identity_lineator_data Mon_V
                      (pr2 a) v x =
                    v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x · p)
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x,
                       v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧)
                      (v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x
                       · identity (...))
                      (v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x)
                      (λ p : ... ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                       identity_lineator_data Mon_V
                         ... v x = p)
                      (! bifunctor_leftid
                           (pr12 a,, pr122 a) v x)
                      (id_right (v ⊗^{ ...}_{l} ...)))
                   (id_right (identity (v ⊗_{ ...} x))))
                (id_right
                   (identity_lineator_data Mon_V
                      (pr2 a) v x))
              :
              vcomp2
                (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                   (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (...)))
                   (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data
                            (identity a))) v)
                (lwhisker
                   ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
                   (nat_trans_id (pr1 (...)))) x =
              vcomp2
                (rwhisker
                   ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
                   (nat_trans_id (pr1 (...))))
                (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                   (pr1 (identity (...)))
                   (pr12 (identity
                            (acat_to_acti_data a))) v)
                x))
          :
          (λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
                   (pr1
                      (# acat_to_acti_data
                         (identity a)))
                   (pr1
                      (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))),
           disp_2cells η
             (pr2 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
             (pr2 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))))
            (nat_trans_id
               (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))))))
     (id2 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))
     (λ x : pr11 (acat_to_acti_data a),
      id_right
        ((pr11 (id2 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))))
           x)),,
   equality_of_2cells_in_ACTI
     (vcomp2
        (nat_trans_id
           (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))),,
         ((λ v : V,
           nat_trans_eq (pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a))
             (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
                (pr1
                   (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
                v)
             ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v
              · pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))
             (vcomp2
                (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                   (pr1
                      (# acat_to_acti_data
                         (identity a)))
                   (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data
                            (identity a))) v)
                (lwhisker
                   ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
                   (nat_trans_id
                      (pr1
                         (identity
                            (acat_to_acti_data a))))))
             (vcomp2
                (rwhisker
                   ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
                   (nat_trans_id
                      (pr1
                         (identity
                            (acat_to_acti_data a)))))
                (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                   (pr1
                      (identity (acat_to_acti_data a)))
                   (pr12 (identity
                            (acat_to_acti_data a))) v))
             (λ x : pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a),
              internal_paths_rew_r
                (pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x,
                 v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧)
                (identity_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 a)
                   v x · identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))
                (identity_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 a)
                   v x)
                (λ p : pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x,
                       v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧,
                 p =
                 v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x
                 · (identity (...) · identity (...)))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x,
                    v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧)
                   (identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x)
                    · identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))
                   (identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))
                   (λ p : pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x,
                          v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧,
                    identity_lineator_data Mon_V
                      (pr2 a) v x =
                    v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x · p)
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (pr1 a ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x,
                       v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x ⟧)
                      (v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x
                       · identity (...))
                      (v ⊗^{ pr2 a}_{l} identity x)
                      (λ p : ... ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                       identity_lineator_data Mon_V
                         ... v x = p)
                      (! bifunctor_leftid
                           (pr12 a,, pr122 a) v x)
                      (id_right (v ⊗^{ ...}_{l} ...)))
                   (id_right (identity (v ⊗_{ ...} x))))
                (id_right
                   (identity_lineator_data Mon_V
                      (pr2 a) v x))
              :
              vcomp2
                (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                   (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (...)))
                   (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data
                            (identity a))) v)
                (lwhisker
                   ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
                   (nat_trans_id (pr1 (...)))) x =
              vcomp2
                (rwhisker
                   ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
                   (nat_trans_id (pr1 (...))))
                (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                   (pr1 (identity (...)))
                   (pr12 (identity
                            (acat_to_acti_data a))) v)
                x))
          :
          (λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
                   (pr1
                      (# acat_to_acti_data
                         (identity a)))
                   (pr1
                      (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))),
           disp_2cells η
             (pr2 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
             (pr2 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))))
            (nat_trans_id
               (pr1 (identity (acat_to_acti_data a))))))
        (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
           acat_to_acti_data a))
     (id2 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a)))
     (λ x : pr11 (acat_to_acti_data a),
      id_right
        ((pr11 (id2 (# acat_to_acti_data (identity a))))
           x)))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp acat_to_acti_data
     f g)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
prebicat_cells ACTI (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g))
  (# acat_to_acti_data f · # acat_to_acti_data g)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
(λ φ : prebicat_cells ACTI
         (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g))
         (# acat_to_acti_data f
          · # acat_to_acti_data g),
 vcomp2
   (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
      acat_to_acti_data f g) φ =
 id2 (# acat_to_acti_data f · # acat_to_acti_data g)
 × vcomp2 φ
     (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
        acat_to_acti_data f g) =
   id2 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g))) 
  ?pr1

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
prebicat_cells ACTI (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g))
  (# acat_to_acti_data f · # acat_to_acti_data g)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g)))
  (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data f · # acat_to_acti_data g))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g)))
         (pr1
            (# acat_to_acti_data f
             · # acat_to_acti_data g)),
 disp_2cells η (pr2 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g)))
   (pr2
      (# acat_to_acti_data f · # acat_to_acti_data g)))
  ?pr1

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g)))
  (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data f · # acat_to_acti_data g))
 apply nat_trans_id.
        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g)))
         (pr1
            (# acat_to_acti_data f
             · # acat_to_acti_data g)),
 disp_2cells η (pr2 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g)))
   (pr2
      (# acat_to_acti_data f · # acat_to_acti_data g)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (pr1
        (# acat_to_acti_data f · # acat_to_acti_data g)))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_eq_body bicat_of_cats
  (nat_trans_id
     (pr1
        (# acat_to_acti_data f · # acat_to_acti_data g)))
  (pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a))
  (pr12 (acat_to_acti_data c))
  (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g)))
  (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data f · # acat_to_acti_data g))
  v

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
has_homsets (pr1 (acat_to_acti_data c))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
∏ x : pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a),
vcomp2
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g)))
     (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g))) v)
  (lwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
     (nat_trans_id
        (pr1
           (# acat_to_acti_data f
            · # acat_to_acti_data g)))) x =
vcomp2
  (rwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data c)) v)
     (nat_trans_id
        (pr1
           (# acat_to_acti_data f
            · # acat_to_acti_data g))))
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1
        (# acat_to_acti_data f · # acat_to_acti_data g))
     (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data f
            · # acat_to_acti_data g)) v) x

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
has_homsets (pr1 (acat_to_acti_data c))
 apply homset_property. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
∏ x : pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a),
vcomp2
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g)))
     (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g))) v)
  (lwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
     (nat_trans_id
        (pr1
           (# acat_to_acti_data f
            · # acat_to_acti_data g)))) x =
vcomp2
  (rwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data c)) v)
     (nat_trans_id
        (pr1
           (# acat_to_acti_data f
            · # acat_to_acti_data g))))
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1
        (# acat_to_acti_data f · # acat_to_acti_data g))
     (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data f
            · # acat_to_acti_data g)) v) x

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a)
vcomp2
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g)))
     (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g))) v)
  (lwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
     (nat_trans_id
        (pr1
           (# acat_to_acti_data f
            · # acat_to_acti_data g)))) x =
vcomp2
  (rwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data c)) v)
     (nat_trans_id
        (pr1
           (# acat_to_acti_data f
            · # acat_to_acti_data g))))
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1
        (# acat_to_acti_data f · # acat_to_acti_data g))
     (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data f
            · # acat_to_acti_data g)) v) x

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a)
comp_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 f) (pr2 g) v x
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))) =
v ⊗^{ pr2 c}_{l} identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· (identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 c} pr1 g (pr1 f x))
   · ((pr12 g) v (pr1 (pr1 f) x)
      · (identity (pr1 g (v ⊗_{ pr2 b} pr1 f x))
         · # (pr11 g) ((pr12 f) v x)
         · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))))))

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a)
comp_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 f) (pr2 g) v x =
v ⊗^{ pr2 c}_{l} identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· (identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 c} pr1 g (pr1 f x))
   · ((pr12 g) v (pr1 (pr1 f) x)
      · (identity (pr1 g (v ⊗_{ pr2 b} pr1 f x))
         · # (pr11 g) ((pr12 f) v x))))

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a)
comp_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 f) (pr2 g) v x =
v ⊗^{ pr2 c}_{l} identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· ((pr12 g) v (pr1 (pr1 f) x)
   · # (pr11 g) ((pr12 f) v x))

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a)
comp_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 f) (pr2 g) v x =
identity (v ⊗_{ pr12 c,, pr122 c} pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· ((pr12 g) v (pr1 (pr1 f) x)
   · # (pr11 g) ((pr12 f) v x))

          apply (! id_left _).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ b, c ⟧
(λ φ : prebicat_cells ACTI
         (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g))
         (# acat_to_acti_data f
          · # acat_to_acti_data g),
 vcomp2
   (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
      acat_to_acti_data f g) φ =
 id2 (# acat_to_acti_data f · # acat_to_acti_data g)
 × vcomp2 φ
     (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
        acat_to_acti_data f g) =
   id2 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (pr1
        (# acat_to_acti_data f · # acat_to_acti_data g)),,
   ((λ v : V,
     nat_trans_eq (pr1 (acat_to_acti_data c))
       (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
          (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g))) v)
       ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v
        · pr1
            (# acat_to_acti_data f
             · # acat_to_acti_data g))
       (vcomp2
          (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
             (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g)))
             (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g))) v)
          (lwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
             (nat_trans_id
                (pr1
                   (# acat_to_acti_data f
                    · # acat_to_acti_data g)))))
       (vcomp2
          (rwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data c)) v)
             (nat_trans_id
                (pr1
                   (# acat_to_acti_data f
                    · # acat_to_acti_data g))))
          (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
             (pr1
                (# acat_to_acti_data f
                 · # acat_to_acti_data g))
             (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data f
                    · # acat_to_acti_data g)) v))
       (λ x : pr1 (acat_to_acti_data a),
        internal_paths_rew_r
          (pr1 c ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 c} pr1 g (pr1 f x),
           pr1 g (pr1 f (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x)) ⟧)
          (comp_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 f) (pr2 g) v
             x
           · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))))
          (comp_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 f) (pr2 g) v
             x)
          (λ p : pr1 c ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 c} pr1 g (pr1 f x),
                 pr1 g (pr1 f (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x)) ⟧,
           p =
           v ⊗^{ pr2 c}_{l} identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
           · (identity (v ⊗_{ pr2 c} pr1 g (pr1 f x))
              · ((pr12 g) v (pr1 (pr1 f) x)
                 · (identity (pr1 g (...))
                    · # (pr11 g) ((pr12 f) v x)
                    · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f ...))))))
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (pr1 c ⟦ pr1 g (v ⊗_{ pr2 b} pr1 f x),
              pr1 g (pr1 f (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x)) ⟧)
             (identity (pr1 g (v ⊗_{ pr2 b} pr1 f x))
              · # (pr11 g) ((pr12 f) v x)
              · identity
                  (pr1 g (pr1 f (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))))
             (identity (pr1 g (v ⊗_{ pr2 b} pr1 f x))
              · # (pr11 g) ((pr12 f) v x))
             (λ p : pr1 c
                    ⟦ pr1 g (v ⊗_{ pr2 b} pr1 f x),
                    pr1 g (pr1 f (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x)) ⟧,
              comp_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 f) (pr2 g)
                v x =
              v
              ⊗^{ pr2 c}_{l} identity
                               (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
              · (identity
                   (v ⊗_{ pr2 c} pr1 g (pr1 f x))
                 · ((pr12 g) v (pr1 (pr1 f) x) · p)))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (pr1 c ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 c} pr1 g (pr1 f x),
                 pr1 g (pr1 f (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x)) ⟧)
                (identity
                   (v ⊗_{ pr2 c} pr1 g (pr1 f x))
                 · ((pr12 g) v (pr1 (pr1 f) x)
                    · (identity
                         (pr1 g (v ⊗_{ ...} ...))
                       · # (pr11 g) ((pr12 f) v x))))
                ((pr12 g) v (pr1 (pr1 f) x)
                 · (identity
                      (pr1 g (v ⊗_{ pr2 b} pr1 f x))
                    · # (pr11 g) ((pr12 f) v x)))
                (λ p : pr1 c
                       ⟦ v ⊗_{ pr2 c} pr1 g (pr1 f x),
                       pr1 g (pr1 f (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x))
                       ⟧,
                 comp_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 f)
                   (pr2 g) v x =
                 v
                 ⊗^{ pr2 c}_{l} identity
                                  (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
                 · p)
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (pr1 c
                    ⟦ pr1 g (v ⊗_{ pr2 b} pr1 f x),
                    pr1 g (pr1 f (v ⊗_{ pr2 a} x)) ⟧)
                   (identity
                      (pr1 g (v ⊗_{ pr2 b} pr1 f x))
                    · # (pr11 g) ((pr12 f) v x))
                   (# (pr11 g) ((pr12 f) v x))
                   (λ p : pr1 c
                          ⟦ pr1 g
                              (v ⊗_{ pr2 b} pr1 f x),
                          pr1 g (pr1 f (v ⊗_{ ...} x))
                          ⟧,
                    comp_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 f)
                      (pr2 g) v x =
                    v
                    ⊗^{ pr2 c}_{l} identity
                                     (pr1 g (...))
                    · ((pr12 g) v (pr1 ... x) · p))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (pr1 c
                       ⟦ v
                         ⊗_{ pr12 c,, pr122 c} pr1 g
                                                 (pr1
                                                 f x),
                       v
                       ⊗_{ pr12 c,, pr122 c} pr1 g
                                               (pr1 f
                                                 x) ⟧)
                      (v
                       ⊗^{ pr12 c,, pr122 c}_{l} identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 g
                                                 (pr1
                                                 f x)))
                      (identity
                         (v
                          ⊗_{ pr12 c,, pr122 c} pr1 g
                                                 (pr1
                                                 f x)))
                      (λ p : pr1 c
                             ⟦ v
                               ⊗_{ pr12 c,, pr122 c} 
                               pr1 g (...),
                             v
                             ⊗_{ pr12 c,, pr122 c} 
                             pr1 g (...) ⟧,
                       comp_lineator_data Mon_V
                         (pr2 f) (pr2 g) v x =
                       p · (... v ... · # ... ...))
                      (! id_left
                           (comp_lineator_data Mon_V
                              (pr2 f) (pr2 g) v x))
                      (bifunctor_leftid
                         (pr12 c,, pr122 c) v
                         (pr1 g (pr1 f x))))
                   (id_left
                      (# (pr11 g) ((pr12 f) v x))))
                (id_left
                   ((pr12 g) v (pr1 (pr1 f) x)
                    · (identity
                         (pr1 g (v ⊗_{ ...} ...))
                       · # (pr11 g) ((pr12 f) v x)))))
             (id_right
                (identity
                   (pr1 g (v ⊗_{ pr2 b} pr1 f x))
                 · # (pr11 g) ((pr12 f) v x))))
          (id_right
             (comp_lineator_data Mon_V (pr2 f) (pr2 g)
                v x))
        :
        vcomp2
          (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
             (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g)))
             (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g))) v)
          (lwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data a)) v)
             (nat_trans_id
                (pr1
                   (# acat_to_acti_data f
                    · # acat_to_acti_data g)))) x =
        vcomp2
          (rwhisker ((pr12 (acat_to_acti_data c)) v)
             (nat_trans_id
                (pr1
                   (# acat_to_acti_data f
                    · # acat_to_acti_data g))))
          (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
             (pr1
                (# acat_to_acti_data f
                 · # acat_to_acti_data g))
             (pr12 (# acat_to_acti_data f
                    · # acat_to_acti_data g)) v) x))
    :
    (λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
             (pr1 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g)))
             (pr1
                (# acat_to_acti_data f
                 · # acat_to_acti_data g)),
     disp_2cells η (pr2 (# acat_to_acti_data (f · g)))
       (pr2
          (# acat_to_acti_data f
           · # acat_to_acti_data g)))
      (nat_trans_id
         (pr1
            (# acat_to_acti_data f
             · # acat_to_acti_data g)))))
 use tpair ; use equality_of_2cells_in_ACTI ; intro ; apply id_right.
  Qed.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
psfunctor ACAT ACTI

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
psfunctor ACAT ACTI

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
psfunctor_data ACAT ACTI
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
psfunctor_laws ?F
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
invertible_cells ?F

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
psfunctor_data ACAT ACTI
 exact acat_to_acti_data.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
psfunctor_laws acat_to_acti_data
 exact acat_to_acti_laws.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
invertible_cells acat_to_acti_data
 exact acat_to_acti_invertible_cells.
  Defined.

End FromActegoriesToActionsInCat.

Section FromActionInCatToActegories.

  Definition acti_to_acat_on_ob : (ob ACTI) -> (ob ACAT)
    := λ act, _ ,, actegory_from_object _ ax2 act.

  Definition acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data
             {a1 a2 : ACTI} (f : ACTI⟦a1,a2⟧)
    :  lineator_data Mon_V (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a1)
                     (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a2) (pr1 f)
    := λ v c, pr1 (pr112 f v) c.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
lineator_laxlaws Mon_V
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a1)
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a2) (pr1 f) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f)

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
lineator_laxlaws Mon_V
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a1)
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a2) (pr1 f) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
lineator_nat_left Mon_V
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a1)
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a2) (pr1 f) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
lineator_nat_right Mon_V
  (actegory_from_object 
     (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a1)
  (actegory_from_object 
     (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a2) 
  (pr1 f) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
preserves_actor Mon_V
  (actegory_from_object 
     (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a1)
  (actegory_from_object 
     (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a2) 
  (pr1 f) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f)

lineator_nat_left Mon_V
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
v: V
c1, c2: pr1 a1
g: pr1 a1 ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧
v
⊗^{ actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
      a2}_{l} # (pr1 f) g
· acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f v c2 =
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f v c1
· # (pr1 f)
    (v
     ⊗^{ actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
           ax2 a1}_{l} g)

      exact (pr2 (pr112 f v) c1 c2 g).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI

lineator_nat_right Mon_V
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a1)
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a2) (pr1 f) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
v, w: V
c: pr1 a1
g: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
g
⊗^{ actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
      a2}_{r} pr1 f c
· acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f w c =
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f v c
· # (pr1 f)
    (g
     ⊗^{ actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
           ax2 a1}_{r} c)

      exact (eqtohomot (base_paths _ _ (pr212 f v w g)) c).

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
v, w: V
c: pr1 a1
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) c
· # (pr1 f)
    (actegory_actordata
       (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
          ax2 a1) v w c) =
actegory_actordata
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a2) v w (pr1 f c)
· v
  ⊗^{ actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
        ax2 a2}_{l} acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data
                      f w c
· acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f v
    (w
     ⊗_{ actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
           ax2 a1} c)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: bicat_of_cats ⟦ pr1 a1, pr1 a2 ⟧
δ: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat
  f
tri: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) f δ
pent: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) f δ
v, w: V
c: pr1 a1
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data (f,, δ,, tri,, pent)
  (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) c
· # (pr1 (f,, δ,, tri,, pent))
    (actegory_actordata
       (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
          ax2 a1) v w c) =
actegory_actordata
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a2) v w (pr1 (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) c)
· v
  ⊗^{ actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
        ax2 a2}_{l} acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data
                      (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) w c
· acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data
    (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) v
    (w
     ⊗_{ actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
           ax2 a1} c)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: bicat_of_cats ⟦ pr1 a1, pr1 a2 ⟧
δ: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat
  f
tri: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) f δ
pent: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) f δ
v, w: V
c: pr1 a1
tt: pr1
  (vcomp2
     (vcomp2
        (rassociator f ((pr12 a2) w)
           ((pr12 a2) v)
         :
         prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
           (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
              f w · (pr12 a2) v)
           (f
            · (pr12 a2) w
              ⊗_{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
                    (pr1 a2)} 
              (pr12 a2) v))
        (lwhisker f
           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
              (pr22 a2) w v)))
     (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
        f δ (w ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} v))) c =
pr1
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq_body_RHS
     (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
     (pr22 a1) f w v
     (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
        f δ w)
     (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
        f δ v)) c
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data (f,, δ,, tri,, pent)
  (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) c
· # (pr1 (f,, δ,, tri,, pent))
    (actegory_actordata
       (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
          ax2 a1) v w c) =
actegory_actordata
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a2) v w (pr1 (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) c)
· v
  ⊗^{ actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
        ax2 a2}_{l} acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data
                      (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) w c
· acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data
    (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) v
    (w
     ⊗_{ actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
           ax2 a1} c)

tt: identity ((pr12 a2) v ((pr12 a2) w (f c)))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr22 a2) w v)
    (pr1 f c)
· ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass

   · pr1
       (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
          f δ v) (pr1 ((pr12 a1) w) c))
· (identity (f ((pr12 a1) v ((pr12 a1) w c)))
   · # (pr1 f)
       (pr1
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
             (pr22 a1) w v) c))

  (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) c
· # (pr1 (f,, δ,, tri,, pent))
    (actegory_actordata

actegory_actordata

· v

        f δ w) c)
· pr1
    (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
       f δ v) (pr1 ((pr12 a1) w) c)
· # (pr1 f)
    (pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata 
          (pr22 a1) w v) c)
z_iso_ptwvFc:= (pr11 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
         (pr22 a2) w v)) 
  (pr1 f c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
        (pr22 a2) w v
      · pr1
          (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
             (pr22 a2) w v))
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2) w
         ⊗_{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
               (pr1 a2)} 
         (pr12 a2) v))
     (pr12 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
              (pr22 a2) w v))) 
  (pr1 f c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (pr1
        (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
           (pr22 a2) w v)
      · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
          (pr22 a2) w v)
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2)
           (w
            ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} v)))
     (pr22 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
              (pr22 a2) w v))) 
  (pr1 f c): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
        (pr22 a2) w v) (pr1 f c))
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data (f,, δ,, tri,, pent)
  (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) c
· # (pr1 (f,, δ,, tri,, pent))
    (actegory_actordata
       (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
          ax2 a1) v w c) =
actegory_actordata
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a2) v w (pr1 (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) c)
· v
  ⊗^{ actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
        ax2 a2}_{l} acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data
                      (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) w c
· acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data
    (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) v
    (w
     ⊗_{ actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
           ax2 a1} c)

  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) f δ
v, w: V
c: pr1 a1

  (pr1 f c)
· ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
    f δ (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) c =
# (pr1 ((pr12 a2) v))
  (pr1
     (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
        f δ w) c)
· pr1
    (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
       f δ v) (pr1 ((pr12 a1) w) c)
· # (pr1 f)
    (pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata 
          (pr22 a1) w v) c)

         (pr22 a2) w v)) 
  (pr1 f c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
        (pr22 a2) w v
      · pr1
          (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
             (pr22 a2) w v))
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2) w
         ⊗_{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
               (pr1 a2)} 
         (pr12 a2) v))
     (pr12 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
              (pr22 a2) w v))) 
  (pr1 f c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (pr1
        (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
           (pr22 a2) w v)
      · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
          (pr22 a2) w v)
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2)
           (w
            ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} v)))
     (pr22 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
              (pr22 a2) w v))) 
  (pr1 f c): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
        (pr22 a2) w v) (pr1 f c))
tt': ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
  f δ (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) c =
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata 
        (pr22 a2) w v) (pr1 f c),, z_iso_ptwvFc)
· (# (pr1 ((pr12 a2) v))
     (pr1
        (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
           f δ w) c)
   · pr1
       (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
          f δ v) (pr1 ((pr12 a1) w) c)
   · # (pr1 f)
       (pr1
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
             (pr22 a1) w v) c))
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data (f,, δ,, tri,, pent)
  (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) c
· # (pr1 (f,, δ,, tri,, pent))
    (actegory_actordata
       (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
          ax2 a1) v w c) =
actegory_actordata
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2

· v

actegory_actordata

  f δ (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) c =

  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata 
        (pr22 a2) w v) (pr1 f c),, z_iso_ptwvFc)
· (# (pr1 ((pr12 a2) v))
     (pr1
        (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
           f δ w) c)
   · pr1
       (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
          f δ v) (pr1 ((pr12 a1) w) c)
   · # (pr1 f)
       (pr1
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
             (pr22 a1) w v) c))
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr22 a2) w v)
     (pr1 f c),, z_iso_ptwvFc)
· (# (pr1 ((pr12 a2) v))
     (pr1
        (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
           f δ w) c)
   · pr1
       (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
          f δ v) (pr1 ((pr12 a1) w) c)
   · # (pr1 f)
       (pr1
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr22 a1) w v)
          c))
· # (pr1 (f,, δ,, tri,, pent))
    (actegory_actordata
       (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
          ax2 a1) v w c) =
actegory_actordata
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a2) v w (pr1 (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) c)
· v
  ⊗^{ actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
        ax2 a2}_{l} acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data
                      (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) w c
· acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data
    (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) v
    (w
     ⊗_{ actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
           ax2 a1} c)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: bicat_of_cats ⟦ pr1 a1, pr1 a2 ⟧
δ: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat
  f
tri: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) f δ
pent: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) f δ
v, w: V
c: pr1 a1
tt: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr22 a2) w v)
  (pr1 f c)
· ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
    f δ (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) c =
# (pr1 ((pr12 a2) v))
  (pr1
     (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
        f δ w) c)
· pr1
    (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
       f δ v) (pr1 ((pr12 a1) w) c)
· # (pr1 f)
    (pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata 
          (pr22 a1) w v) c)
z_iso_ptwvFc:= (pr11 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
         (pr22 a2) w v)) 
  (pr1 f c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
        (pr22 a2) w v
      · pr1
          (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
             (pr22 a2) w v))
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2) w
         ⊗_{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
               (pr1 a2)} 
         (pr12 a2) v))
     (pr12 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
              (pr22 a2) w v))) 
  (pr1 f c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (pr1
        (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
           (pr22 a2) w v)
      · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
          (pr22 a2) w v)
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2)
           (w
            ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} v)))
     (pr22 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
              (pr22 a2) w v))) 
  (pr1 f c): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
        (pr22 a2) w v) (pr1 f c))
tt': ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
  f δ (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) c =
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata 
        (pr22 a2) w v) (pr1 f c),, z_iso_ptwvFc)
· (# (pr1 ((pr12 a2) v))
     (pr1
        (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
           f δ w) c)
   · pr1
       (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
          f δ v) (pr1 ((pr12 a1) w) c)
   · # (pr1 f)
       (pr1
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
             (pr22 a1) w v) c))
(pr11 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly (pr22 a2) w v))
  (pr1 f c)
· (# (pr1 ((pr12 a2) v))
     (pr1
        (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
           f δ w) c)
   · pr1
       (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
          f δ v) (pr1 ((pr12 a1) w) c)
   · # (pr1 f)
       (pr1
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr22 a1) w v)
          c))
· # f
    (actor_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a1
       v w c) =
actor_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a2 v w
  (f c)
· # (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a2 v))
    (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data
       (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) w c)
· acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data
    (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) v
    (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a1 w)
       c)

  (pr1 f c)
· ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
    f δ (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) c =
# (pr1 ((pr12 a2) v))
  (pr1
     (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
        f δ w) c)
· pr1
    (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
       f δ v) (pr1 ((pr12 a1) w) c)
· # (pr1 f)
    (pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata 
          (pr22 a1) w v) c)

         (pr22 a2) w v)) 
  (pr1 f c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
        (pr22 a2) w v
      · pr1
          (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
             (pr22 a2) w v))
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2) w
         ⊗_{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
               (pr1 a2)} 
         (pr12 a2) v))
     (pr12 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
              (pr22 a2) w v))) 
  (pr1 f c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (pr1
        (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
           (pr22 a2) w v)
      · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
          (pr22 a2) w v)
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2)
           (w
            ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} v)))
     (pr22 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
              (pr22 a2) w v))) 
  (pr1 f c): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
        (pr22 a2) w v) (pr1 f c))
(pr11 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly (pr22 a2) w v))
  (pr1 f c)
· (# (pr1 ((pr12 a2) v))
     (pr1
        (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
           f δ w) c)
   · pr1
       (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
          f δ v) (pr1 ((pr12 a1) w) c)
   · # (pr1 f)
       (pr1
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr22 a1) w v)
          c))
· # f
    (actor_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a1
       v w c) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: bicat_of_cats ⟦ pr1 a1, pr1 a2 ⟧
δ: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat
  f
tri: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) f δ
pent: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) f δ
v, w: V
c: pr1 a1
tt: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr22 a2) w v)
  (pr1 f c)
· ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
    f δ (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) c =
# (pr1 ((pr12 a2) v))
  (pr1
     (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
        f δ w) c)
· pr1
    (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
       f δ v) (pr1 ((pr12 a1) w) c)
· # (pr1 f)
    (pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata 
          (pr22 a1) w v) c)
z_iso_ptwvFc:= (pr11 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
         (pr22 a2) w v)) 
  (pr1 f c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
        (pr22 a2) w v
      · pr1
          (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
             (pr22 a2) w v))
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2) w
         ⊗_{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
               (pr1 a2)} 
         (pr12 a2) v))
     (pr12 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
              (pr22 a2) w v))) 
  (pr1 f c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (pr1
        (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
           (pr22 a2) w v)
      · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
          (pr22 a2) w v)
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2)
           (w
            ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} v)))
     (pr22 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
              (pr22 a2) w v))) 
  (pr1 f c): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
        (pr22 a2) w v) (pr1 f c))
?b =
actor_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a2 v w
  (f c)
· (# (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a2 v))
     (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data
        (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) w c)
   · acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data
       (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) v
       (pr1
          (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a1 w)
          c))

     (pr12 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
              (pr22 a2) w v))) 
  (pr1 f c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (pr1
        (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
           (pr22 a2) w v)
      · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
          (pr22 a2) w v)
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2)
           (w
            ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} v)))
     (pr22 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
              (pr22 a2) w v))) 
  (pr1 f c): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
        (pr22 a2) w v) (pr1 f c))
# (pr1 ((pr12 a2) v))
  (pr1
     (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
        f δ w) c)
· pr1
    (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
       f δ v) (pr1 ((pr12 a1) w) c)
· # (pr1 f)
    (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr22 a1) w v)
       c)
· # f
    (actor_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a1
       v w c) = ?b
 apply assoc'. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: bicat_of_cats ⟦ pr1 a1, pr1 a2 ⟧
δ: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat
  f
tri: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) f δ
pent: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) f δ
v, w: V
c: pr1 a1
tt: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr22 a2) w v)
  (pr1 f c)
· ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
    f δ (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) c =
# (pr1 ((pr12 a2) v))
  (pr1
     (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
        f δ w) c)
· pr1
    (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
       f δ v) (pr1 ((pr12 a1) w) c)
· # (pr1 f)
    (pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata 
          (pr22 a1) w v) c)
z_iso_ptwvFc:= (pr11 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
         (pr22 a2) w v)) 
  (pr1 f c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
        (pr22 a2) w v
      · pr1
          (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
             (pr22 a2) w v))
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2) w
         ⊗_{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
               (pr1 a2)} 
         (pr12 a2) v))
     (pr12 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
              (pr22 a2) w v))) 
  (pr1 f c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (pr1
        (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
           (pr22 a2) w v)
      · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
          (pr22 a2) w v)
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2)
           (w
            ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} v)))
     (pr22 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
              (pr22 a2) w v))) 
  (pr1 f c): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
        (pr22 a2) w v) (pr1 f c))
# (pr1 ((pr12 a2) v))
  (pr1
     (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
        f δ w) c)
· pr1
    (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
       f δ v) (pr1 ((pr12 a1) w) c)
· (# (pr1 f)
     (pr1
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr22 a1) w v)
        c)
   · # f
       (actor_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
          a1 v w c)) =
# (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a2 v))
  (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data
     (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) w c)
· acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data
    (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) v
    (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a1 w)
       c)

  f

  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) f δ
pent: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) f δ
v, w: V
c: pr1 a1
tt: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr22 a2) w v)
  (pr1 f c)
· ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
    f δ (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) c =
# (pr1 ((pr12 a2) v))
  (pr1
     (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
        f δ w) c)
· pr1
    (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
       f δ v) (pr1 ((pr12 a1) w) c)
· # (pr1 f)
    (pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata 
          (pr22 a1) w v) c)
z_iso_ptwvFc:= (pr11 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
         (pr22 a2) w v)) 
  (pr1 f c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
        (pr22 a2) w v
      · pr1
          (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
             (pr22 a2) w v))
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2) w
         ⊗_{ monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
               (pr1 a2)} 
         (pr12 a2) v))
     (pr12 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
              (pr22 a2) w v))) 
  (pr1 f c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (pr1
        (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
           (pr22 a2) w v)
      · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
          (pr22 a2) w v)
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2)
           (w
            ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped Mon_V} v)))
     (pr22 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
              (pr22 a2) w v))) 
  (pr1 f c): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
        (pr22 a2) w v) (pr1 f c))
?b =
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data 
  (f,, δ,, tri,, pent) v
  (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a1 w) c)

  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2

     a2) (pr1 f) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f)

  (monoidal_unit Mon_V) c
· # (pr1 f)
    (actegory_unitordata
       (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
          ax2 a1) c) =
actegory_unitordata
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a2) (pr1 f c)

  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
F: bicat_of_cats ⟦ pr1 a1, pr1 a2 ⟧
δ: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat
  F
tri: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) F δ
pent: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) F δ
c: pr1 a1
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data (F,, δ,, tri,, pent)
  (monoidal_unit Mon_V) c
· # (pr1 (F,, δ,, tri,, pent))
    (actegory_unitordata
       (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
          ax2 a1) c) =
actegory_unitordata
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a2) (pr1 (F,, δ,, tri,, pent) c)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
F: bicat_of_cats ⟦ pr1 a1, pr1 a2 ⟧
δ: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat
  F
tri: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) F δ
pent: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) F δ
c: pr1 a1
tric: pr1
  (vcomp2
     (lwhisker F
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr22 a2)))
     (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
        F δ
        (monoidal_unit (monoidal_swapped Mon_V))))
  c =
pr1
  (vcomp2
     (vcomp2
        (runitor F
         :
         prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
           (F
            · monoidal_unit
                (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
                   (pr1 a2))) F)
        (linvunitor F
         :
         prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats F
           (monoidal_unit
              (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
                 (pr1 a1)) · F)))
     (rwhisker F
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr22 a1)))) c
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data (F,, δ,, tri,, pent)
  (monoidal_unit Mon_V) c
· # (pr1 (F,, δ,, tri,, pent))
    (actegory_unitordata
       (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
          ax2 a1) c) =
actegory_unitordata
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a2) (pr1 (F,, δ,, tri,, pent) c)

    (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr22 a1)) c)

  (monoidal_unit Mon_V) c
· # (pr1 (F,, δ,, tri,, pent))
    (actegory_unitordata
       (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
          ax2 a1) c) = ?b
 apply maponpaths_2 ; exact tric'. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
F: bicat_of_cats ⟦ pr1 a1, pr1 a2 ⟧
δ: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat
  F
tri: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) F δ
pent: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) F δ
c: pr1 a1
tric: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr22 a2))
  (pr1 F c)
· ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
    F δ (monoidal_unit Mon_V) c =
# (pr1 F)
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr22 a1)) c)
z_iso_puFc:= (pr11 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
         (pr22 a2))) (pr1 F c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr122 a2)
      · pr122 (pr22 a2))
     (identity
        (monoidal_unit
           (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
              (pr1 a2))))
     (pr122 (pr222 a2))) 
  (pr1 F c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (pr122 (pr22 a2)
      · fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr122 a2))
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2)
           (monoidal_unit
              (monoidal_swapped Mon_V))))
     (pr222 (pr222 a2))) 
  (pr1 F c): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr22 a2))
     (pr1 F c))
tric': ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
  F δ (monoidal_unit Mon_V) c =
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr22 a2))
     (pr1 F c),, z_iso_puFc)
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr22 a1)) c)
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr22 a2)) (pr1 F c),,
   z_iso_puFc)
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr22 a1)) c)
· # (pr1 (F,, δ,, tri,, pent))
    (actegory_unitordata
       (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
          ax2 a1) c) =
actegory_unitordata
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a2) (pr1 (F,, δ,, tri,, pent) c)

         (actegory_from_object
            (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a1) c) = 
?b

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
F: bicat_of_cats ⟦ pr1 a1, pr1 a2 ⟧
δ: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat
  F
tri: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) F δ
pent: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) F δ
c: pr1 a1
z_iso_puFc:= (pr11 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
         (pr22 a2))) (pr1 F c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr122 a2)
      · pr122 (pr22 a2))
     (identity
        (monoidal_unit
           (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
              (pr1 a2))))
     (pr122 (pr222 a2))) 
  (pr1 F c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (pr122 (pr22 a2)
      · fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr122 a2))
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2)
           (monoidal_unit
              (monoidal_swapped Mon_V))))
     (pr222 (pr222 a2))) 
  (pr1 F c): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr22 a2))
     (pr1 F c))
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr22 a1)) c
· actegory_unitordata
    (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
       a1) c = ?t2

        exact (eqtohomot (base_paths _ _ (pr122 (pr222 a1))) c).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
F: bicat_of_cats ⟦ pr1 a1, pr1 a2 ⟧
δ: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat
  F
tri: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) F δ
pent: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) F δ
c: pr1 a1
z_iso_puFc:= (pr11 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
         (pr22 a2))) (pr1 F c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr122 a2)
      · pr122 (pr22 a2))
     (identity
        (monoidal_unit
           (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
              (pr1 a2))))
     (pr122 (pr222 a2))) 
  (pr1 F c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (pr122 (pr22 a2)
      · fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr122 a2))
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2)
           (monoidal_unit
              (monoidal_swapped Mon_V))))
     (pr222 (pr222 a2))) 
  (pr1 F c): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr22 a2))
     (pr1 F c))
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr22 a2)) (pr1 F c),,
   z_iso_puFc)
· # F
    (pr1
       (identity
          (monoidal_unit
             (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 a1)))) c) =
actegory_unitordata
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a2) (pr1 (F,, δ,, tri,, pent) c)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
F: bicat_of_cats ⟦ pr1 a1, pr1 a2 ⟧
δ: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat
  F
tri: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_triangle_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) F δ
pent: ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.param_distr_bicat_pentagon_eq
  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) 
  (pr22 a1) (pr22 a2) F δ
c: pr1 a1
z_iso_puFc:= (pr11 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
         (pr22 a2))) (pr1 F c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr122 a2)
      · pr122 (pr22 a2))
     (identity
        (monoidal_unit
           (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob
              (pr1 a2))))
     (pr122 (pr222 a2))) 
  (pr1 F c),,
eqtohomot
  (base_paths
     (pr122 (pr22 a2)
      · fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr122 a2))
     (identity
        ((pr12 a2)
           (monoidal_unit
              (monoidal_swapped Mon_V))))
     (pr222 (pr222 a2))) 
  (pr1 F c): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr22 a2))
     (pr1 F c))
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr22 a2)) (pr1 F c),,
   z_iso_puFc)
· identity
    (F
       (monoidal_unit
          (monoidal_from_bicat_and_ob (pr1 a1)) c)) =
actegory_unitordata
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a2) (pr1 (F,, δ,, tri,, pent) c)

      apply id_right.
  Qed.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V

lineator_lax Mon_V
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a1)
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a2) (pr1 f)
