lineator_laxlaws Mon_V
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a1)
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
     a2) (pr1 f) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f)

    exact (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_lax_laws f).
  Defined.

Core.mor_disp (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1))
  (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2)) (pr1 f)

    exact (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_lax f).
  Defined.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
psfunctor_data ACTI ACAT

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
psfunctor_data ACTI ACAT

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
ACTI → ACAT
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
∏ a b : ACTI, ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧ → ACAT ⟦ ?F₀ a, ?F₀ b ⟧
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
∏ (a b : ACTI) (f g : ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧),
prebicat_cells ACTI f g
→ prebicat_cells ACAT (?F₁ a b f) (?F₁ a b g)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
∏ a : ACTI,
prebicat_cells ACAT (identity (?F₀ a))
  (?F₁ a a (identity a))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
∏ (a b c : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧),
prebicat_cells ACAT (?F₁ a b f · ?F₁ b c g)
  (?F₁ a c (f · g))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
ACTI → ACAT
 exact acti_to_acat_on_ob.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
∏ a b : ACTI,
ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ ACAT ⟦ acti_to_acat_on_ob a, acti_to_acat_on_ob b ⟧
 exact (λ a1 a2 f, acti_to_acat_on_mor f).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
∏ (a b : ACTI) (f g : ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧),
prebicat_cells ACTI f g
→ prebicat_cells ACAT
    ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f0 : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
      acti_to_acat_on_mor f0) a b f)
    ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f0 : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
      acti_to_acat_on_mor f0) a b g)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f, g: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
α: prebicat_cells ACTI f g
prebicat_cells ACAT
  ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
    acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a1 a2 f)
  ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
    acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a1 a2 g)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f, g: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
α: prebicat_cells ACTI f g
disp_2cells (pr1 α) (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))
  (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_mor g))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f, g: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
α: prebicat_cells ACTI f g
v: V
a: pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1)
pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_mor f) v a
· pr1 α (v ⊗_{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1)} a) =
v ⊗^{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2)}_{l} pr1 α a
· pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_mor g) v a

      exact (eqtohomot (base_paths _ _ (pr2 α v)) a).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
∏ a : ACTI,
prebicat_cells ACAT (identity (acti_to_acat_on_ob a))
  ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
    acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a a (identity a))

Mon_V: monoidal V

  ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
    acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a a (identity a))

Mon_V: monoidal V

prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_on_ob a)))
  (pr1
     ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
       acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a a (identity a)))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_on_ob a)))
         (pr1
            ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) 
              (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
              acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a a 
               (identity a))),
 disp_2cells η (pr2 (identity (acti_to_acat_on_ob a)))
   (pr2
      ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) 
        (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧), 
        acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a a 
         (identity a)))) 
  ?pr1

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_on_ob a)))
  (pr1
     ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
       acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a a (identity a)))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
is_nat_trans (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_on_ob a)))
  (pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_mor (identity a)))
  (λ c : pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a), identity c)

        intro ; intros ; exact (id_right _ @ ! id_left _).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_on_ob a)))
         (pr1
            ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
              acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a a (identity a))),
 disp_2cells η (pr2 (identity (acti_to_acat_on_ob a)))
   (pr2
      ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
        acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a a (identity a))))
  ((λ c : pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a), identity c),,
   ((λ (x x' : pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a))
     (f : pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a) ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
     id_right
       (# (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_on_ob a))) f) @
     ! id_left
         (# (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_on_ob a))) f))
    :
    is_nat_trans
      (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_on_ob a)))
      (pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_mor (identity a)))
      (λ c : pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a), identity c)))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
v: V
c: pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a)
pr2 (identity (acti_to_acat_on_ob a)) v c
· ((λ c : pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a), identity c),,
   (λ (x x' : pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a))
    (f : pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a) ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
    id_right
      (# (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_on_ob a))) f) @
    ! id_left
        (# (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_on_ob a))) f)))
    (v ⊗_{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a)} c) =
v
⊗^{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a)}_{l} ((λ c : pr1
                                              (acti_to_acat_on_ob
                                                 a),
                                      identity c),,
                                     (λ (x
                                         x' : pr1
                                                (acti_to_acat_on_ob
                                                 a))
                                      (f : pr1
                                             (acti_to_acat_on_ob
                                                a)
                                           ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
                                      id_right
                                        (# (pr1
                                              (identity
                                                 (acti_to_acat_on_ob
                                                 a)))
                                           f) @
                                      ! id_left
                                          (# (pr1
                                                (identity
                                                 (acti_to_acat_on_ob
                                                 a)))
                                             f))) c
· pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_mor (identity a)) v c

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
v: V
c: pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a)
identity_lineator_data Mon_V
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a)
  v c
· identity
    (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a v) c) =
# (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a v))
  (identity c)
· (identity ((pr12 a) v c) · identity ((pr12 a) v c))

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
v: V
c: pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a)
identity_lineator_data Mon_V
  (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a)
  v c =
# (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a v))
  (identity c)

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
v: V
c: pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a)
identity
  (functor_identity (pr1 a)
     (v
      ⊗_{ actegory_from_object
            (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a} c)) =
# (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a v))
  (identity c)

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
v: V
c: pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a)
identity
  (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a v) c) =
# (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a v))
  (identity c)

        apply (! functor_id _ _).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
∏ (a b c : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧),
prebicat_cells ACAT
  ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f0 : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
    acti_to_acat_on_mor f0) a b f
   · (λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f0 : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
      acti_to_acat_on_mor f0) b c g)
  ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f0 : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
    acti_to_acat_on_mor f0) a c (f · g))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2, a3: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
prebicat_cells ACAT
  ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
    acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a1 a2 f
   · (λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
      acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a2 a3 g)
  ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
    acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a1 a3 (f · g))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2, a3: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (pr1
     ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
       acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a1 a2 f
      · (λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
         acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a2 a3 g))
  (pr1
     ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
       acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a1 a3 (f · g)))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2, a3: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1
            ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) 
              (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
              acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a1 a2 f
             · (λ (a1 a2 : ACTI)
                (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
                acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a2 a3 g))
         (pr1
            ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) 
              (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
              acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a1 a3 
               (f · g))),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2
      ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) 
        (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧), 
        acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a1 a2 f
       · (λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) 
          (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧), 
          acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a2 a3 g))
   (pr2
      ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) 
        (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧), 
        acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a1 a3 
         (f · g)))) ?pr1

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2, a3: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (pr1
     ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
       acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a1 a2 f
      · (λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
         acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a2 a3 g))
  (pr1
     ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
       acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a1 a3 (f · g)))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2, a3: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
is_nat_trans
  (pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_mor f · acti_to_acat_on_mor g))
  (pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_mor (f · g)))
  (λ c : pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1),
   identity
     (pr1
        (acti_to_acat_on_mor f · acti_to_acat_on_mor g)
        c))

        intro ; intros ; exact (id_right _ @ ! id_left _).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2, a3: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1
            ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
              acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a1 a2 f
             · (λ (a1 a2 : ACTI)
                (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
                acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a2 a3 g))
         (pr1
            ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
              acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a1 a3 (f · g))),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2
      ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
        acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a1 a2 f
       · (λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
          acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a2 a3 g))
   (pr2
      ((λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
        acti_to_acat_on_mor f) a1 a3 (f · g))))
  ((λ c : pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1),
    identity
      (pr1
         (acti_to_acat_on_mor f
          · acti_to_acat_on_mor g) c)),,
   ((λ (x x' : pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1))
     (f0 : pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1) ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
     id_right
       (# (pr1
             (acti_to_acat_on_mor f
              · acti_to_acat_on_mor g)) f0) @
     ! id_left
         (# (pr1
               (acti_to_acat_on_mor f
                · acti_to_acat_on_mor g)) f0))
    :
    is_nat_trans
      (pr1
         (acti_to_acat_on_mor f
          · acti_to_acat_on_mor g))
      (pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_mor (f · g)))
      (λ c : pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1),
       identity
         (pr1
            (acti_to_acat_on_mor f
             · acti_to_acat_on_mor g) c))))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2, a3: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
v: V
c: pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1)
pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_mor f · acti_to_acat_on_mor g) v
  c
· ((λ c : pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1),
    identity
      (pr1
         (acti_to_acat_on_mor f
          · acti_to_acat_on_mor g) c)),,
   (λ (x x' : pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1))
    (f0 : pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1) ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
    id_right
      (# (pr1
            (acti_to_acat_on_mor f
             · acti_to_acat_on_mor g)) f0) @
    ! id_left
        (# (pr1
              (acti_to_acat_on_mor f
               · acti_to_acat_on_mor g)) f0)))
    (v ⊗_{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1)} c) =
v
⊗^{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a3)}_{l} ((λ c : pr1
                                               (acti_to_acat_on_ob
                                                 a1),
                                       identity
                                         (pr1
                                            (acti_to_acat_on_mor
                                               f
                                             · acti_to_acat_on_mor
                                                 g) c)),,
                                      (λ (x
                                          x' : pr1
                                                 (acti_to_acat_on_ob
                                                 a1))
                                       (f0 : pr1
                                               (acti_to_acat_on_ob
                                                 a1)
                                             ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
                                       id_right
                                         (# (pr1
                                               (acti_to_acat_on_mor
                                                 f
                                                · 
                                                acti_to_acat_on_mor
                                                 g))
                                            f0) @
                                       ! id_left
                                           (# (pr1
                                                 (acti_to_acat_on_mor
                                                 f
                                                 · 
                                                 acti_to_acat_on_mor
                                                 g))
                                              f0))) c
· pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_mor (f · g)) v c

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2, a3: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
v: V
c: pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1)
comp_lineator_data Mon_V
  (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_lax f)
  (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_lax g) v c
· identity
    (pr1 g
       (pr1 f
          (pr1
             (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a1
                v) c))) =
# (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a3 v))
  (identity (pr1 g (pr1 f c)))
· (identity ((pr12 a3) v (pr1 g (pr1 f c)))
   · (pr1
        (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
           (pr1 g) (pr12 g) v) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
      · (identity (pr1 g ((pr12 a2) v (pr1 f c)))
         · # (pr11 g)
             (pr1
                (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                   (pr1 f) (pr12 f) v) c)
         · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f ((pr12 a1) v c))))))

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2, a3: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
v: V
c: pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1)
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_lax g v (pr1 f c)
· # (pr1 g) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_lax f v c)
· identity
    (pr1 g
       (pr1 f
          (pr1
             (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a1
                v) c))) =
# (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a3 v))
  (identity (pr1 g (pr1 f c)))
· (identity ((pr12 a3) v (pr1 g (pr1 f c)))
   · (pr1
        (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
           (pr1 g) (pr12 g) v) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
      · (identity (pr1 g ((pr12 a2) v (pr1 f c)))
         · # (pr11 g)
             (pr1
                (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                   (pr1 f) (pr12 f) v) c)
         · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f ((pr12 a1) v c))))))

Mon_V: monoidal V

  bicat_of_cats

f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧

v: V
c: pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1)
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data g v (pr1 f c)
· # (pr1 g) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f v c)
· identity
    (pr1 g
       (pr1 f
          (pr1
             (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a1
                v) c))) =
# (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a3 v))
  (identity (pr1 g (pr1 f c)))
· (identity ((pr12 a3) v (pr1 g (pr1 f c)))
   · (pr1
        (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
           (pr1 g) (pr12 g) v) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
      · (identity (pr1 g ((pr12 a2) v (pr1 f c)))
         · # (pr11 g)
             (pr1
                (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                   (pr1 f) (pr12 f) v) c)
         · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f ((pr12 a1) v c))))))

  bicat_of_cats

f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
v: V
c: pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1)
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data g v (pr1 f c)
· # (pr1 g) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f v c) =
# (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a3 v))
  (identity (pr1 g (pr1 f c)))
· (identity ((pr12 a3) v (pr1 g (pr1 f c)))
   · (pr1
        (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
           (pr1 g) (pr12 g) v) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
      · (identity (pr1 g ((pr12 a2) v (pr1 f c)))
         · # (pr11 g)
             (pr1
                (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                   (pr1 f) (pr12 f) v) c))))

  bicat_of_cats

acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data g v (pr1 f c)
· # (pr1 g) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f v c) =
# (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a3 v))
  (identity (pr1 g (pr1 f c)))
· (pr1
     (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
        (pr1 g) (pr12 g) v) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
   · # (pr11 g)
       (pr1

             (pr1 f) (pr12 f) v) c))

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2, a3: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
v: V
c: pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1)
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data g v (pr1 f c)
· # (pr1 g) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f v c) =
# (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a3 v))
  (identity (pr1 g (pr1 f c)))
· (pr1
     (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
        (pr1 g) (pr12 g) v) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
   · # (pr11 g)
       (pr1

             (pr1 f) (pr12 f) v) c))

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2, a3: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
v: V
c: pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1)
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data g v (pr1 f c)
· # (pr1 g) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f v c) =
identity ((pr12 a3) v (pr1 g (pr1 f c)))
· (pr1
     (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
        (pr1 g) (pr12 g) v) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
   · # (pr11 g)
       (pr1
          (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
             (pr1 f) (pr12 f) v) c))

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2, a3: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
v: V
c: pr1 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a1)
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data g v (pr1 f c)
· # (pr1 g) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f v c) =
pr1
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1 g) (pr12 g) v) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· # (pr11 g)
    (pr1
       (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
          (pr1 f) (pr12 f) v) c)

        apply idpath.
  Defined.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
psfunctor_laws acti_to_acat_data

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
psfunctor_laws acti_to_acat_data

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: pr11 (acti_to_acat_data a)
identity (pr1 f x) =
# (pr11 f) (identity x) · identity (pr1 f x)
· identity (pr1 f x)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: pr11 (acti_to_acat_data a)
identity (pr1 f x) =
identity (pr1 (pr1 f) x) · identity (pr1 f x)
· identity (pr1 f x)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c, d: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: ACTI ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: pr11 (acti_to_acat_data a)
identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 (pr1 f) x)))
· identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
· identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 f x))) =
identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
· # (pr11 h) (identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
· identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: prebicat_cells ACTI g₁ g₂
x: pr11 (acti_to_acat_data a)
identity (pr1 g₁ (pr1 f x)) · (pr11 η) (pr1 (pr1 f) x) =
(pr11 η) (pr1 (pr1 f) x) · identity (pr1 g₂ (pr1 f x))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f₁, f₂: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: prebicat_cells ACTI f₁ f₂
x: pr11 (acti_to_acat_data a)
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f₁ x)) · # (pr11 g) ((pr11 η) x) =
# (pr11 g) ((pr11 η) x) · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f₂ x))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: pr11 (acti_to_acat_data a)
identity (pr1 f x) =
# (pr11 f) (identity x) · identity (pr1 f x)
· identity (pr1 f x)
 rewrite ! id_right ; apply (! functor_id _ _).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: pr11 (acti_to_acat_data a)
identity (pr1 f x) =
identity (pr1 (pr1 f) x) · identity (pr1 f x)
· identity (pr1 f x)
 rewrite ! id_right ; apply idpath.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c, d: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: ACTI ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: pr11 (acti_to_acat_data a)
identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 (pr1 f) x)))
· identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
· identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 f x))) =
identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
· # (pr11 h) (identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
· identity (pr1 h (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
 rewrite ! id_right ; rewrite (! functor_id _ _) ; rewrite id_left ; apply idpath.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: prebicat_cells ACTI g₁ g₂
x: pr11 (acti_to_acat_data a)
identity (pr1 g₁ (pr1 f x)) · (pr11 η) (pr1 (pr1 f) x) =
(pr11 η) (pr1 (pr1 f) x) · identity (pr1 g₂ (pr1 f x))
 rewrite id_left ; apply (! id_right _).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f₁, f₂: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: prebicat_cells ACTI f₁ f₂
x: pr11 (acti_to_acat_data a)
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f₁ x)) · # (pr11 g) ((pr11 η) x) =
# (pr11 g) ((pr11 η) x) · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f₂ x))
 rewrite id_left ; apply (! id_right _).
  Qed.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
invertible_cells acti_to_acat_data

  
V: category

ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
invertible_cells acti_to_acat_data

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
∏ a : ACTI,
is_invertible_2cell
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id acti_to_acat_data a)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
(λ _ : ∏ a : ACTI,
       is_invertible_2cell
         (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
            acti_to_acat_data a),
 ∏ (a b c : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g : ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
      acti_to_acat_data f g)) 
  ?pr1

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
∏ a : ACTI,
is_invertible_2cell
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id acti_to_acat_data a)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
is_invertible_2cell
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id acti_to_acat_data a)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
prebicat_cells ACAT (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a))
  (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
(λ φ : prebicat_cells ACAT
         (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a))
         (identity (acti_to_acat_data a)),
 vcomp2
   (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id acti_to_acat_data
      a) φ = id2 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))
 × vcomp2 φ
     (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
        acti_to_acat_data a) =
   id2 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a))) 
  ?pr1

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
prebicat_cells ACAT (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a))
  (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (pr1 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)))
  (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a)))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)))
         (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)))
   (pr2 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a)))) 
  ?pr1

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (pr1 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)))
  (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a)))
 apply nat_trans_id.
        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)))
         (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)))
   (pr2 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))))
  (nat_trans_id (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
v: V
x: pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)
pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)) v x
· nat_trans_id (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a)))
    (v ⊗_{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data a)} x) =
v
⊗^{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data a)}_{l} nat_trans_id
                                     (pr1
                                        (identity
                                           (acti_to_acat_data
                                              a))) x
· pr2 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a)) v x

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
v: V
x: pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)
identity ((pr12 a) v x) · identity ((pr12 a) v x)
· identity
    (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a v) x) =
# (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a v))
  (identity x)
· identity_lineator_data Mon_V
    (actegory_from_object (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
       a) v x

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
v: V
x: pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)
identity ((pr12 a) v x) =
# (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a v))
  (identity x)

          apply (! functor_id _ _).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
(λ φ : prebicat_cells ACAT
         (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a))
         (identity (acti_to_acat_data a)),
 vcomp2
   (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id acti_to_acat_data
      a) φ = id2 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))
 × vcomp2 φ
     (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
        acti_to_acat_data a) =
   id2 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)))
  (nat_trans_id (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))),,
   ((λ (v : V) (x : pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)),
     internal_paths_rew_r
       (pr1 a
        ⟦ pr1
            (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a v)
            x,
        pr1
          (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a v)
          x ⟧)
       (identity ((pr12 a) v x)
        · identity ((pr12 a) v x)
        · identity
            (pr1
               (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                  a v) x))
       (identity ((pr12 a) v x)
        · identity ((pr12 a) v x))
       (λ p : pr1 a
              ⟦ pr1
                  (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                     ax2 a v) x,
              pr1
                (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                   a v) x ⟧,
        p =
        # (pr1
             (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a
                v)) (identity x)
        · identity_lineator_data Mon_V
            (actegory_from_object
               (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a) v x)
       (internal_paths_rew_r
          (pr1 a ⟦ (pr12 a) v x, (pr12 a) v x ⟧)
          (identity ((pr12 a) v x)
           · identity ((pr12 a) v x))
          (identity ((pr12 a) v x))
          (λ p : pr1 a ⟦ (pr12 a) v x, (pr12 a) v x ⟧,
           p =
           # (pr1
                (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                   a v)) (identity x)
           · identity_lineator_data Mon_V
               (actegory_from_object
                  (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a) v x)
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (pr1 a
              ⟦ pr1
                  (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                     ax2 a v) x,
              pr1
                (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                   a v) x ⟧)
             (# (pr1
                   (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                      ax2 a v)) (identity x)
              · identity
                  (pr1
                     (action_C
                        (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a
                        v) x))
             (# (pr1
                   (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                      ax2 a v)) (identity x))
             (λ p : pr1 a
                    ⟦ pr1
                        (action_C
                           (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                           ax2 a v) x,
                    pr1
                      (action_C
                         (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                         a v) x ⟧,
              identity ((pr12 a) v x) = p)
             (! functor_id
                  (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                     ax2 a v) x)
             (id_right
                (# (pr1
                      (action_C
                         (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                         a v)) (identity x))))
          (id_right (identity ((pr12 a) v x))))
       (id_right
          (identity ((pr12 a) v x)
           · identity ((pr12 a) v x)))
     :
     pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)) v x
     · nat_trans_id
         (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a)))
         (v ⊗_{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data a)} x) =
     v
     ⊗^{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data a)}_{l} nat_trans_id
                                          (pr1
                                             (identity
                                                (acti_to_acat_data
                                                 a)))
                                          x
     · pr2 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a)) v x)
    :
    (λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
             (pr1 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)))
             (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))),
     disp_2cells η
       (pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)))
       (pr2 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))))
      (nat_trans_id
         (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))))))
 use tpair ; use equality_of_2cells_in_ACAT ; intro ; apply id_right.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
(λ _ : ∏ a : ACTI,
       is_invertible_2cell
         (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
            acti_to_acat_data a),
 ∏ (a b c : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g : ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
      acti_to_acat_data f g))
  (λ a : ACTI,
   (nat_trans_id
      (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))),,
    ((λ (v : V) (x : pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)),
      internal_paths_rew_r
        (pr1 a
         ⟦ pr1
             (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a
                v) x,
         pr1
           (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a v)
           x ⟧)
        (identity ((pr12 a) v x)
         · identity ((pr12 a) v x)
         · identity
             (pr1
                (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                   a v) x))
        (identity ((pr12 a) v x)
         · identity ((pr12 a) v x))
        (λ p : pr1 a
               ⟦ pr1
                   (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                      ax2 a v) x,
               pr1
                 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                    ax2 a v) x ⟧,
         p =
         # (pr1
              (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a
                 v)) (identity x)
         · identity_lineator_data Mon_V
             (actegory_from_object
                (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a) v x)
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (pr1 a ⟦ (pr12 a) v x, (pr12 a) v x ⟧)
           (identity ((pr12 a) v x)
            · identity ((pr12 a) v x))
           (identity ((pr12 a) v x))
           (λ p : pr1 a ⟦ (pr12 a) v x, (pr12 a) v x ⟧,
            p =
            # (pr1
                 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                    ax2 a v)) (identity x)
            · identity_lineator_data Mon_V
                (actegory_from_object
                   (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a) v x)
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (pr1 a
               ⟦ pr1
                   (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                      ax2 a v) x,
               pr1
                 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                    ax2 a v) x ⟧)
              (# (pr1
                    (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                       ax2 a v)) (identity x)
               · identity
                   (pr1
                      (action_C
                         (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                         a v) x))
              (# (pr1
                    (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                       ax2 a v)) (identity x))
              (λ p : pr1 a
                     ⟦ pr1
                         (action_C
                            (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                            ax2 a v) x,
                     pr1
                       (action_C
                          (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                          a v) x ⟧,
               identity ((pr12 a) v x) = p)
              (! functor_id
                   (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                      ax2 a v) x)
              (id_right
                 (# (pr1
                       (action_C
                          (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                          a v)) (identity x))))
           (id_right (identity ((pr12 a) v x))))
        (id_right
           (identity ((pr12 a) v x)
            · identity ((pr12 a) v x)))
      :
      pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)) v x
      · nat_trans_id
          (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a)))
          (v ⊗_{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data a)} x) =
      v
      ⊗^{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data a)}_{l} nat_trans_id
                                           (pr1
                                              (identity
                                                 (acti_to_acat_data
                                                 a)))
                                           x
      · pr2 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a)) v x)
     :
     (λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
              (pr1 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)))
              (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))),
      disp_2cells η
        (pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)))
        (pr2 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))))
       (nat_trans_id
          (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a)))))),,
   equality_of_2cells_in_ACAT
     (vcomp2
        (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
           acti_to_acat_data a)
        (nat_trans_id
           (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))),,
         ((λ (v : V) (x : pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)),
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (pr1 a
              ⟦ pr1
                  (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                     ax2 a v) x,
              pr1
                (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                   a v) x ⟧)
             (identity ((pr12 a) v x)
              · identity ((pr12 a) v x)
              · identity
                  (pr1
                     (action_C
                        (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a
                        v) x))
             (identity ((pr12 a) v x)
              · identity ((pr12 a) v x))
             (λ p : pr1 a
                    ⟦ pr1
                        (action_C
                           (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                           ax2 a v) x,
                    pr1
                      (action_C
                         (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                         a v) x ⟧,
              p =
              # (pr1
                   (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                      ax2 a v)) (identity x)
              · identity_lineator_data Mon_V
                  (actegory_from_object
                     (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a) v
                  x)
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (pr1 a ⟦ (pr12 a) v x, (pr12 a) v x ⟧)
                (identity ((pr12 a) v x)
                 · identity ((pr12 a) v x))
                (identity ((pr12 a) v x))
                (λ p : pr1 a ⟦ (pr12 a) v x,
                       (pr12 a) v x ⟧,
                 p =
                 # (pr1 (action_C ... ax2 a v))
                   (identity x)
                 · identity_lineator_data Mon_V
                     (actegory_from_object
                        (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a)
                     v x)
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (pr1 a
                    ⟦ pr1
                        (action_C
                           (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                           ax2 a v) x,
                    pr1
                      (action_C
                         (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                         a v) x ⟧)
                   (# (pr1 (action_C ... ax2 a v))
                      (identity x)
                    · identity
                        (pr1 (action_C ... ax2 a v) x))
                   (# (pr1 (action_C (...) ax2 a v))
                      (identity x))
                   (λ p : pr1 a
                          ⟦ pr1 (action_C ... ax2 a v)
                              x,
                          pr1 (action_C ... ax2 a v) x
                          ⟧,
                    identity ((pr12 a) v x) = p)
                   (! functor_id
                        (action_C
                           (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                           ax2 a v) x)
                   (id_right
                      (# (pr1 (...)) (identity x))))
                (id_right (identity ((pr12 a) v x))))
             (id_right
                (identity ((pr12 a) v x)
                 · identity ((pr12 a) v x)))
           :
           pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)) v x
           · nat_trans_id
               (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a)))
               (v ⊗_{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data a)} x) =
           v
           ⊗^{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data a)}_{l} nat_trans_id
                                                (pr1
                                                 (identity
                                                 (acti_to_acat_data
                                                 a)))
                                                x
           · pr2 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a)) v x)
          :
          (λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
                   (pr1
                      (# acti_to_acat_data
                         (identity a)))
                   (pr1
                      (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))),
           disp_2cells η
             (pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)))
             (pr2 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))))
            (nat_trans_id
               (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a)))))))
     (id2 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a)))
     (λ x : pr11 (acti_to_acat_data a),
      id_right
        ((pr11 (id2 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))))
           x)),,
   equality_of_2cells_in_ACAT
     (vcomp2
        (nat_trans_id
           (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))),,
         ((λ (v : V) (x : pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)),
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (pr1 a
              ⟦ pr1
                  (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                     ax2 a v) x,
              pr1
                (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                   a v) x ⟧)
             (identity ((pr12 a) v x)
              · identity ((pr12 a) v x)
              · identity
                  (pr1
                     (action_C
                        (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a
                        v) x))
             (identity ((pr12 a) v x)
              · identity ((pr12 a) v x))
             (λ p : pr1 a
                    ⟦ pr1
                        (action_C
                           (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                           ax2 a v) x,
                    pr1
                      (action_C
                         (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                         a v) x ⟧,
              p =
              # (pr1
                   (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                      ax2 a v)) (identity x)
              · identity_lineator_data Mon_V
                  (actegory_from_object
                     (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a) v
                  x)
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (pr1 a ⟦ (pr12 a) v x, (pr12 a) v x ⟧)
                (identity ((pr12 a) v x)
                 · identity ((pr12 a) v x))
                (identity ((pr12 a) v x))
                (λ p : pr1 a ⟦ (pr12 a) v x,
                       (pr12 a) v x ⟧,
                 p =
                 # (pr1 (action_C ... ax2 a v))
                   (identity x)
                 · identity_lineator_data Mon_V
                     (actegory_from_object
                        (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 a)
                     v x)
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (pr1 a
                    ⟦ pr1
                        (action_C
                           (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                           ax2 a v) x,
                    pr1
                      (action_C
                         (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                         a v) x ⟧)
                   (# (pr1 (action_C ... ax2 a v))
                      (identity x)
                    · identity
                        (pr1 (action_C ... ax2 a v) x))
                   (# (pr1 (action_C (...) ax2 a v))
                      (identity x))
                   (λ p : pr1 a
                          ⟦ pr1 (action_C ... ax2 a v)
                              x,
                          pr1 (action_C ... ax2 a v) x
                          ⟧,
                    identity ((pr12 a) v x) = p)
                   (! functor_id
                        (action_C
                           (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                           ax2 a v) x)
                   (id_right
                      (# (pr1 (...)) (identity x))))
                (id_right (identity ((pr12 a) v x))))
             (id_right
                (identity ((pr12 a) v x)
                 · identity ((pr12 a) v x)))
           :
           pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)) v x
           · nat_trans_id
               (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a)))
               (v ⊗_{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data a)} x) =
           v
           ⊗^{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data a)}_{l} nat_trans_id
                                                (pr1
                                                 (identity
                                                 (acti_to_acat_data
                                                 a)))
                                                x
           · pr2 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a)) v x)
          :
          (λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
                   (pr1
                      (# acti_to_acat_data
                         (identity a)))
                   (pr1
                      (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))),
           disp_2cells η
             (pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)))
             (pr2 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))))
            (nat_trans_id
               (pr1 (identity (acti_to_acat_data a))))))
        (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
           acti_to_acat_data a))
     (id2 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a)))
     (λ x : pr11 (acti_to_acat_data a),
      id_right
        ((pr11 (id2 (# acti_to_acat_data (identity a))))
           x)))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp acti_to_acat_data
     f g)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
prebicat_cells ACAT (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g))
  (# acti_to_acat_data f · # acti_to_acat_data g)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
(λ φ : prebicat_cells ACAT
         (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g))
         (# acti_to_acat_data f
          · # acti_to_acat_data g),
 vcomp2
   (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
      acti_to_acat_data f g) φ =
 id2 (# acti_to_acat_data f · # acti_to_acat_data g)
 × vcomp2 φ
     (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
        acti_to_acat_data f g) =
   id2 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g))) 
  ?pr1

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
prebicat_cells ACAT (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g))
  (# acti_to_acat_data f · # acti_to_acat_data g)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (pr1 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)))
  (pr1 (# acti_to_acat_data f · # acti_to_acat_data g))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)))
         (pr1
            (# acti_to_acat_data f
             · # acti_to_acat_data g)),
 disp_2cells η (pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)))
   (pr2
      (# acti_to_acat_data f · # acti_to_acat_data g)))
  ?pr1

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (pr1 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)))
  (pr1 (# acti_to_acat_data f · # acti_to_acat_data g))
 apply nat_trans_id.
        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)))
         (pr1
            (# acti_to_acat_data f
             · # acti_to_acat_data g)),
 disp_2cells η (pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)))
   (pr2
      (# acti_to_acat_data f · # acti_to_acat_data g)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (pr1
        (# acti_to_acat_data f · # acti_to_acat_data g)))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)
pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)) v x
· nat_trans_id
    (pr1
       (# acti_to_acat_data f · # acti_to_acat_data g))
    (v ⊗_{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data a)} x) =
v
⊗^{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data c)}_{l} nat_trans_id
                                     (pr1
                                        (# acti_to_acat_data
                                           f
                                         · # acti_to_acat_data
                                             g)) x
· pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data f · # acti_to_acat_data g)
    v x

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V

  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)
pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)) v x =
v
⊗^{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data c)}_{l} nat_trans_id
                                     (pr1
                                        (# acti_to_acat_data
                                           f
                                         · # acti_to_acat_data
                                             g)) x
· pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data f · # acti_to_acat_data g)
    v x

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)
pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)) v x = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)
?b =
v
⊗^{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data c)}_{l} 
nat_trans_id
  (pr1 (# acti_to_acat_data f · # acti_to_acat_data g))
  x
· pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data f · # acti_to_acat_data g)
    v x

Mon_V: monoidal V

  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)
?b =
v
⊗^{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data c)}_{l} nat_trans_id
                                     (pr1
                                        (# acti_to_acat_data
                                           f
                                         · # acti_to_acat_data
                                             g)) x
· pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data f · # acti_to_acat_data g)
    v x

Mon_V: monoidal V

  bicat_of_cats

f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)
?f =
v
⊗^{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data c)}_{l} nat_trans_id
                                     (pr1
                                        (# acti_to_acat_data
                                           f
                                         · # acti_to_acat_data
                                             g)) x
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)
?f =
# (pr1 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 c v))
  (identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))

               apply pathsinv0, functor_id. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)
pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)) v x =
identity
  (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 c v
     (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
· pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data f · # acti_to_acat_data g)
    v x

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)
pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)) v x =
pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data f · # acti_to_acat_data g) v
  x

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)
identity ((pr12 c) v (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
· (pr1
     (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
        (pr1 g) (pr12 g) v) (pr1 (pr1 f) x)
   · (identity (pr1 g ((pr12 b) v (pr1 f x)))
      · # (pr11 g)
          (pr1
             (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                (pr1 f) (pr12 f) v) x)
      · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f ((pr12 a) v x))))) =
comp_lineator_data Mon_V
  (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_lax f)
  (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_lax g) v x

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)
identity ((pr12 c) v (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
· (pr1 ((pr112 g) v) (pr1 (pr1 f) x)
   · (identity (pr1 g ((pr12 b) v (pr1 f x)))
      · # (pr11 g) (pr1 ((pr112 f) v) x)
      · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f ((pr12 a) v x))))) =
comp_lineator_data Mon_V
  (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_lax f)
  (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_lax g) v x

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)
identity ((pr12 c) v (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
· (pr1 ((pr112 g) v) (pr1 (pr1 f) x)
   · (identity (pr1 g ((pr12 b) v (pr1 f x)))
      · # (pr11 g) (pr1 ((pr112 f) v) x)
      · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f ((pr12 a) v x))))) =
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_lax g v (pr1 f x)
· # (pr1 g) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_lax f v x)

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)
identity ((pr12 c) v (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
· (pr1 ((pr112 g) v) (pr1 (pr1 f) x)
   · (identity (pr1 g ((pr12 b) v (pr1 f x)))
      · # (pr11 g) (pr1 ((pr112 f) v) x)
      · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f ((pr12 a) v x))))) =
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data g v (pr1 f x)
· # (pr1 g) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f v x)

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)
identity ((pr12 c) v (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
· (pr1 ((pr112 g) v) (pr1 (pr1 f) x)
   · (identity (pr1 g ((pr12 b) v (pr1 f x)))
      · # (pr11 g) (pr1 ((pr112 f) v) x))) =
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data g v (pr1 f x)
· # (pr1 g) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f v x)

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
v: V
x: pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)
pr1 ((pr112 g) v) (pr1 (pr1 f) x)
· # (pr11 g) (pr1 ((pr112 f) v) x) =
acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data g v (pr1 f x)
· # (pr1 g) (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data f v x)

          apply idpath.
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a, b, c: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ b, c ⟧
(λ φ : prebicat_cells ACAT
         (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g))
         (# acti_to_acat_data f
          · # acti_to_acat_data g),
 vcomp2
   (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
      acti_to_acat_data f g) φ =
 id2 (# acti_to_acat_data f · # acti_to_acat_data g)
 × vcomp2 φ
     (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
        acti_to_acat_data f g) =
   id2 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (pr1
        (# acti_to_acat_data f · # acti_to_acat_data g)),,
   ((λ (v : V) (x : pr1 (acti_to_acat_data a)),
     internal_paths_rew_r
       (pr1 (acti_to_acat_data c)
        ⟦ v
          ⊗_{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data c)} pr1
                                           (# acti_to_acat_data
                                              (f · g))
                                           x,
        pr1
          (# acti_to_acat_data f
           · # acti_to_acat_data g)
          (v ⊗_{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data a)} x) ⟧)
       (pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)) v x
        · identity
            (pr1
               (# acti_to_acat_data f
                · # acti_to_acat_data g)
               (v ⊗_{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data a)} x)))
       (pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)) v x)
       (λ p : pr1 (acti_to_acat_data c)
              ⟦ v
                ⊗_{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data c)} pr1
                                                 (# acti_to_acat_data
                                                 (f
                                                 · g))
                                                 x,
              pr1
                (# acti_to_acat_data f
                 · # acti_to_acat_data g)
                (v ⊗_{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data a)} x) ⟧,
        p =
        v
        ⊗^{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data c)}_{l} nat_trans_id
                                             (pr1
                                                (# acti_to_acat_data
                                                 f
                                                 · 
                                                 # acti_to_acat_data
                                                 g)) x
        · pr2
            (# acti_to_acat_data f
             · # acti_to_acat_data g) v x)
       (internal_paths_rew_r
          (pr1 c
           ⟦ action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 c v
               (pr1 g (pr1 f x)),
           pr1
             (# acti_to_acat_data f
              · # acti_to_acat_data g)
             (v ⊗_{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data a)} x) ⟧)
          (identity
             (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 c
                v (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
           · pr2
               (# acti_to_acat_data f
                · # acti_to_acat_data g) v x)
          (pr2
             (# acti_to_acat_data f
              · # acti_to_acat_data g) v x)
          (λ p : pr1 c
                 ⟦ action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                     ax2 c v (pr1 g (pr1 f x)),
                 pr1
                   (# acti_to_acat_data f
                    · # acti_to_acat_data g)
                   (v ⊗_{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data a)} x)
                 ⟧,
           pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)) v x = p)
          ((((internal_paths_rew_r
                (pr1 c ⟦ pr1 g ((pr12 b) v (pr1 f x)),
                 pr1 g (pr1 f (... v x)) ⟧)
                (identity (pr1 g (...))
                 · # (pr11 g) (pr1 (...) x)
                 · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f ...)))
                (identity (pr1 g (... v ...))
                 · # (pr11 g) (pr1 (... v) x))
                (λ p : pr1 c ⟦ pr1 g (... v ...),
                       pr1 g (pr1 f ...) ⟧,
                 identity (... v ...)
                 · (pr1 ... ... · p) =
                 acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data g v
                   (pr1 f x)
                 · # (pr1 g)
                     (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data
                        f v x))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (pr1 c ⟦ (pr12 c) v (pr1 g ...),
                    pr1 g (pr1 f ...) ⟧)
                   (identity (... v ...)
                    · (pr1 ... ... · (...)))
                   (pr1 (... v) (pr1 ... x)
                    · (identity ... · # ... ...))
                   (λ p : pr1 c ⟦ ... v ..., pr1 g ...
                          ⟧,
                    p =
                    acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_data
                      g v ... · # ... ...)
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (pr1 c ⟦ pr1 g ..., pr1 g ... ⟧)
                      (identity ... · # ... ...)
                      (# (pr11 g) (...))
                      (λ p : ..., ... = ...)
                      (idpath (...)) (id_left (...)))
                   (id_left (pr1 ... ... · (...))))
                (id_right
                   (identity (pr1 g ...)
                    · # (pr11 g) (pr1 ... x)))
              :
              identity ((pr12 c) v (pr1 g (...)))
              · (pr1 ((pr112 g) v) (pr1 (...) x)
                 · (identity ... · # ... ...
                    · identity (...))) =
              acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_lax g v
                (pr1 f x)
              · # (pr1 g)
                  (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_lax f
                     v x))
             :
             identity ((pr12 c) v (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
             · (pr1 ((pr112 g) v) (pr1 (pr1 f) x)
                · (identity (pr1 g ...)
                   · # (pr11 g) (pr1 ... x)
                   · identity (pr1 g (...)))) =
             comp_lineator_data Mon_V
               (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_lax f)
               (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_lax g) v
               x)
            :
            identity ((pr12 c) v (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
            · (pr1
                 (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                    (pr1 g) (pr12 g) v)
                 (pr1 (pr1 f) x)
               · (identity (pr1 g (... v ...))
                  · # (pr11 g)
                      (pr1
                         (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                            ... ... v) x)
                  · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f (...))))) =
            comp_lineator_data Mon_V
              (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_lax f)
              (acti_to_acat_on_mor_lineator_lax g) v x)
           :
           pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)) v x =
           pr2
             (# acti_to_acat_data f
              · # acti_to_acat_data g) v x)
          (id_left
             (pr2
                (# acti_to_acat_data f
                 · # acti_to_acat_data g) v x)) @
        cancel_postcomposition
          (identity
             (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 c
                v (pr1 g (pr1 f x))))
          (v
           ⊗^{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data c)}_{l} nat_trans_id
                                                (pr1
                                                 (# acti_to_acat_data
                                                 f
                                                 · 
                                                 # acti_to_acat_data
                                                 g)) x)
          (pr2
             (# acti_to_acat_data f
              · # acti_to_acat_data g) v x)
          (! functor_id
               (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                  c v) (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
           :
           identity
             (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2 c
                v (pr1 g (pr1 f x))) =
           v
           ⊗^{ pr2 (acti_to_acat_data c)}_{l} nat_trans_id
                                                (pr1
                                                 (# acti_to_acat_data
                                                 f
                                                 · 
                                                 # acti_to_acat_data
                                                 g)) x))
       (id_right
          (pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)) v x)))
    :
    (λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
             (pr1 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)))
             (pr1
                (# acti_to_acat_data f
                 · # acti_to_acat_data g)),
     disp_2cells η (pr2 (# acti_to_acat_data (f · g)))
       (pr2
          (# acti_to_acat_data f
           · # acti_to_acat_data g)))
      (nat_trans_id
         (pr1
            (# acti_to_acat_data f
             · # acti_to_acat_data g)))))
 use tpair ; use equality_of_2cells_in_ACAT ; intro ; apply id_right.
  Qed.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
psfunctor ACTI ACAT

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
psfunctor ACTI ACAT

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
psfunctor_data ACTI ACAT
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
psfunctor_laws ?F
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
invertible_cells ?F

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
psfunctor_data ACTI ACAT
 exact acti_to_acat_data.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
psfunctor_laws acti_to_acat_data
 exact acti_to_acat_laws.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
invertible_cells acti_to_acat_data
 exact acti_to_acat_invertible_cells.
  Defined.

End FromActionInCatToActegories.

Section ActionInCatEquivActegories.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
ACTI
⟦ Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti acti_to_acat
    a, Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI a ⟧

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
ACTI
⟦ Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti acti_to_acat
    a, Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI a ⟧

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
Core.mor_disp
  (pr2
     (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
        acti_to_acat a))
  (pr2 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI a))
  (identity
     (pr1
        (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
           acti_to_acat a)))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat
  (identity
     (pr1
        (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
           acti_to_acat a)))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
(λ δ : ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat
         (identity
            (pr1
               (Composition.comp_psfunctor

                      (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                         acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a),
              identity
                (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
                   (identity
                      (pr1
                         (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                            acat_to_acti acti_to_acat
                            a))) v c)),,
             (λ (c1
                 c2 : pr1
                        (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                           acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a))
              (f0 : pr1
                      (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                         acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a)
                    ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧),
              acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob_subproof a
                v c1 c2 f0))
            · # (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H'
                   (identity
                      (pr1
                         (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                            acat_to_acti acti_to_acat
                            a)))) f)
           (acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob_subproof0 a v
              w f))) v)
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (identity
        (pr1
           (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
              acti_to_acat a)))
     (make_nat_trans
        (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
           (identity
              (pr1
                 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                    acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a))))
        (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H'
           (identity
              (pr1
                 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                    acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a))))
        (λ v : V,
         (λ c : pr1
                  (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                     acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a),
          identity
            (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
               (identity
                  (pr1
                     (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                        acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a)))
               v c)),,
         (λ (c1
             c2 : pr1
                    (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                       acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a))
          (f : pr1
                 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                    acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a) ⟦ c1,
               c2 ⟧),
          acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob_subproof a v c1
            c2 f))
        (λ (v w : V) (f : V ⟦ v, w ⟧),
         nat_trans_eq
           (pr1 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI a))
           (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
              (identity
                 (pr1
                    (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                       acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a)))
              v)
           (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H'
              (identity
                 (pr1
                    (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                       acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a)))
              w)
           (# (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
                 (identity
                    (pr1
                       (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                          acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a))))
              f
            · ((λ c : pr1
                        (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                           acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a),
                identity
                  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
                     (identity
                        (pr1
                           (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                              acat_to_acti
                              acti_to_acat a))) w c)),,
               (λ (c1
                   c2 : pr1
                          (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                             acat_to_acti acti_to_acat
                             a))
                (f0 : pr1
                        (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                           acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a)
                      ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧),
                acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob_subproof
                  a w c1 c2 f0)))
           (((λ c : pr1
                      (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                         acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a),
              identity
                (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
                   (identity
                      (pr1
                         (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                            acat_to_acti acti_to_acat
                            a))) v c)),,
             (λ (c1
                 c2 : pr1
                        (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                           acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a))
              (f0 : pr1
                      (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                         acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a)
                    ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧),

            · # (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H'

                            acat_to_acti acti_to_acat
                            a)))) f)
           (acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob_subproof0 a v
              w f))) w) c

          abstract (
              cbn ;
              rewrite ! id_left ;
              rewrite ! id_right ;
              rewrite (functor_id ((pr12 a) w)) ;
              apply (! id_left _)).
  Defined.

g: pr1

· # (pr1
       (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
             acti_to_acat) f
        · acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a2)) g

          abstract (

                 · acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a2))
             (λ c : pr1
                      (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                       acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a1),
              identity
                (pr1
                   (acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a1
                    · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI) f)
                   c)))))) =
   id2
     (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
           acti_to_acat) f
      · (λ a : ACTI, acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a)
          a2)) ?pr1

  (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti

g: pr1
  (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1
            (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                  acat_to_acti acti_to_acat) f
             · (λ a : ACTI,
                acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a) a2))
         (pr1
            ((λ a : ACTI,
              acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a) a1
             · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI) f)),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2
      (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
            acti_to_acat) f
       · (λ a : ACTI, acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a)
           a2))
   (pr2
      ((λ a : ACTI, acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a) a1
       · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI) f)))
  ((λ c : pr1
            (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
               acti_to_acat a1),
    identity
      (pr1
         (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
               acti_to_acat) f
          · acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a2) c)),,
   ((λ (c1
        c2 : pr1
               (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                  acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a1))
     (g : pr1
            (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
               acti_to_acat a1) ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧),
     internal_paths_rew_r
       (pr1 a2 ⟦ pr1 f c1, pr1 f c2 ⟧)
       (identity (pr1 f c1) · # (pr1 f) g)
       (# (pr1 f) g)
       (λ p : pr1 a2 ⟦ pr1 f c1, pr1 f c2 ⟧,
        # (pr1 f) g · identity (pr1 f c2) = p)
       (id_right (# (pr1 f) g))
       (id_left (# (pr1 f) g))
     :
     # (pr1
          (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
                acti_to_acat) f
           · acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a2)) g
     · identity
         (pr1
            (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                  acat_to_acti acti_to_acat) f
             · acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a2) c2) =
     identity
       (pr1
          (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
                acti_to_acat) f
           · acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a2) c1)
     · # (pr1
            (acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a1
             · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI) f)) g)
    :
    is_nat_trans
      (pr1
         (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
               acti_to_acat) f
          · acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a2))
      (pr1
         (acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a1
          · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI) f))
      (λ c : pr1
               (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                  acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a1),
       identity
         (pr1
            (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                  acat_to_acti acti_to_acat) f
             · acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a2) c))))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
v: V
bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_eq_body bicat_of_cats
  ((λ c : pr1
            (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
               acti_to_acat a1),
    identity
      (pr1
         (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
               acti_to_acat) f
          · acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a2) c)),,
   (λ (c1
       c2 : pr1
              (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
                 acti_to_acat a1))
    (g : pr1
           (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
              acti_to_acat a1) ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧),
    internal_paths_rew_r
      (pr1 a2 ⟦ pr1 f c1, pr1 f c2 ⟧)
      (identity (pr1 f c1) · # (pr1 f) g)
      (# (pr1 f) g)
      (λ p : pr1 a2 ⟦ pr1 f c1, pr1 f c2 ⟧,
       # (pr1 f) g · identity (pr1 f c2) = p)
      (id_right (# (pr1 f) g)) (id_left (# (pr1 f) g))))
  (pr12 (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
           acti_to_acat a1))
  (pr12 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI a2))
  (pr12 (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
              acti_to_acat) f
         · acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a2))
  (pr12 (acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a1
         · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI) f)) v
