Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
v: V
∏
x : pr1
      (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
         acti_to_acat a1),
vcomp2
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1
        (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
              acti_to_acat) f
         · acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a2))
     (pr12 (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
                 acti_to_acat) f
            · acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a2)) v)
  (lwhisker
     ((pr12 (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
               acti_to_acat a1)) v)
     ((λ c : pr1
               (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                  acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a1),
       identity
         (pr1
            (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                  acat_to_acti acti_to_acat) f
             · acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a2) c)),,
      (λ (c1
          c2 : pr1
                 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                    acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a1))
       (g : pr1
              (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
                 acti_to_acat a1) ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧),
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (pr1 a2 ⟦ pr1 f c1, pr1 f c2 ⟧)
         (identity (pr1 f c1) · # (pr1 f) g)
         (# (pr1 f) g)
         (λ p : pr1 a2 ⟦ pr1 f c1, pr1 f c2 ⟧,
          # (pr1 f) g · identity (pr1 f c2) = p)
         (id_right (# (pr1 f) g))
         (id_left (# (pr1 f) g))))) x =
vcomp2
  (rwhisker ((pr12 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI a2)) v)
     ((λ c : pr1
               (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                  acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a1),
       identity
         (pr1
            (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                  acat_to_acti acti_to_acat) f
             · acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a2) c)),,
      (λ (c1
          c2 : pr1
                 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                    acat_to_acti acti_to_acat a1))
       (g : pr1
              (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
                 acti_to_acat a1) ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧),
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (pr1 a2 ⟦ pr1 f c1, pr1 f c2 ⟧)
         (identity (pr1 f c1) · # (pr1 f) g)
         (# (pr1 f) g)
         (λ p : pr1 a2 ⟦ pr1 f c1, pr1 f c2 ⟧,
          # (pr1 f) g · identity (pr1 f c2) = p)
         (id_right (# (pr1 f) g))
         (id_left (# (pr1 f) g)))))
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1
        (acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a1
         · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI) f))
     (pr12 (acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a1
            · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI) f)) v) x

  (rwhisker ((pr12 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI a2)) v)

              abstract (
                  simpl ;
                  rewrite ! id_left ;
                  rewrite ! id_right ;
                  rewrite (functor_id  ((pr12 a2) v)) ;
                  rewrite (functor_id (pr1 f)) ;
                  rewrite id_left ;

                ).

Mon_V: monoidal V

  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ φ : prebicat_cells ACTI
         (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
               acti_to_acat) f
          · (λ a : ACTI,
             acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a) a2)
         ((λ a : ACTI, acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a)
            a1 · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI) f),
 vcomp2
   (((λ c : pr1
              (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
                 acti_to_acat a1),
      identity

                 · acti_to_acat_unit_data_on_ob a2) c))))))

             intro ; simpl ; apply id_right.
  Defined.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats

  bicat_of_cats
X, Y: ACTI
f, g: ACTI ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: prebicat_cells ACTI f g
x: pr11 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) X)
(pr11 (psfunctor_on_cells (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)
         α)) x · identity (pr1 g x) =
identity (pr1 f x) · (pr11 α) x
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X: ACTI
x: pr11 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) X)
identity x · identity x =
identity x · identity x · (identity x · identity x)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X, Y, Z: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: pr11 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) X)
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x)) =
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· # (pr11 g) (identity (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 (pr1 f) x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· (identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
   · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X, Y: ACTI
f, g: ACTI ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: prebicat_cells ACTI f g
x: pr11 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) X)
(pr11 (psfunctor_on_cells (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)
         α)) x · identity (pr1 g x) =
identity (pr1 f x) · (pr11 α) x
 rewrite id_left ; apply id_right.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X: ACTI
x: pr11 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) X)
identity x · identity x =
identity x · identity x · (identity x · identity x)
 rewrite id_left ; apply (! id_left _).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X, Y, Z: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: pr11 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) X)
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x)) =
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· # (pr11 g) (identity (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 (pr1 f) x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· (identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
   · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
 rewrite ! id_left ; rewrite ! id_right ; apply (! functor_id _ _).
  Qed.

 exact acti_to_acat_unit_is_pstrans.
  Defined.

ACAT
⟦ Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat acat_to_acti
    a, Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT a ⟧

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACAT
Core.mor_disp
  (pr2
     (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
        acat_to_acti a))
  (pr2 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT a))
  (identity
     (pr1
        (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
           acat_to_acti a)))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACAT
lineator_laxlaws Mon_V
  (pr2
     (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
        acat_to_acti a))
  (pr2 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT a))
  (identity
     (pr1
        (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
           acat_to_acti a)))
  (λ (H : V)
   (H0 : pr1
           (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
              acat_to_acti a)),
   identity
     (H
      ⊗_{ pr2 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT a)} identity
                                                (pr1
                                                 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                                                 acti_to_acat
                                                 acat_to_acti
                                                 a))
                                                H0))

    abstract (
        simpl ;
        repeat split ; (intro ; intros ; try (rewrite id_right ; rewrite id_left ; apply idpath)) ;
        [
          rewrite id_left ;
          rewrite id_right ;
          rewrite (bifunctor_leftid (_ ,, pr122 a)) ;
          apply (! id_right _)
        |
          rewrite id_left ; apply idpath ]).
  Defined.

is_nat_trans
  (pr1
     (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
      · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f))
  (pr1
     (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
           acat_to_acti) f
      · acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a2))
  (λ c : pr1
           (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
              acat_to_acti a1),
   identity
     (pr1
        (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
         · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f) c))

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
c1, c2: pr1
  (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
     acat_to_acti a1)
g: pr1
  (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
     acat_to_acti a1) ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧
# (pr1
     (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
      · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f)) g
· identity
    (pr1
       (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
        · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f) c2) =
identity
  (pr1
     (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
      · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f) c1)
· # (pr1
       (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
             acat_to_acti) f
        · acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a2)) g

          abstract (
              simpl ;
              rewrite id_left ;
              apply id_right
            ).
        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1
            ((λ a : ACAT,
              acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a) a1
             · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f))
         (pr1
            (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                  acti_to_acat acat_to_acti) f
             · (λ a : ACAT,
                acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a) a2)),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2
      ((λ a : ACAT, acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a)
         a1 · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f))
   (pr2
      (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
            acat_to_acti) f
       · (λ a : ACAT, acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a)
           a2)))
  ((λ c : pr1
            (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
               acat_to_acti a1),
    identity
      (pr1
         (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
          · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f) c)),,
   ((λ (c1
        c2 : pr1
               (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                  acti_to_acat acat_to_acti a1))
     (g : pr1
            (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
               acat_to_acti a1) ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧),
     acti_to_acat_counit_data_subproof a1 a2 f c1 c2 g)
    :
    is_nat_trans
      (pr1
         (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
          · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f))
      (pr1
         (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
               acat_to_acti) f
          · acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a2))
      (λ c : pr1
               (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                  acti_to_acat acat_to_acti a1),
       identity
         (pr1
            (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
             · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f) c))))
 abstract (
              intro ; intro ;
              simpl ;
              unfold comp_lineator_data ;
              simpl ;
              rewrite functor_id ;
              rewrite ! id_right ;
              rewrite (bifunctor_leftid (_ ,, pr122 a2));
              rewrite ! id_left ;
              apply idpath
            ).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells ACAT
         ((λ a : ACAT,
           acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a) a1
          · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f)
         (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
               acat_to_acti) f
          · (λ a : ACAT,
             acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a) a2),
 is_invertible_2cell η)
  (((λ c : pr1
             (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
                acat_to_acti a1),
     identity
       (pr1
          (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
           · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f) c)),,
    ((λ (c1
         c2 : pr1
                (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                   acti_to_acat acat_to_acti a1))
      (g : pr1
             (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
                acat_to_acti a1) ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧),
      acti_to_acat_counit_data_subproof a1 a2 f c1 c2
        g)
     :
     is_nat_trans
       (pr1
          (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
           · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f))
       (pr1
          (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
                acat_to_acti) f
           · acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a2))
       (λ c : pr1
                (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                   acti_to_acat acat_to_acti a1),
        identity
          (pr1
             (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
              · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f) c)))),,
   acti_to_acat_counit_data_subproof0 a1 a2 f)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
prebicat_cells ACAT
  (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
        acat_to_acti) f
   · (λ a : ACAT, acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a) a2)
  ((λ a : ACAT, acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a) a1
   · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ φ : prebicat_cells ACAT
         (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
               acat_to_acti) f
          · (λ a : ACAT,
             acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a) a2)
         ((λ a : ACAT,
           acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a) a1
          · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f),
 vcomp2
   (((λ c : pr1
              (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
                 acat_to_acti a1),
      identity
        (pr1
           (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
            · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f) c)),,
     ((λ (c1
          c2 : pr1
                 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                    acti_to_acat acat_to_acti a1))
       (g : pr1
              (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
                 acat_to_acti a1) ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧),
       acti_to_acat_counit_data_subproof a1 a2 f c1 c2
         g)
      :
      is_nat_trans
        (pr1
           (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
            · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f))
        (pr1
           (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
                 acat_to_acti) f
            · acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a2))
        (λ c : pr1
                 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                    acti_to_acat acat_to_acti a1),
         identity
           (pr1
              (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
               · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f) c)))),,
    acti_to_acat_counit_data_subproof0 a1 a2 f) φ =
 id2
   ((λ a : ACAT, acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a) a1
    · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f)
 × vcomp2 φ
     (((λ c : pr1
                (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                   acti_to_acat acat_to_acti a1),
        identity
          (pr1
             (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
              · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f) c)),,
       ((λ (c1
            c2 : pr1
                   (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                      acti_to_acat acat_to_acti a1))
         (g : pr1
                (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                   acti_to_acat acat_to_acti a1) ⟦ c1,
              c2 ⟧),
         acti_to_acat_counit_data_subproof a1 a2 f c1
           c2 g)
        :
        is_nat_trans
          (pr1
             (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
              · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f))
          (pr1
             (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                   acti_to_acat acat_to_acti) f
              · acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a2))
          (λ c : pr1
                   (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                      acti_to_acat acat_to_acti a1),
           identity
             (pr1
                (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
                 · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f) c)))),,
      acti_to_acat_counit_data_subproof0 a1 a2 f) =
   id2
     (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
           acat_to_acti) f
      · (λ a : ACAT, acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a)
          a2)) ?pr1

  (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
        acat_to_acti) f
   · (λ a : ACAT, acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a) a2)
  ((λ a : ACAT, acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a) a1
   · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f)

a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
is_nat_trans
  (pr1
     (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
           acat_to_acti) f
      · acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a2))
  (pr1
     (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
      · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f))
  (λ c : pr1
           (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
              acat_to_acti a1),
   identity
     (pr1
        (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
              acat_to_acti) f
         · acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a2) c))

              abstract (

                  simpl ;

                  apply id_right
                ).
           
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1
            (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                  acti_to_acat acat_to_acti) f
             · (λ a : ACAT,
                acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a) a2))
         (pr1
            ((λ a : ACAT,
              acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a) a1
             · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f)),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2
      (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
            acat_to_acti) f
       · (λ a : ACAT, acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a)
           a2))
   (pr2
      ((λ a : ACAT, acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a)
         a1 · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f)))
  ((λ c : pr1
            (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
               acat_to_acti a1),
    identity
      (pr1
         (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
               acat_to_acti) f
          · acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a2) c)),,
   acti_to_acat_counit_data_subproof1 a1 a2 f)
 abstract (
                  intro ; intro ;
                  simpl ;
                  unfold comp_lineator_data ;
                  simpl ;
                  rewrite functor_id ;
                  rewrite ! id_right ;
                  rewrite (bifunctor_leftid (_ ,, pr122 a2)) ;
                  rewrite ! id_left ;
                  apply idpath
                ).
        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ φ : prebicat_cells ACAT
         (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
               acat_to_acti) f
          · (λ a : ACAT,
             acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a) a2)
         ((λ a : ACAT,
           acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a) a1
          · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f),
 vcomp2
   (((λ c : pr1
              (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
                 acat_to_acti a1),
      identity
        (pr1
           (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
            · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f) c)),,
     ((λ (c1
          c2 : pr1
                 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                    acti_to_acat acat_to_acti a1))
       (g : pr1
              (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
                 acat_to_acti a1) ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧),
       acti_to_acat_counit_data_subproof a1 a2 f c1 c2
         g)
      :
      is_nat_trans
        (pr1
           (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
            · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f))
        (pr1
           (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
                 acat_to_acti) f
            · acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a2))
        (λ c : pr1
                 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                    acti_to_acat acat_to_acti a1),
         identity
           (pr1
              (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
               · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f) c)))),,
    acti_to_acat_counit_data_subproof0 a1 a2 f) φ =
 id2
   ((λ a : ACAT, acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a) a1
    · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f)
 × vcomp2 φ
     (((λ c : pr1
                (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                   acti_to_acat acat_to_acti a1),
        identity
          (pr1
             (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
              · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f) c)),,
       ((λ (c1
            c2 : pr1
                   (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                      acti_to_acat acat_to_acti a1))
         (g : pr1
                (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                   acti_to_acat acat_to_acti a1) ⟦ c1,
              c2 ⟧),
         acti_to_acat_counit_data_subproof a1 a2 f c1
           c2 g)
        :
        is_nat_trans
          (pr1
             (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
              · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f))
          (pr1
             (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                   acti_to_acat acat_to_acti) f
              · acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a2))
          (λ c : pr1
                   (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                      acti_to_acat acat_to_acti a1),
           identity
             (pr1
                (acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a1
                 · # (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT) f) c)))),,
      acti_to_acat_counit_data_subproof0 a1 a2 f) =
   id2
     (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
           acat_to_acti) f
      · (λ a : ACAT, acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a)
          a2))
  (((λ c : pr1
             (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
                acat_to_acti a1),
     identity
       (pr1
          (# (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
                acat_to_acti) f
           · acti_to_acat_counit_data_on_ob a2) c)),,
    acti_to_acat_counit_data_subproof1 a1 a2 f),,
   acti_to_acat_counit_data_subproof2 a1 a2 f)
 use tpair ; use equality_of_2cells_in_ACAT ;
             intro ; simpl ; apply id_right.
  Defined.

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X, Y: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
x: pr11 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                acti_to_acat acat_to_acti)) X)
(pr11 (psfunctor_on_cells (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)
         α)) x · identity (pr1 g x) =
identity (pr1 f x) · (pr11 α) x
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X: ACAT
x: pr11 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                acti_to_acat acat_to_acti)) X)
identity x · identity x =
identity x · identity x · (identity x · identity x)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X, Y, Z: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: pr11 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                acti_to_acat acat_to_acti)) X)
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x)) =
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· # (pr11 g) (identity (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 (pr1 f) x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· (identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
   · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X, Y: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
x: pr11 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                acti_to_acat acat_to_acti)) X)
(pr11 (psfunctor_on_cells (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)
         α)) x · identity (pr1 g x) =
identity (pr1 f x) · (pr11 α) x
 rewrite id_left ; apply id_right.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X: ACAT
x: pr11 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                acti_to_acat acat_to_acti)) X)
identity x · identity x =
identity x · identity x · (identity x · identity x)
 rewrite id_left ; apply (! id_left _).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X, Y, Z: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: pr11 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                acti_to_acat acat_to_acti)) X)
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x)) =
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· # (pr11 g) (identity (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 (pr1 f) x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· (identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
   · identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x)))
 rewrite ! id_left ; rewrite ! id_right ; apply (! functor_id _ _).
  Qed.

              ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) x))))

                ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                   x),
        identity

             (functor_identity

                      x))) x0 H)),,
       ps_base_ACTI_subproof x x0)
      :

                 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                    x))))
        (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H'
           (functor_identity
              (pr1
                 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                    x)))))
     ((λ (x0 x' : V) (f : V ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
       nat_trans_eq
         (pr1
            ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                       acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) x))
         (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
            (functor_identity
               (pr1
                  ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                     x))) x0)
         (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H'
            (functor_identity
               (pr1
                  ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                     x))) x')
         (# (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
               (functor_identity
                  (pr1
                     ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                                ACTI)) x)))) f
          · ((λ H : pr1
                      ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                                 ACTI)) x),
              identity
                (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
                   (functor_identity
                      (pr1
                         ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                                    ACTI)) x))) x' H)),,
             ps_base_ACTI_subproof x x'))
         (((λ H : pr1
                    ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                               ACTI)) x),
            identity
              (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
                 (functor_identity
                    (pr1
                       ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                                  ACTI)) x))) x0 H)),,
           ps_base_ACTI_subproof x x0)
          · # (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H'
                 (functor_identity
                    (pr1
                       ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                                  ACTI)) x)))) f)
         (λ x1 : pr1
                   ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                      x),
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (pr1 x
             ⟦ pr1
                 (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                    ax2 x x0) x1, (pr12 x) x' x1 ⟧)
            (identity
               (pr1
                  (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                     ax2 x x0) x1)
             · pr1 (# (pr12 x) f) x1)
            (pr1 (# (pr12 x) f) x1)
            (λ p : pr1 x
                   ⟦ pr1
                       (action_C
                          (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                          x x0) x1, (pr12 x) x' x1 ⟧,
             pr1
               (# (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                     ax2 x) f) x1
             · identity
                 (pr1
                    (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                       ax2 x x') x1) = p)
            (id_right (pr1 (# (pr12 x) f) x1))
            (id_left (pr1 (# (pr12 x) f) x1))
          :
          (# (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
                (functor_identity
                   (pr1
                      ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                                 ACTI)) x)))) f
           · ((λ H : pr1
                       ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                                  ACTI)) x),
               identity
                 (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
                    (functor_identity (pr1 (...))) x'
                    H)),, ps_base_ACTI_subproof x x'))
            x1 =
          (((λ H : pr1
                     ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                                ACTI)) x),
             identity
               (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
                  (functor_identity (pr1 (...))) x0 H)),,
            ps_base_ACTI_subproof x x0)
           · # (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H'
                  (functor_identity
                     (pr1
                        ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                                   ACTI)) x)))) f) x1))
      :
      is_nat_trans
        (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
           (functor_identity
              (pr1
                 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                    x))))
        (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H'
           (functor_identity
              (pr1
                 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                    x))))
        ((λ x0 : V,

                   ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                      x),
           identity
             (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H

                                 ACTI)) x))) x0 H)),,

         :

                               ACTI)) x))))

                            (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                            ax2 x x1) x2,
                     (pr12 x) x' x2 ⟧,
               pr1
                 (# (action_C (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
                       ax2 x) f) x2
               · identity
                   (pr1
                      (action_C
                         (monoidal_swapped Mon_V) ax2
                         x x') x2) = p)
              (id_right (pr1 (# (pr12 x) f) x2))
              (id_left (pr1 (# (pr12 x) f) x2))))) w)
  x0

          abstract (
              intro ;
              cbn ;
              rewrite ! id_left ;
              rewrite ! id_right ;
              rewrite (functor_id ((pr12 x) w)) ;
              apply (! id_left _)
            ).
  Defined.

(λ _ : preserves_actor Mon_V

                       acti_to_acat acat_to_acti)) x))
         (functor_identity
            (pr1

         (λ (v : V)
          (x0 : pr1
                  ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT))
                     x)),

             ⊗_{ pr2
                   ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                              acti_to_acat
                              acat_to_acti)) x)} functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 ((pr111 
                                                 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                                                 ACAT))
                                                 x))

 preserves_unitor Mon_V
   (pr2 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)) x))
   (pr2
      ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
                 acat_to_acti)) x))
   (functor_identity

   (λ (v : V)
    (x0 : pr1 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)) x)),
    identity

             ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                        acti_to_acat acat_to_acti)) x)} 
       functor_identity
         (pr1 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)) x))
         x0))) (ps_base_ACAT_subproof1 x)
 abstract (intro ; apply id_left).
  Defined.

         (pr1

             · acti_to_acat_on_mor

 disp_2cells η (pr2 (f · ps_base_ACAT a2))

vcomp2 ((?pr1,, ?pr20),, ?pr2)
  ((?pr10,, ?pr22),, ?pr21) =
id2
  (ps_base_ACAT a1
   · acti_to_acat_on_mor (acat_to_acti_on_mor f))

(λ _ : vcomp2 ((?pr1,, ?pr20),, ?pr2)
         ((?pr10,, ?pr22),, ?pr21) =
       id2
         (ps_base_ACAT a1
          · acti_to_acat_on_mor
              (acat_to_acti_on_mor f)),
 vcomp2 ((?pr10,, ?pr22),, ?pr21)
   ((?pr1,, ?pr20),, ?pr2) = 
 id2 (f · ps_base_ACAT a2)) 
  ?pr11

 exact (λ _, identity _).

Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)

a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (pr1
            (ps_base_ACAT a1
             · acti_to_acat_on_mor
                 (acat_to_acti_on_mor f)))
         (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACAT a2)),
 is_nat_trans
   (pr1
      (ps_base_ACAT a1
       · acti_to_acat_on_mor (acat_to_acti_on_mor f)))
   (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACAT a2)) t)
  (λ x : pr1 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)) a1),
   identity
     (pr1
        (ps_base_ACAT a1
         · acti_to_acat_on_mor (acat_to_acti_on_mor f))
        x))
 abstract (
            intro ; intros ;

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1
            (ps_base_ACAT a1
             · acti_to_acat_on_mor
                 (acat_to_acti_on_mor f)))
         (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACAT a2)),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2
      (ps_base_ACAT a1
       · acti_to_acat_on_mor (acat_to_acti_on_mor f)))
   (pr2 (f · ps_base_ACAT a2)))
  ((λ x : pr1
            ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)) a1),
    identity
      (pr1
         (ps_base_ACAT a1
          · acti_to_acat_on_mor
              (acat_to_acti_on_mor f)) x)),,
   ACAT_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f)
 abstract (
          intro ; intro ;
          cbn ;
          unfold comp_lineator_data ;
          simpl ;
          rewrite (bifunctor_leftid (_ ,, pr122 a2)) ;
          rewrite ! id_left ;
          rewrite functor_id ;
          rewrite id_right ;
          apply id_right
        ).

  (pr1

      · acti_to_acat_on_mor (acat_to_acti_on_mor f)))

         (pr1

             · acti_to_acat_on_mor
                 (acat_to_acti_on_mor f))),
 is_nat_trans (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACAT a2))
   (pr1
      (ps_base_ACAT a1
       · acti_to_acat_on_mor (acat_to_acti_on_mor f)))
   t)
  (λ x : pr1 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)) a1),
   identity (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACAT a2) x))

Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACAT a2))
         (pr1
            (ps_base_ACAT a1
             · acti_to_acat_on_mor
                 (acat_to_acti_on_mor f))),
 disp_2cells η (pr2 (f · ps_base_ACAT a2))
   (pr2
      (ps_base_ACAT a1
       · acti_to_acat_on_mor (acat_to_acti_on_mor f))))
  ((λ x : pr1
            ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)) a1),
    identity (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACAT a2) x)),,
   ACAT_invertible_2cell_subproof1 a1 a2 f)
 abstract (
          intro ; intro ;
          cbn ;
          unfold comp_lineator_data ;
          simpl ;
          rewrite (bifunctor_leftid (_ ,, pr122 a2)) ;
          rewrite ! id_left ;
          rewrite functor_id ;
          apply idpath
        ).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
vcomp2
  (((λ x : pr1
             ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)) a1),
     identity
       (pr1
          (ps_base_ACAT a1
           · acti_to_acat_on_mor
               (acat_to_acti_on_mor f)) x)),,
    ACAT_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f),,
   ACAT_invertible_2cell_subproof0 a1 a2 f)
  (((λ x : pr1
             ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)) a1),
     identity (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACAT a2) x)),,
    ACAT_invertible_2cell_subproof1 a1 a2 f),,
   ACAT_invertible_2cell_subproof2 a1 a2 f) =
id2
  (ps_base_ACAT a1
   · acti_to_acat_on_mor (acat_to_acti_on_mor f))
 abstract (use equality_of_2cells_in_ACAT; intro; cbn; apply id_right).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ _ : vcomp2
         (((λ x : pr1
                    ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                               ACAT)) a1),
            identity
              (pr1
                 (ps_base_ACAT a1
                  · acti_to_acat_on_mor
                      (acat_to_acti_on_mor f)) x)),,
           ACAT_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f),,
          ACAT_invertible_2cell_subproof0 a1 a2 f)
         (((λ x : pr1
                    ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                               ACAT)) a1),
            identity (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACAT a2) x)),,
           ACAT_invertible_2cell_subproof1 a1 a2 f),,
          ACAT_invertible_2cell_subproof2 a1 a2 f) =
       id2
         (ps_base_ACAT a1
          · acti_to_acat_on_mor
              (acat_to_acti_on_mor f)),
 vcomp2
   (((λ x : pr1
              ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)) a1),
      identity (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACAT a2) x)),,
     ACAT_invertible_2cell_subproof1 a1 a2 f),,
    ACAT_invertible_2cell_subproof2 a1 a2 f)
   (((λ x : pr1
              ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)) a1),
      identity
        (pr1
           (ps_base_ACAT a1
            · acti_to_acat_on_mor
                (acat_to_acti_on_mor f)) x)),,
     ACAT_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f),,
    ACAT_invertible_2cell_subproof0 a1 a2 f) =
 id2 (f · ps_base_ACAT a2))
  (ACAT_invertible_2cell_subproof3 a1 a2 f)
 abstract (use equality_of_2cells_in_ACAT; intro; cbn; apply id_right).
  Defined.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
invertible_2cell
  (ps_base_ACTI a1
   · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))
  (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
invertible_2cell
  (ps_base_ACTI a1
   · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))
  (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
prebicat_cells ACTI
  (ps_base_ACTI a1
   · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))
  (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells ACTI
         (ps_base_ACTI a1
          · acat_to_acti_on_mor
              (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))
         (f · ps_base_ACTI a2), 
 is_invertible_2cell η) 
  ?pr1

Mon_V: monoidal V

  (ps_base_ACTI a1

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (pr1
     (ps_base_ACTI a1
      · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
  (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1
            (ps_base_ACTI a1
             · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                 (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
         (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2
      (ps_base_ACTI a1
       · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
   (pr2 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))) 
  ?pr1

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (pr1
     (ps_base_ACTI a1
      · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
  (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
is_nat_trans
  (pr1
     (ps_base_ACTI a1
      · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
  (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
  (λ H : pr1 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1),
   identity
     (pr1
        (ps_base_ACTI a1
         · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))
        H))

        abstract (
            intro ; intros ;
            cbn ;
            rewrite id_left ;
            apply id_right
          ).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1
            (ps_base_ACTI a1
             · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                 (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
         (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2
      (ps_base_ACTI a1
       · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
   (pr2 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)))
  ((λ H : pr1
            ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1),
    identity
      (pr1
         (ps_base_ACTI a1
          · acat_to_acti_on_mor
              (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)) H)),,
   ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
v: V
bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_eq_body bicat_of_cats
  ((λ H : pr1
            ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1),
    identity
      (pr1
         (ps_base_ACTI a1
          · acat_to_acti_on_mor
              (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)) H)),,
   ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f)
  (pr12 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1))
  (pr12 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
           (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2))))
  (pr12 (ps_base_ACTI a1
         · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
  (pr12 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)) v

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
v: V
has_homsets
  (pr1
     (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
        (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2))))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
v: V
∏ x : pr1 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1),
vcomp2
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1
        (ps_base_ACTI a1
         · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
     (pr12 (ps_base_ACTI a1
            · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))) v)
  (lwhisker
     ((pr12 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1))
        v)
     ((λ H : pr1
               ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                  a1),
       identity
         (pr1
            (ps_base_ACTI a1
             · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                 (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)) H)),,
      ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f)) x =
vcomp2
  (rwhisker
     ((pr12 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
               (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2)))) v)
     ((λ H : pr1
               ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                  a1),
       identity
         (pr1
            (ps_base_ACTI a1
             · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                 (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)) H)),,
      ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f))
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
     (pr12 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)) v) x

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
v: V
has_homsets
  (pr1
     (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
        (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2))))
 apply homset_property. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
v: V
∏ x : pr1 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1),
vcomp2
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1
        (ps_base_ACTI a1
         · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
     (pr12 (ps_base_ACTI a1
            · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))) v)
  (lwhisker
     ((pr12 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1))
        v)
     ((λ H : pr1
               ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                  a1),
       identity
         (pr1
            (ps_base_ACTI a1
             · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                 (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)) H)),,
      ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f)) x =
vcomp2
  (rwhisker
     ((pr12 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
               (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2)))) v)
     ((λ H : pr1
               ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                  a1),
       identity
         (pr1
            (ps_base_ACTI a1
             · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                 (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)) H)),,
      ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f))
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
     (pr12 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)) v) x

        abstract (
            intro ;
            cbn ;
            rewrite (functor_id (pr1 f)) ;
            rewrite ! id_left ;
            rewrite ! id_right ;
            rewrite (functor_id ((pr12 a2) v)) ;
            apply (! id_left _)
          ).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells ACTI
         (ps_base_ACTI a1
          · acat_to_acti_on_mor
              (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))
         (f · ps_base_ACTI a2), is_invertible_2cell η)
  (((λ H : pr1
             ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1),
     identity
       (pr1
          (ps_base_ACTI a1
           · acat_to_acti_on_mor
               (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)) H)),,
    ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f),,
   ((λ v : V,
     nat_trans_eq
       (pr1
          (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
             (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2))))
       (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
          (pr1
             (ps_base_ACTI a1
              · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                  (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))) v)
       ((pr12 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1))
          v · pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
       (vcomp2
          (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
             (pr1
                (ps_base_ACTI a1
                 · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                     (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
             (pr12 (ps_base_ACTI a1
                    · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                        (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))) v)
          (lwhisker
             ((pr12 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                               ACTI)) a1)) v)
             ((λ H : pr1
                       ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                                  ACTI)) a1),
               identity
                 (pr1
                    (ps_base_ACTI a1
                     · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                         (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)) H)),,
              ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f)))
       (vcomp2
          (rwhisker
             ((pr12 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
                       (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2))))
                v)
             ((λ H : pr1
                       ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                                  ACTI)) a1),
               identity
                 (pr1
                    (ps_base_ACTI a1
                     · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                         (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)) H)),,
              ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f))
          (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
             (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
             (pr12 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)) v))
       (ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof0 a1 a2 f v))
    :
    (λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
             (pr1
                (ps_base_ACTI a1
                 · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                     (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
             (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)),
     disp_2cells η
       (pr2
          (ps_base_ACTI a1
           · acat_to_acti_on_mor
               (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
       (pr2 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)))
      ((λ H : pr1
                ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                   a1),
        identity
          (pr1
             (ps_base_ACTI a1
              · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                  (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)) H)),,
       ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f)))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
prebicat_cells ACTI (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)
  (ps_base_ACTI a1
   · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ φ : prebicat_cells ACTI 
         (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)
         (ps_base_ACTI a1
          · acat_to_acti_on_mor
              (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)),
 vcomp2
   (((λ H : pr1
              ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1),
      identity
        (pr1
           (ps_base_ACTI a1
            · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)) H)),,
     ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f),,
    ((λ v : V,
      nat_trans_eq
        (pr1
           (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
              (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2))))
        (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
           (pr1
              (ps_base_ACTI a1
               · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                   (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))) v)
        ((pr12 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                  a1)) v · 
         pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
        (vcomp2
           (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
              (pr1
                 (ps_base_ACTI a1
                  · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                      (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
              (pr12 (ps_base_ACTI a1
                     · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                       (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))) v)
           (lwhisker
              ((pr12 ((pr111 
                       (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                       a1)) v)
              ((λ H : pr1 ((pr111 (...)) a1),
                identity
                  (pr1
                     (ps_base_ACTI a1
                      · 
                      acat_to_acti_on_mor ...) H)),,
               ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f)))
        (vcomp2
           (rwhisker
              ((pr12 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
                       (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2))))
                 v)
              ((λ H : pr1 ((pr111 (...)) a1),
                identity
                  (pr1
                     (ps_base_ACTI a1
                      · 
                      acat_to_acti_on_mor ...) H)),,
               ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f))
           (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
              (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
              (pr12 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)) v))
        (ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof0 a1 a2 f v))
     :
     (λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
              (pr1
                 (ps_base_ACTI a1
                  · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                      (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
              (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)),
      disp_2cells η
        (pr2
           (ps_base_ACTI a1
            · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
        (pr2 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)))
       ((λ H : pr1
                 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                    a1),
         identity
           (pr1
              (ps_base_ACTI a1
               · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                   (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)) H)),,
        ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f))) φ =
 id2
   (ps_base_ACTI a1
    · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))
 × vcomp2 φ
     (((λ H : pr1
                ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                   a1),
        identity
          (pr1
             (ps_base_ACTI a1
              · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                  (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)) H)),,
       ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f),,
      ((λ v : V,
        nat_trans_eq
          (pr1
             (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
                (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2))))
          (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
             (pr1
                (ps_base_ACTI a1
                 · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                     (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))) v)
          ((pr12 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                    a1)) v · 
           pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
          (vcomp2
             (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                (pr1
                   (ps_base_ACTI a1
                    · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                       (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
                (pr12 (ps_base_ACTI a1
                       · 
                       acat_to_acti_on_mor
                       (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))) v)
             (lwhisker
                ((pr12 ((pr111 
                       (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                       a1)) v)
                ((λ H : pr1 ((pr111 (...)) a1),
                  identity
                    (pr1
                       (ps_base_ACTI a1
                       · 
                       acat_to_acti_on_mor ...) H)),,
                 ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2
                   f)))
          (vcomp2
             (rwhisker
                ((pr12 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
                       (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2))))
                   v)
                ((λ H : pr1 ((pr111 (...)) a1),
                  identity
                    (pr1
                       (ps_base_ACTI a1
                       · 
                       acat_to_acti_on_mor ...) H)),,
                 ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2
                   f))
             (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
                (pr12 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)) v))
          (ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof0 a1 a2 f v))
       :
       (λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
                (pr1
                   (ps_base_ACTI a1
                    · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                       (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
                (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)),
        disp_2cells η
          (pr2
             (ps_base_ACTI a1
              · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                  (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
          (pr2 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)))
         ((λ H : pr1
                   ((pr111 
                     (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1),
           identity
             (pr1
                (ps_base_ACTI a1
                 · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                     (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)) H)),,
          ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f))) =
   id2 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)) 
  ?pr1

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
prebicat_cells ACTI (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)
  (ps_base_ACTI a1
   · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))

  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
  (pr1
     (ps_base_ACTI a1
      · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
         (pr1
            (ps_base_ACTI a1
             · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                 (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))),
 disp_2cells η (pr2 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
   (pr2
      (ps_base_ACTI a1
       · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))))
  ?pr1

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
  (pr1
     (ps_base_ACTI a1
      · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
is_nat_trans (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
  (pr1
     (ps_base_ACTI a1
      · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
  (λ H : pr1 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1),
   identity (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2) H))

          abstract (
              intro ; intros ;
              rewrite id_left ;
              apply id_right
            ).
        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
         (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
         (pr1
            (ps_base_ACTI a1
             · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                 (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))),
 disp_2cells η (pr2 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
   (pr2
      (ps_base_ACTI a1
       · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))))
  ((λ H : pr1
            ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1),
    identity (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2) H)),,
   ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof1 a1 a2 f)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
v: V
bidisp_actionbicat_disp_2cell_eq_body bicat_of_cats
  ((λ H : pr1
            ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1),
    identity (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2) H)),,
   ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof1 a1 a2 f)
  (pr12 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1))
  (pr12 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
           (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2))))
  (pr12 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
  (pr12 (ps_base_ACTI a1
         · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
  v

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
v: V
has_homsets
  (pr1
     (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
        (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2))))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
v: V
∏ x : pr1 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1),
vcomp2
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
     (pr12 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)) v)
  (lwhisker
     ((pr12 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1))
        v)
     ((λ H : pr1
               ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                  a1),
       identity (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2) H)),,
      ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof1 a1 a2 f)) x =
vcomp2
  (rwhisker
     ((pr12 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
               (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2)))) v)
     ((λ H : pr1
               ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                  a1),
       identity (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2) H)),,
      ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof1 a1 a2 f))
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1
        (ps_base_ACTI a1
         · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
     (pr12 (ps_base_ACTI a1
            · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))) v) x

Mon_V: monoidal V

  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
v: V
has_homsets
  (pr1
     (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
        (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2))))
 apply homset_property. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
v: V
∏ x : pr1 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1),
vcomp2
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
     (pr12 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)) v)
  (lwhisker
     ((pr12 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1))
        v)
     ((λ H : pr1
               ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                  a1),
       identity (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2) H)),,
      ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof1 a1 a2 f)) x =
vcomp2
  (rwhisker
     ((pr12 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
               (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2)))) v)
     ((λ H : pr1
               ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                  a1),
       identity (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2) H)),,
      ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof1 a1 a2 f))
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1
        (ps_base_ACTI a1
         · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
     (pr12 (ps_base_ACTI a1
            · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))) v) x

          abstract (
              intro ;
              cbn ;
              rewrite (functor_id (pr1 f)) ;
              rewrite ! id_left ;
              rewrite ! id_right ;
              rewrite (functor_id ((pr12 a2) v)) ;
              apply (! id_left _)
            ).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a1, a2: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
(λ φ : prebicat_cells ACTI (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)
         (ps_base_ACTI a1
          · acat_to_acti_on_mor
              (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)),
 vcomp2
   (((λ H : pr1
              ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1),
      identity
        (pr1
           (ps_base_ACTI a1
            · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)) H)),,
     ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f),,
    ((λ v : V,
      nat_trans_eq
        (pr1
           (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
              (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2))))
        (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
           (pr1
              (ps_base_ACTI a1
               · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                   (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))) v)
        ((pr12 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                  a1)) v · pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
        (vcomp2
           (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
              (pr1
                 (ps_base_ACTI a1
                  · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                      (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
              (pr12 (ps_base_ACTI a1
                     · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                         (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))) v)
           (lwhisker
              ((pr12 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                                ACTI)) a1)) v)
              ((λ H : pr1 ((pr111 (...)) a1),
                identity
                  (pr1
                     (ps_base_ACTI a1
                      · acat_to_acti_on_mor ...) H)),,
               ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f)))
        (vcomp2
           (rwhisker
              ((pr12 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
                        (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2))))
                 v)
              ((λ H : pr1 ((pr111 (...)) a1),
                identity
                  (pr1
                     (ps_base_ACTI a1
                      · acat_to_acti_on_mor ...) H)),,
               ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f))
           (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
              (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
              (pr12 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)) v))
        (ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof0 a1 a2 f v))
     :
     (λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
              (pr1
                 (ps_base_ACTI a1
                  · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                      (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
              (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)),
      disp_2cells η
        (pr2
           (ps_base_ACTI a1
            · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
        (pr2 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)))
       ((λ H : pr1
                 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                    a1),
         identity
           (pr1
              (ps_base_ACTI a1
               · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                   (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)) H)),,
        ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f))) φ =
 id2
   (ps_base_ACTI a1
    · acat_to_acti_on_mor (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))
 × vcomp2 φ
     (((λ H : pr1
                ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                   a1),
        identity
          (pr1
             (ps_base_ACTI a1
              · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                  (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)) H)),,
       ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f),,
      ((λ v : V,
        nat_trans_eq
          (pr1
             (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
                (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2))))
          (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
             (pr1
                (ps_base_ACTI a1
                 · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                     (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))) v)
          ((pr12 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                    a1)) v · pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
          (vcomp2
             (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                (pr1
                   (ps_base_ACTI a1
                    · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                        (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
                (pr12 (ps_base_ACTI a1
                       · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                           (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))) v)
             (lwhisker
                ((pr12 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                                  ACTI)) a1)) v)
                ((λ H : pr1 ((pr111 (...)) a1),
                  identity
                    (pr1
                       (ps_base_ACTI a1
                        · acat_to_acti_on_mor ...) H)),,
                 ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2
                   f)))
          (vcomp2
             (rwhisker
                ((pr12 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
                          (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2))))
                   v)
                ((λ H : pr1 ((pr111 (...)) a1),
                  identity
                    (pr1
                       (ps_base_ACTI a1
                        · acat_to_acti_on_mor ...) H)),,
                 ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2
                   f))
             (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
                (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
                (pr12 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)) v))
          (ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof0 a1 a2 f v))
       :
       (λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
                (pr1
                   (ps_base_ACTI a1
                    · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                        (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
                (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)),
        disp_2cells η
          (pr2
             (ps_base_ACTI a1
              · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                  (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
          (pr2 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)))
         ((λ H : pr1
                   ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                      a1),
           identity
             (pr1
                (ps_base_ACTI a1
                 · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                     (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)) H)),,
          ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof a1 a2 f))) =
   id2 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
  (((λ H : pr1
             ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1),
     identity (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2) H)),,
    ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof1 a1 a2 f),,
   ((λ v : V,
     nat_trans_eq
       (pr1
          (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
             (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2))))
       (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
          (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)) v)
       ((pr12 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) a1))
          v
        · pr1
            (ps_base_ACTI a1
             · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                 (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
       (vcomp2
          (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
             (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
             (pr12 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2)) v)
          (lwhisker
             ((pr12 ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                               ACTI)) a1)) v)
             ((λ H : pr1
                       ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                                  ACTI)) a1),
               identity (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2) H)),,
              ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof1 a1 a2 f)))
       (vcomp2
          (rwhisker
             ((pr12 (actegory_to_object Mon_V ax2
                       (pr2 (acti_to_acat_on_ob a2))))
                v)
             ((λ H : pr1
                       ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor
                                  ACTI)) a1),
               identity (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2) H)),,
              ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof1 a1 a2 f))
          (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
             (pr1
                (ps_base_ACTI a1
                 · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                     (acti_to_acat_on_mor f)))
             (pr12 (ps_base_ACTI a1
                    · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                        (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))) v))
       (ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof2 a1 a2 f v))
    :
    (λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
             (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
             (pr1
                (ps_base_ACTI a1
                 · acat_to_acti_on_mor
                     (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))),
     disp_2cells η (pr2 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2))
       (pr2
          (ps_base_ACTI a1
           · acat_to_acti_on_mor
               (acti_to_acat_on_mor f))))
      ((λ H : pr1
                ((pr111 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
                   a1),
        identity (pr1 (f · ps_base_ACTI a2) H)),,
       ACTI_invertible_2cell_subproof1 a1 a2 f)))
 abstract (
            use tpair ; use equality_of_2cells_in_ACTI ;
             intro ; simpl ; apply id_left).
  Defined.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
psfunctor_bicat ACTI ACTI
⟦ Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI,
Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti acti_to_acat ⟧

 Core.mor_disp (pr21 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))

Core.mor_disp (pr211 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))
  (pr211 (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti

      exact (λ a1 a2 f, ACTI_invertible_2cell f).

  bicat_of_cats
(λ f : Map1Cells.map1cells ACTI ACTI
       ⟦ pr11 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI),

 Core.mor_disp (pr21 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI))

  (ps_base_ACTI,,
   (λ (a1 a2 : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
    ACTI_invertible_2cell f))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X, Y: ACTI
f, g: ACTI ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: prebicat_cells ACTI f g
x: pr11 (Map1Cells.Fobj
        (pr11 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) X)
(pr11 α) x · identity (pr1 g x) =
identity (pr1 f x) · (pr11 α) x
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X: ACTI
x: pr11 (Map1Cells.Fobj
        (pr11 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) X)
identity x · identity x · identity x =
identity x · identity x · identity x
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X, Y, Z: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: pr11 (Map1Cells.Fobj
        (pr11 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) X)
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x)) =
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· # (pr11 g) (identity (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 (pr1 f) x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X, Y: ACTI
f, g: ACTI ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: prebicat_cells ACTI f g
x: pr11 (Map1Cells.Fobj
        (pr11 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) X)
(pr11 α) x · identity (pr1 g x) =
identity (pr1 f x) · (pr11 α) x
 abstract (rewrite id_left ; apply id_right).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X: ACTI
x: pr11 (Map1Cells.Fobj
        (pr11 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) X)
identity x · identity x · identity x =
identity x · identity x · identity x
 abstract (apply idpath).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X, Y, Z: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: ACTI ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: pr11 (Map1Cells.Fobj
        (pr11 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACTI)) X)
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x)) =
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· # (pr11 g) (identity (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 (pr1 f) x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
 abstract (rewrite ! id_left ;
                  rewrite ! id_right ;
                  apply (! functor_id (pr1 g) _)
                 ).
  Defined.

V: category

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X, Y: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
x: pr11 (Map1Cells.Fobj
        (pr11 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)) X)
(pr11 α) x · identity (pr1 g x) =
identity (pr1 f x) · (pr11 α) x
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X: ACAT
x: pr11 (Map1Cells.Fobj
        (pr11 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)) X)
identity x · identity x · identity x =

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X, Y, Z: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: pr11 (Map1Cells.Fobj
        (pr11 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)) X)
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x)) =
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· # (pr11 g) (identity (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 (pr1 f) x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X, Y: ACAT
f, g: ACAT ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: prebicat_cells ACAT f g
x: pr11 (Map1Cells.Fobj
        (pr11 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)) X)
(pr11 α) x · identity (pr1 g x) =
identity (pr1 f x) · (pr11 α) x
 abstract (rewrite id_left ; apply id_right).

identity x · identity x · identity x =

Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X, Y, Z: ACAT
f: ACAT ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: ACAT ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: pr11 (Map1Cells.Fobj
        (pr11 (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)) X)
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x)) =
identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· # (pr11 g) (identity (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 (pr1 f) x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
· identity (pr1 g (pr1 f x))
 abstract (rewrite ! id_left ;
                  rewrite ! id_right ;
                  apply (! functor_id (pr1 g) _)
                 ).
  Defined.

     ((λ H : pr1
               ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                          acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))
                  x),
       identity
         (pr1
            ((pr111 (identity
                       (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                          acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)))
               x) H)),,
      unit_left_adjoint_data_subproof x),,
     ((λ v : V,
       nat_trans_eq
         (pr1
            ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                       acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) x))
         (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H
            (pr1
               ((pr111 (identity
                          (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                             acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)))
                  x)) v)
         ((pr12 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                           acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))
                   x)) v
          · pr1
              ((pr111 (acti_to_acat_unit
                       · ps_functor_ACTI)) x))
         (vcomp2
            (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
               (pr1
                  ((pr111 (identity
                             (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                                acat_to_acti
                                acti_to_acat))) x))
               (pr12 ((pr111 (identity
                                (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                                   acat_to_acti
                                   acti_to_acat))) x))
               v)
            (lwhisker
               ((pr12 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                                 acat_to_acti
                                 acti_to_acat)) x)) v)
               ((λ H : pr1 ((pr111 (...)) x),
                 identity (pr1 ((pr111 ...) x) H)),,
                unit_left_adjoint_data_subproof x)))
         (vcomp2
            (rwhisker
               ((pr12 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                                 acat_to_acti
                                 acti_to_acat)) x)) v)
               ((λ H : pr1 ((pr111 (...)) x),
                 identity (pr1 ((pr111 ...) x) H)),,
                unit_left_adjoint_data_subproof x))
            (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
               (pr1
                  ((pr111 (acti_to_acat_unit
                           · ps_functor_ACTI)) x))
               (pr12 ((pr111 (acti_to_acat_unit
                              · ps_functor_ACTI)) x))
               v))
         (unit_left_adjoint_data_subproof0 x v))
      :
      (λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
               (pr1
                  ((pr111 (identity
                             (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                                acat_to_acti
                                acti_to_acat))) x))
               (pr1
                  ((pr111 (acti_to_acat_unit
                           · ps_functor_ACTI)) x)),
       disp_2cells η
         (pr2
            ((pr111 (identity
                       (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                          acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)))
               x))
         (pr2
            ((pr111 (acti_to_acat_unit
                     · ps_functor_ACTI)) x)))
        ((λ H : pr1
                  ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                             acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))
                     x),
          identity
            (pr1
               ((pr111 (identity
                          (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                             acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)))
                  x) H)),,
         unit_left_adjoint_data_subproof x)))
    :
    prebicat_cells (Base.ps_base ACTI ACTI)
      (pr111 (identity
                (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                   acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)))
      (pr111 (acti_to_acat_unit · ps_functor_ACTI))),,
   unit_left_adjoint_data_subproof1)
 exact (tt,,(tt,,tt)).

           (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass

  ?pr1
