a: ACTI
v: V
∏
x : pr1
      ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
                 acti_to_acat)) a),
vcomp2
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1
        ((pr111 (acti_to_acat_unit
                 · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                     unit_left_adjoint_data)) a))
     (pr12 ((pr111 (acti_to_acat_unit
                    · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                       unit_left_adjoint_data)) a)) v)
  (lwhisker
     ((pr12 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                       acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) a))
        v)
     ((λ H : pr1
               ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                       acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) a),
       identity
         (pr1
            ((pr111 (acti_to_acat_unit
                     · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                       unit_left_adjoint_data)) a) H)),,
      invertible_2cell_unit_data_subproof a)) x =
vcomp2
  (rwhisker
     ((pr12 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                       acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) a))
        v)
     ((λ H : pr1
               ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                       acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) a),
       identity
         (pr1
            ((pr111 (acti_to_acat_unit
                     · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                       unit_left_adjoint_data)) a) H)),,
      invertible_2cell_unit_data_subproof a))
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1
        ((pr111 (identity
                   (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                      acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))) a))
     (pr12 ((pr111 (identity
                      (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                       acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))) a))
     v) x

  bicat_of_cats

v: V
has_homsets
  (pr1

                acti_to_acat)) a))
 apply homset_property. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
a: ACTI
v: V
∏
x : pr1
      ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
                 acti_to_acat)) a),
vcomp2
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1
        ((pr111 (acti_to_acat_unit
                 · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                     unit_left_adjoint_data)) a))
     (pr12 ((pr111 (acti_to_acat_unit
                    · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                        unit_left_adjoint_data)) a)) v)
  (lwhisker
     ((pr12 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                       acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) a))
        v)
     ((λ H : pr1
               ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                          acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))
                  a),
       identity
         (pr1
            ((pr111 (acti_to_acat_unit
                     · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                         unit_left_adjoint_data)) a) H)),,
      invertible_2cell_unit_data_subproof a)) x =
vcomp2
  (rwhisker
     ((pr12 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                       acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) a))
        v)
     ((λ H : pr1
               ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                          acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))
                  a),
       identity
         (pr1
            ((pr111 (acti_to_acat_unit
                     · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                         unit_left_adjoint_data)) a) H)),,
      invertible_2cell_unit_data_subproof a))
  (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.parameterized_distributivity_bicat_nat_funclass
     (pr1
        ((pr111 (identity
                   (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                      acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))) a))
     (pr12 ((pr111 (identity
                      (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                         acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)))
              a)) v) x

        abstract (
            intro ;
            simpl ;
            rewrite ! id_left ;
            rewrite id_right ;
            apply (! functor_id _ _)
          ).
  Defined.

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
X, Y: ACTI
f: ACTI ⟦ X, Y ⟧
∏
x : pr11 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                    acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) X),
(pr11 (vcomp2
         ((pr211 (acti_to_acat_unit
                  · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                      unit_left_adjoint_data)) X Y f)
         (lwhisker
            ((pr211 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                       acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) X Y
               f) (invertible_2cell_unit_data Y)))) x =
(pr11 (vcomp2
         (rwhisker
            ((pr211 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                       acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) X Y
               f) (invertible_2cell_unit_data X))
         ((pr211 (identity
                    (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                       acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))) X
            Y f))) x

          abstract (
              intro ;
              simpl ;
              rewrite ! id_left ;
              rewrite id_right ;
              apply (! functor_id _ _)
            ).
        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
(λ η : prebicat_cells (Map1Cells.map1cells ACTI ACTI)
         (pr11 (acti_to_acat_unit
                · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    unit_left_adjoint_data))
         (pr11 (identity
                  (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                     acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr21 (acti_to_acat_unit
          · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
              unit_left_adjoint_data))
   (pr21 (identity
            (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
               acti_to_acat))))
  ((λ a : ACTI, invertible_2cell_unit_data a),,
   ((λ (X Y : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     equality_of_2cells_in_ACTI
       (vcomp2
          ((pr211 (acti_to_acat_unit
                   · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                       unit_left_adjoint_data)) X Y f)
          (lwhisker
             ((pr211 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                        acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) X
                Y f) (invertible_2cell_unit_data Y)))
       (vcomp2
          (rwhisker
             ((pr211 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                        acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) X
                Y f) (invertible_2cell_unit_data X))
          ((pr211 (identity
                     (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                        acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))) X
             Y f))
       (is_invertible_2cell_unit_subproof X Y f))
    :
    disp_2cells
      (λ a : ACTI, invertible_2cell_unit_data a)
      (pr211 (acti_to_acat_unit
              · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                  unit_left_adjoint_data))
      (pr211 (identity
                (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                   acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)))))
 repeat (use tpair) ; try (exact tt).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
(λ η : prebicat_cells (psfunctor_data_bicat ACTI ACTI)
         (pr1
            (acti_to_acat_unit
             · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                 unit_left_adjoint_data))
         (pr1
            (identity
               (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                  acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2
      (acti_to_acat_unit
       · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
           unit_left_adjoint_data))
   (pr2
      (identity
         (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
            acti_to_acat))))
  (((λ a : ACTI, invertible_2cell_unit_data a),,
    ((λ (X Y : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
      equality_of_2cells_in_ACTI
        (vcomp2
           ((pr211 (acti_to_acat_unit
                    · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                        unit_left_adjoint_data)) X Y f)
           (lwhisker
              ((pr211 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                         acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) X
                 Y f) (invertible_2cell_unit_data Y)))
        (vcomp2
           (rwhisker
              ((pr211 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                         acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)) X
                 Y f) (invertible_2cell_unit_data X))
           ((pr211 (identity
                      (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                         acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)))
              X Y f))
        (is_invertible_2cell_unit_subproof X Y f))
     :
     disp_2cells
       (λ a : ACTI, invertible_2cell_unit_data a)
       (pr211 (acti_to_acat_unit
               · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                   unit_left_adjoint_data))
       (pr211 (identity
                 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                    acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))))),,
   tt,, tt,, tt)
 exact tt.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
vcomp2
  (Adjunctions.left_adjoint_unit
     unit_left_adjoint_data)
  ((((λ a : ACTI, invertible_2cell_unit_data a),,
     ((λ (X Y : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
       equality_of_2cells_in_ACTI
         (vcomp2
            ((pr211 (acti_to_acat_unit
                     · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                         unit_left_adjoint_data)) X Y
               f)
            (lwhisker
               ((pr211 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                          acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))
                  X Y f)
               (invertible_2cell_unit_data Y)))
         (vcomp2
            (rwhisker
               ((pr211 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                          acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))
                  X Y f)
               (invertible_2cell_unit_data X))
            ((pr211 (identity
                       (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                          acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)))
               X Y f))
         (is_invertible_2cell_unit_subproof X Y f))
      :
      disp_2cells
        (λ a : ACTI, invertible_2cell_unit_data a)
        (pr211 (acti_to_acat_unit
                · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    unit_left_adjoint_data))
        (pr211 (identity
                  (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                     acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))))),,
    tt,, tt,, tt),, tt) =
id2
  (identity
     (Composition.comp_psfunctor acat_to_acti
        acti_to_acat))
 abstract (
          use equality_of_ACTI_endofunctors ;
          intro ; intro ;
          simpl ; apply id_right
        ).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
vcomp2
  ((((λ a : ACTI, invertible_2cell_unit_data a),,
     ((λ (X Y : ACTI) (f : ACTI ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
       equality_of_2cells_in_ACTI
         (vcomp2
            ((pr211 (acti_to_acat_unit
                     · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                         unit_left_adjoint_data)) X Y
               f)
            (lwhisker
               ((pr211 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                          acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))
                  X Y f)
               (invertible_2cell_unit_data Y)))
         (vcomp2
            (rwhisker
               ((pr211 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                          acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))
                  X Y f)
               (invertible_2cell_unit_data X))
            ((pr211 (identity
                       (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                          acat_to_acti acti_to_acat)))
               X Y f))
         (is_invertible_2cell_unit_subproof X Y f))
      :
      disp_2cells
        (λ a : ACTI, invertible_2cell_unit_data a)
        (pr211 (acti_to_acat_unit
                · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    unit_left_adjoint_data))
        (pr211 (identity
                  (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                     acat_to_acti acti_to_acat))))),,
    tt,, tt,, tt),, tt)
  (Adjunctions.left_adjoint_unit
     unit_left_adjoint_data) =
id2
  (acti_to_acat_unit
   · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
       unit_left_adjoint_data)
 abstract (use equality_of_ACTI_endofunctors ;
      intro ; intro ; simpl ; apply id_right).
  Qed.

                       · acti_to_acat_unit))),,
            is_invertible_2cell_counit_subproof1),,
           tt,, tt,, tt),, tt) =
       id2
         (Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
            unit_left_adjoint_data · acti_to_acat_unit),
 vcomp2
   (((((λ x : ACTI,

                     x),
          identity (pr1 ((pr111 (...)) x) H)),,
         is_invertible_2cell_counit_subproof x),,
        ((λ v : V,
          nat_trans_eq (pr1 ((pr111 (...)) x))
            (ActionBasedStrongFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.H

                  (pr1 ...) (pr12 (...)) v)

      is_invertible_2cell_counit_subproof1),,
     tt,, tt,, tt),, tt)

  is_invertible_2cell_counit_subproof2

  bicat_of_cats
(λ η : prebicat_cells (Base.ps_base ACAT ACAT)
         (pr111 (identity (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)))
         (pr111 (Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                   counit_left_adjoint_data
                 · acti_to_acat_counit)),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr211 (identity (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)))
   (pr211 (Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             counit_left_adjoint_data
           · acti_to_acat_counit)))
  (λ x : ACAT, prebicat_cells_ACAT x)
 abstract (
          intro ; intros ;
          use equality_of_2cells_in_ACAT ;
          intro ;
          simpl ;
          rewrite ! id_left ;
          rewrite id_right ;
          apply (! functor_id _ _)
        ).

     is_invertible_2cell_counit'_subproof),,
    tt,, tt,, tt),, tt) =

     counit_left_adjoint_data · acti_to_acat_counit)
 abstract (

           tt,, tt,, tt),, tt) =
       id2

          · acti_to_acat_counit),

     tt,, tt,, tt),, tt)
   (Adjunctions.left_adjoint_counit
      counit_left_adjoint_data) =
 id2 (identity (Identity.id_psfunctor ACAT)))
  is_invertible_2cell_counit'_subproof0
 abstract (

          intro ; intro ;

   Qed.

x: ACAT
(λ η : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats

                         counit_left_adjoint_data)) x))
         (pr1

                          acti_to_acat acat_to_acti)))
               x)),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2
      ((pr111 (acti_to_acat_counit
               · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                   counit_left_adjoint_data)) x))
   (pr2
      ((pr111 (identity
                 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                    acti_to_acat acat_to_acti))) x)))
  ((λ H : pr1
            ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                       acti_to_acat acat_to_acti)) x),
    identity
      (pr1
         ((pr111 (acti_to_acat_counit
                  · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                      counit_left_adjoint_data)) x) H)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_unit'_subproof x)
 abstract (
            intro ; intros ;
            simpl ;
            unfold comp_lineator_data ;
            unfold identity_lineator_data ;
            cbn ;
            rewrite (bifunctor_leftid (_ ,, pr122 x)) ;
            apply id_right
          ).

Mon_V: monoidal V

(λ η : prebicat_cells (Base.ps_base ACAT ACAT)

 disp_2cells η
   (pr211 (acti_to_acat_counit
           · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
               counit_left_adjoint_data))
   (pr211 (identity
             (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
                acat_to_acti))))
  ((λ x : ACAT,
    ((λ H : pr1
              ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                         acti_to_acat acat_to_acti)) x),
      identity
        (pr1
           ((pr111 (acti_to_acat_counit
                    · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                        counit_left_adjoint_data)) x)
           H)),, is_invertible_2cell_unit'_subproof x),,
    is_invertible_2cell_unit'_subproof0 x)
   :
   prebicat_cells (Base.ps_base ACAT ACAT)
     (pr111 (acti_to_acat_counit
             · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                 counit_left_adjoint_data))
     (pr111 (identity
               (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                  acti_to_acat acat_to_acti))))

          rewrite ! id_left ;

          apply (! functor_id _ _)
        ).

Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
vcomp2
  (Adjunctions.left_adjoint_unit
     counit_left_adjoint_data)
  (((((λ x : ACAT,
       ((λ H : pr1
                 ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                            acti_to_acat acat_to_acti))
                    x),
         identity
           (pr1
              ((pr111 (acti_to_acat_counit
                       · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                           counit_left_adjoint_data))
                 x) H)),,
        is_invertible_2cell_unit'_subproof x),,
       is_invertible_2cell_unit'_subproof0 x)
      :
      prebicat_cells (Base.ps_base ACAT ACAT)
        (pr111 (acti_to_acat_counit
                · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    counit_left_adjoint_data))
        (pr111 (identity
                  (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                     acti_to_acat acat_to_acti)))),,
     is_invertible_2cell_unit'_subproof1),,
    tt,, tt,, tt),, tt) =
id2
  (identity
     (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
        acat_to_acti))
 abstract (

          intro ; intro ;
          simpl ; apply id_right

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
ax2: actionbicat_ax2 (monoidal_swapped Mon_V)
  bicat_of_cats
(λ _ : vcomp2
         (Adjunctions.left_adjoint_unit
            counit_left_adjoint_data)
         (((((λ x : ACAT,
              ((λ H : pr1 ((pr111 (...)) x),
                identity (pr1 ((pr111 ...) x) H)),,
               is_invertible_2cell_unit'_subproof x),,
              is_invertible_2cell_unit'_subproof0 x)
             :
             prebicat_cells (Base.ps_base ACAT ACAT)
               (pr111 (acti_to_acat_counit
                       · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                           counit_left_adjoint_data))
               (pr111 (identity
                         (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                            acti_to_acat acat_to_acti)))),,
            is_invertible_2cell_unit'_subproof1),,
           tt,, tt,, tt),, tt) =
       id2
         (identity
            (Composition.comp_psfunctor acti_to_acat
               acat_to_acti)),
 vcomp2
   (((((λ x : ACAT,
        ((λ H : pr1
                  ((pr111 (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                             acti_to_acat acat_to_acti))
                     x),
          identity (pr1 ((pr111 (...)) x) H)),,
         is_invertible_2cell_unit'_subproof x),,
        is_invertible_2cell_unit'_subproof0 x)
       :
       prebicat_cells (Base.ps_base ACAT ACAT)
         (pr111 (acti_to_acat_counit
                 · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                     counit_left_adjoint_data))
         (pr111 (identity
                   (Composition.comp_psfunctor
                      acti_to_acat acat_to_acti)))),,
      is_invertible_2cell_unit'_subproof1),,
     tt,, tt,, tt),, tt)
   (Adjunctions.left_adjoint_unit
      counit_left_adjoint_data) =
 id2
   (acti_to_acat_counit
    · Adjunctions.left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        counit_left_adjoint_data))
  is_invertible_2cell_unit'_subproof2
 abstract (use equality_of_ACAT_endofunctors ;
      intro ; intro ; simpl ; apply id_right).
  Qed.
